tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- dim_missing_gl_accounts.sqlx
-- Gold common dimension: accounts present in account master but absent from GL
-- Source: dw_1_silver_visma.dim_account
-- Grain: one row per tenant + account_cd
-- =============================================================================

WITH account_base AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    synced_at,
    organization_name,
    account_id,
    account_cd,
    account_cd_numeric,
    account_class,
    account_group_cd,
    account_type,
    control_account_module,
    tax_category,
    post_option,
    public_code,
    public_code_1,
    account_description,
    is_active,
    is_cash_account,
    allow_manual_entry,
    use_default_sub,
    use_default_subaccount,
    currency_id,
    account_mapping_profile,
    last_modified_at,
    account_code_1,
    account_code_2,
    account_code_3,
    bs_pl,
    fsli_1,
    fsli_2,
    fsli_3,
    is_ebitda,
    is_net_income,
    cf_1,
    cf_2,
    cf_3,
    nwc,
    capex,
    intercompany_flag,
    chart_of_accounts_source,
    has_chart_of_accounts_mapping,
    account_mapping_method
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.dim_account`
),
gl_transaction_accounts AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    tenant_id,
    COALESCE(account_cd, account_id)              AS account_cd
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_general_ledger`
  WHERE COALESCE(account_cd, account_id) IS NOT NULL
),
gl_balance_accounts AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    tenant_id,
    COALESCE(account_cd, account_id)              AS account_cd
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_general_ledger_balance`
  WHERE COALESCE(account_cd, account_id) IS NOT NULL
)

SELECT
  CONCAT(
    CAST(a.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
    CAST(a.account_cd AS STRING)
  )                                               AS account_key,

  FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
    CAST(a.currency_id AS STRING)
  ))                                              AS currency_key,

  a.tenant_id,
  a.organization_name,
  a.account_cd,
  a.account_cd_numeric,
  a.account_id                                     AS source_account_id,
  a.account_description,
  a.account_class,
  a.account_group_cd,
  a.account_type,
  a.currency_id,
  a.account_mapping_profile,
  a.is_active,
  a.is_cash_account,
  a.allow_manual_entry,
  a.use_default_sub,
  a.use_default_subaccount,
  a.control_account_module,
  a.post_option,
  a.public_code,
  a.public_code_1,
  a.tax_category,
  a.synced_at,
  a.last_modified_at,
  a.bs_pl,
  a.fsli_1,
  a.fsli_2,
  a.fsli_3,
  a.is_ebitda,
  a.is_net_income,
  a.cf_1,
  a.cf_2,
  a.cf_3,
  (UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(a.nwc, ''))) IN ('X', 'TRUE', '1', 'YES'))
                                                  AS is_nwc,
  (UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(a.capex, ''))) IN ('X', 'TRUE', '1', 'YES'))
                                                  AS is_capex,
  a.intercompany_flag,
  a.account_code_1,
  a.account_code_2,
  a.account_code_3,
  a.chart_of_accounts_source,
  a.has_chart_of_accounts_mapping                 AS has_hierarchy,
  a.account_mapping_method,
  FALSE                                           AS has_gl_transactions,
  (bal.account_cd IS NOT NULL)                    AS has_gl_balance,
  CASE
    WHEN bal.account_cd IS NOT NULL THEN 'missing_from_gl_transactions_but_present_in_gl_balance'
    ELSE 'missing_from_gl_transactions_and_gl_balance'
  END                                             AS missing_gl_reason,
  'visma'                                         AS source_system
FROM account_base AS a
LEFT JOIN gl_transaction_accounts AS gl
  ON gl.tenant_id = a.tenant_id
 AND gl.account_cd = a.account_cd
LEFT JOIN gl_balance_accounts AS bal
  ON bal.tenant_id = a.tenant_id
 AND bal.account_cd = a.account_cd
WHERE gl.account_cd IS NULL

tables.query:
WITH supplier_invoice_gap_base AS (
  SELECT
    'supplier_invoice_line'                                 AS source_model,
    tenant_id,
    organization_name,
    supplier_id,
    supplier_name,
    reference_number                                        AS document_reference,
    document_type                                           AS document_type,
    document_date                                           AS document_date,
    line_number                                             AS line_number,
    line_description,
    amount,
    source_gap_reason,
    source_gap_severity,
    missing_inventory_id,
    missing_line_description,
    missing_amount
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.source_gap_supplier_invoice_line`
),

purchase_order_gap_base AS (
  SELECT
    'purchase_order_line'                                   AS source_model,
    tenant_id,
    organization_name,
    supplier_id,
    supplier_name,
    order_nbr                                               AS document_reference,
    order_type                                              AS document_type,
    order_date                                              AS document_date,
    line_nbr                                                AS line_number,
    line_description,
    amount,
    source_gap_reason,
    source_gap_severity,
    missing_inventory_id,
    missing_line_description,
    missing_amount
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.source_gap_purchase_order_line`
),

all_gaps AS (
  SELECT * FROM supplier_invoice_gap_base
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM purchase_order_gap_base
),

aggregated AS (
  SELECT
    source_model,
    tenant_id,
    organization_name,
    supplier_id,
    supplier_name,
    COUNT(*)                                                AS gap_row_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT document_reference)                      AS distinct_document_count,
    MIN(document_date)                                      AS first_gap_date,
    MAX(document_date)                                      AS latest_gap_date,
    SUM(COALESCE(amount, 0))                                AS total_gap_amount_source,
    COUNTIF(source_gap_severity = 'high')                   AS high_severity_gap_count,
    COUNTIF(source_gap_severity = 'medium')                 AS medium_severity_gap_count,
    COUNTIF(source_gap_severity = 'low')                    AS low_severity_gap_count,
    COUNTIF(source_gap_reason = 'missing_inventory_id_unexpected')
                                                            AS unexpected_inventory_gap_count,
    COUNTIF(source_gap_reason IN (
      'missing_inventory_id_expected_non_item_charge',
      'missing_inventory_id_expected_service_or_charge'
    ))                                                      AS expected_charge_or_service_gap_count,
    COUNTIF(source_gap_reason = 'missing_inventory_id_and_description')
                                                            AS inventory_and_description_gap_count,
    COUNTIF(source_gap_reason = 'missing_line_description') AS missing_description_gap_count,
    COUNTIF(source_gap_reason = 'missing_amount')           AS missing_amount_gap_count,
    STRING_AGG(
      DISTINCT CONCAT(document_reference, ':', COALESCE(line_number, '?')),
      ' | '
      ORDER BY CONCAT(document_reference, ':', COALESCE(line_number, '?'))
      LIMIT 8
    )                                                       AS sample_document_lines,
    STRING_AGG(
      DISTINCT COALESCE(line_description, '<missing description>'),
      ' | '
      ORDER BY COALESCE(line_description, '<missing description>')
      LIMIT 8
    )                                                       AS sample_line_descriptions
  FROM all_gaps
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
)

SELECT
  source_model,
  tenant_id,
  organization_name,
  supplier_id,
  supplier_name,
  gap_row_count,
  distinct_document_count,
  first_gap_date,
  latest_gap_date,
  total_gap_amount_source,
  high_severity_gap_count,
  medium_severity_gap_count,
  low_severity_gap_count,
  unexpected_inventory_gap_count,
  expected_charge_or_service_gap_count,
  inventory_and_description_gap_count,
  missing_description_gap_count,
  missing_amount_gap_count,
  CASE
    WHEN high_severity_gap_count > 0 THEN 'critical'
    WHEN unexpected_inventory_gap_count >= 250 THEN 'critical'
    WHEN unexpected_inventory_gap_count >= 100 THEN 'high'
    WHEN total_gap_amount_source >= 100000 THEN 'high'
    WHEN unexpected_inventory_gap_count >= 25 THEN 'medium'
    WHEN gap_row_count >= 50 THEN 'medium'
    ELSE 'low'
  END                                                       AS backlog_priority,
  CASE
    WHEN high_severity_gap_count > 0 THEN 'missing_amount_present'
    WHEN unexpected_inventory_gap_count >= 250 THEN 'large_unexpected_inventory_gap_volume'
    WHEN unexpected_inventory_gap_count >= 100 THEN 'high_unexpected_inventory_gap_volume'
    WHEN total_gap_amount_source >= 100000 THEN 'high_gap_amount'
    WHEN unexpected_inventory_gap_count >= 25 THEN 'moderate_unexpected_inventory_gap_volume'
    WHEN gap_row_count >= 50 THEN 'moderate_total_gap_volume'
    ELSE 'small_gap_backlog'
  END                                                       AS backlog_reason,
  sample_document_lines,
  sample_line_descriptions,
  'visma'                                                   AS source_system
FROM aggregated

actionDescriptor.description: Prioritized source-gap backlog for procurement lines, aggregated per tenant and supplier across supplier invoice lines and purchase order lines.

tables.query:
WITH supplier_invoice_gap_summary AS (
  SELECT
    'supplier_invoice_line'                                 AS source_model,
    tenant_id,
    organization_name,
    source_gap_reason,
    source_gap_severity,
    COUNT(*)                                                AS gap_row_count,
    COUNTIF(missing_inventory_id)                           AS missing_inventory_id_count,
    COUNTIF(missing_line_description)                       AS missing_line_description_count,
    COUNTIF(missing_amount)                                 AS missing_amount_count
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.source_gap_supplier_invoice_line`
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
),

purchase_order_gap_summary AS (
  SELECT
    'purchase_order_line'                                   AS source_model,
    tenant_id,
    organization_name,
    source_gap_reason,
    source_gap_severity,
    COUNT(*)                                                AS gap_row_count,
    COUNTIF(missing_inventory_id)                           AS missing_inventory_id_count,
    COUNTIF(missing_line_description)                       AS missing_line_description_count,
    COUNTIF(missing_amount)                                 AS missing_amount_count
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.source_gap_purchase_order_line`
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
)

SELECT *
FROM supplier_invoice_gap_summary

UNION ALL

SELECT *
FROM purchase_order_gap_summary

actionDescriptor.description: Tenant-level summary of source gaps for procurement lines, aggregated from supplier invoice line and purchase order line source gap tables.

tables.query:
WITH parsed_lines AS (
  SELECT
    h.tenantId                                              AS tenant_id,
    h.organizationName                                      AS organization_name,
    h.orderNbr                                              AS order_nbr,
    h.orderType                                             AS order_type,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(h.date AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(h.date AS TIMESTAMP))
    )                                                       AS order_date,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(h.supplier, '$.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(h.supplier, '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(h.supplier, '$.internalId')
    ) AS STRING)                                            AS supplier_id,
    JSON_VALUE(h.supplier, '$.name')                        AS supplier_name,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineNbr'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineNumber'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.sortOrder')
    )                                                       AS line_nbr,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory'), '$.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$."inventory.id"'),
      JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory'), '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventoryId')
    )                                                       AS inventory_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineDescription'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.description'),
      JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory'), '$.description')
    )                                                       AS line_description,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.amount'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.extCost')
    ) AS NUMERIC)                                           AS amount,
    line                                                    AS source_line_json
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_purchase_orders` AS h
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(h.lines)) AS line
  WHERE h.isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
),

classified AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    (inventory_id IS NULL)                                  AS missing_inventory_id,
    (line_description IS NULL OR TRIM(line_description) = '')
                                                            AS missing_line_description,
    (amount IS NULL)                                        AS missing_amount,
    REGEXP_CONTAINS(
      UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(line_description, ''))),
      r'(FRAKT|FORTOLLING|EMBALLASJE|PALL|GEBYR|AVGIFT|PROGRAMMERING|INTEGRERING|SERVICE|ADMINISTRASJON)'
    )                                                       AS likely_non_item_or_service_line
  FROM parsed_lines
)

SELECT
  tenant_id,
  organization_name,
  order_nbr,
  order_type,
  order_date,
  supplier_id,
  supplier_name,
  line_nbr,
  inventory_id,
  line_description,
  amount,
  missing_inventory_id,
  missing_line_description,
  missing_amount,
  likely_non_item_or_service_line,
  CASE
    WHEN missing_amount THEN 'missing_amount'
    WHEN missing_inventory_id AND missing_line_description THEN 'missing_inventory_id_and_description'
    WHEN missing_inventory_id AND likely_non_item_or_service_line THEN 'missing_inventory_id_expected_service_or_charge'
    WHEN missing_inventory_id THEN 'missing_inventory_id_unexpected'
    WHEN missing_line_description THEN 'missing_line_description'
    ELSE 'ok'
  END                                                       AS source_gap_reason,
  CASE
    WHEN missing_amount THEN 'high'
    WHEN missing_inventory_id AND NOT likely_non_item_or_service_line THEN 'medium'
    ELSE 'low'
  END                                                       AS source_gap_severity,
  (missing_inventory_id OR missing_line_description OR missing_amount)
                                                            AS has_source_gap,
  source_line_json,
  'visma_purchase_orders.lines'                             AS source_table_name,
  'visma'                                                   AS source_system
FROM classified
WHERE missing_inventory_id
   OR missing_line_description
   OR missing_amount

actionDescriptor.description: Source-level data quality gaps for purchase order lines, derived directly from bronze purchase orders. One row per bronze line with a critical missing field for downstream procurement analysis.

tables.query:
WITH parsed_lines AS (
  SELECT
    h.tenantId                                              AS tenant_id,
    h.organizationName                                      AS organization_name,
    h.referenceNumber                                       AS reference_number,
    h.documentType                                          AS document_type,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(h.date AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(h.date AS TIMESTAMP))
    )                                                       AS document_date,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(h.supplier, '$.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(h.supplier, '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(h.supplier, '$.internalId')
    ) AS STRING)                                            AS supplier_id,
    JSON_VALUE(h.supplier, '$.name')                        AS supplier_name,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineNumber'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineNbr'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.sortOrder')
    )                                                       AS line_number,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventoryNumber'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory'), '$.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$."inventory.id"'),
      JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory'), '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventoryId')
    )                                                       AS inventory_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.transactionDescription'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineDescription'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.description'),
      JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory'), '$.description')
    )                                                       AS line_description,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.costInCurrency'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.cost'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.amount'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.extendedPrice'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineTotalBeforeDiscount')
    ) AS NUMERIC)                                           AS amount,
    line                                                    AS source_line_json
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_supplier_invoices` AS h
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(h.invoiceLines)) AS line
  WHERE h.isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
),

classified AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    (inventory_id IS NULL)                                  AS missing_inventory_id,
    (line_description IS NULL OR TRIM(line_description) = '')
                                                            AS missing_line_description,
    (amount IS NULL)                                        AS missing_amount,
    REGEXP_CONTAINS(
      UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(line_description, ''))),
      r'(TOTAL|FRAKT|FORTOLLING|EMBALLASJE|PALL|GEBYR|RENTE|OTP|PENSJON|INNSKUDDSPENSJON|ADMINISTRASJON|FORDELT PR\\.? AVD)'
    )                                                       AS likely_non_item_charge_line
  FROM parsed_lines
)

SELECT
  tenant_id,
  organization_name,
  reference_number,
  document_type,
  document_date,
  supplier_id,
  supplier_name,
  line_number,
  inventory_id,
  line_description,
  amount,
  missing_inventory_id,
  missing_line_description,
  missing_amount,
  likely_non_item_charge_line,
  CASE
    WHEN missing_amount THEN 'missing_amount'
    WHEN missing_inventory_id AND missing_line_description THEN 'missing_inventory_id_and_description'
    WHEN missing_inventory_id AND likely_non_item_charge_line THEN 'missing_inventory_id_expected_non_item_charge'
    WHEN missing_inventory_id THEN 'missing_inventory_id_unexpected'
    WHEN missing_line_description THEN 'missing_line_description'
    ELSE 'ok'
  END                                                       AS source_gap_reason,
  CASE
    WHEN missing_amount THEN 'high'
    WHEN missing_inventory_id AND NOT likely_non_item_charge_line THEN 'medium'
    ELSE 'low'
  END                                                       AS source_gap_severity,
  (missing_inventory_id OR missing_line_description OR missing_amount)
                                                            AS has_source_gap,
  source_line_json,
  'visma_supplier_invoices.invoiceLines'                    AS source_table_name,
  'visma'                                                   AS source_system
FROM classified
WHERE missing_inventory_id
   OR missing_line_description
   OR missing_amount

actionDescriptor.description: Source-level data quality gaps for supplier invoice lines, derived directly from bronze supplier invoices. One row per bronze line with a critical missing field for downstream procurement analysis.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Gold finance dimension: Chart of accounts
-- Source: dw_1_silver_visma.dim_account
-- Grain: one row per tenant + account_cd
-- Why: Account is tenant-scoped in Visma. It is not a business-unit dimension.
-- =============================================================================

WITH account_base AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    synced_at,
    organization_name,
    account_id,
    account_cd,
    account_cd_numeric,
    account_class,
    account_group_cd,
    account_type,
    control_account_module,
    tax_category,
    post_option,
    public_code,
    public_code_1,
    account_description,
    is_active,
    is_cash_account,
    allow_manual_entry,
    use_default_sub,
    use_default_subaccount,
    currency_id,
    account_mapping_profile,
    last_modified_at,
    account_code_1,
    account_code_2,
    account_code_3,
    bs_pl,
    fsli_1,
    fsli_2,
    fsli_3,
    is_ebitda,
    is_net_income,
    cf_1,
    cf_2,
    cf_3,
    nwc,
    capex,
    intercompany_flag,
    chart_of_accounts_source,
    has_chart_of_accounts_mapping,
    account_mapping_method
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.dim_account`
)

SELECT
  CONCAT(
    CAST(a.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
    CAST(a.account_cd AS STRING)
  )                                               AS account_key,

  FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
    CAST(a.currency_id AS STRING)
  ))                                              AS currency_key,

  a.tenant_id,
  a.organization_name,

  -- Local Visma account code used as the conformed reporting account number
  a.account_cd,
  a.account_cd_numeric,

  -- Source system internal id from Visma account master
  a.account_id                                     AS source_account_id,

  a.account_description,
  a.account_class,
  a.account_group_cd,
  a.account_type,
  a.currency_id,
  a.account_mapping_profile,
  a.is_active,
  a.is_cash_account,
  a.allow_manual_entry,
  a.use_default_sub,
  a.use_default_subaccount,
  a.control_account_module,
  a.post_option,
  a.public_code,
  a.public_code_1,
  a.tax_category,
  a.synced_at,
  a.last_modified_at,

  a.bs_pl,
  a.fsli_1,
  a.fsli_2,
  a.fsli_3,
  a.is_ebitda,
  a.is_net_income,
  a.cf_1,
  a.cf_2,
  a.cf_3,
  (UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(a.nwc, ''))) IN ('X', 'TRUE', '1', 'YES'))
                                                  AS is_nwc,
  (UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(a.capex, ''))) IN ('X', 'TRUE', '1', 'YES'))
                                                  AS is_capex,
  a.intercompany_flag,
  a.account_code_1,
  a.account_code_2,
  a.account_code_3,
  a.chart_of_accounts_source,
  a.has_chart_of_accounts_mapping                 AS has_hierarchy,
  a.account_mapping_method,

  'visma' AS source_system

FROM account_base AS a

actionDescriptor.description: Finance account dimension at tenant plus account grain. Includes all accounts from the account master, whether or not they occur in GL transactions, and exposes the enriched hierarchy used for FSLI, P&L, balance-sheet, EBITDA, cash-flow, and working-capital reporting.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- dim_customer.sqlx
-- Gold finance dimension: Customer master data
-- Source: customer master plus fallback customer references from sales/finance
-- Grain: one row per tenant + customer
-- Price class policy:
--   * Only customers observed in Sales Orders are considered active for price class
--   * Direct source of truth is Sales Orders order-location -> customer_locations
--   * Fallback is exact Sales Orders price signature -> customer_sales_prices
--   * Final fallback is safe cross-tenant merge on normalized corporate ID only
--   * Customers with direct order-location conflicts or inferred conflicts stay NULL
-- =============================================================================

WITH master_customers AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.dim_customer`
),

tenant_price_class_codebook AS (
  SELECT
    tenantId                                               AS tenant_id,
    id                                                     AS price_class_id,
    description                                            AS price_class_description
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_price_classes`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenantId, id
    ORDER BY syncedAt DESC
  ) = 1
),

latest_customer_locations AS (
  SELECT
    tenantId                                               AS tenant_id,
    customerId                                             AS customer_id,
    locationId                                             AS location_id,
    priceClassId                                           AS price_class_id
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_customer_locations`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenantId, customerId, locationId
    ORDER BY syncedAt DESC
  ) = 1
),

latest_sales_orders AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_sales_orders_v3`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
    AND customerId IS NOT NULL
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenantId, COALESCE(orderNo, orderId), COALESCE(orderType, type)
    ORDER BY syncedAt DESC
  ) = 1
),

sales_order_customer_activity AS (
  SELECT
    tenantId                                               AS tenant_id,
    customerId                                             AS customer_id,
    COUNT(*)                                               AS sales_order_count,
    MAX(DATE(SAFE_CAST(date AS TIMESTAMP)))                AS last_sales_order_date,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      customerName IGNORE NULLS
      ORDER BY SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) DESC, syncedAt DESC
      LIMIT 1
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]                                      AS sales_order_customer_name,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      organizationName IGNORE NULLS
      ORDER BY SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) DESC, syncedAt DESC
      LIMIT 1
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]                                      AS sales_order_organization_name,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      syncedAt IGNORE NULLS
      ORDER BY SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) DESC, syncedAt DESC
      LIMIT 1
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]                                      AS sales_order_synced_at
  FROM latest_sales_orders
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),

sales_order_customer_order_locations AS (
  SELECT
    tenantId                                               AS tenant_id,
    customerId                                             AS customer_id,
    location                                               AS order_location_id,
    COUNT(*)                                               AS sales_order_count_at_location
  FROM latest_sales_orders
  WHERE location IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
),

direct_sales_order_price_class_summary AS (
  SELECT
    so.tenant_id,
    so.customer_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT loc.price_class_id)                     AS distinct_location_price_class_count,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      DISTINCT loc.price_class_id IGNORE NULLS
      ORDER BY loc.price_class_id
    )                                                      AS location_price_class_ids,
    STRING_AGG(
      DISTINCT CONCAT(so.order_location_id, ':', COALESCE(loc.price_class_id, 'NULL')),
      ' | '
      ORDER BY CONCAT(so.order_location_id, ':', COALESCE(loc.price_class_id, 'NULL'))
      LIMIT 10
    )                                                      AS sample_location_price_classes
  FROM sales_order_customer_order_locations AS so
  LEFT JOIN latest_customer_locations AS loc
    ON loc.tenant_id = so.tenant_id
   AND loc.customer_id = so.customer_id
   AND loc.location_id = so.order_location_id
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),

direct_sales_order_price_class_resolved AS (
  SELECT
    s.*,
    (s.distinct_location_price_class_count = 1)            AS has_single_direct_price_class,
    (s.distinct_location_price_class_count > 1)            AS has_multiple_direct_price_classes,
    s.location_price_class_ids[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]             AS unique_direct_price_class_id,
    codebook.price_class_description                       AS unique_direct_price_class_description
  FROM direct_sales_order_price_class_summary AS s
  LEFT JOIN tenant_price_class_codebook AS codebook
    ON codebook.tenant_id = s.tenant_id
   AND codebook.price_class_id = s.location_price_class_ids[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
),

sales_order_class_prices AS (
  SELECT
    tenantId                                               AS tenant_id,
    priceCode                                              AS price_class_id,
    inventoryId                                            AS inventory_id,
    SAFE_CAST(price AS NUMERIC)                            AS price_amount,
    SAFE_CAST(effectiveDate AS TIMESTAMP)                  AS effective_at,
    SAFE_CAST(expirationDate AS TIMESTAMP)                 AS expires_at
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_customer_sales_prices`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
    AND priceType = 'CustomerPriceClass'
    AND priceCode IS NOT NULL
    AND inventoryId IS NOT NULL
    AND SAFE_CAST(price AS NUMERIC) > 0
    AND COALESCE(breakQty, 0) = 0
    AND COALESCE(promotion, FALSE) = FALSE
),

sales_order_customer_prices AS (
  SELECT
    tenantId                                               AS tenant_id,
    priceCode                                              AS customer_id,
    inventoryId                                            AS inventory_id,
    SAFE_CAST(price AS NUMERIC)                            AS price_amount,
    SAFE_CAST(effectiveDate AS TIMESTAMP)                  AS effective_at,
    SAFE_CAST(expirationDate AS TIMESTAMP)                 AS expires_at
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_customer_sales_prices`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
    AND priceType = 'Customer'
    AND priceCode IS NOT NULL
    AND inventoryId IS NOT NULL
    AND SAFE_CAST(price AS NUMERIC) > 0
    AND COALESCE(breakQty, 0) = 0
    AND COALESCE(promotion, FALSE) = FALSE
),

clean_sales_order_lines AS (
  SELECT
    tenantId                                               AS tenant_id,
    organizationName                                       AS organization_name,
    customerId                                             AS customer_id,
    customerName                                           AS customer_name,
    location                                               AS order_location_id,
    orderNo                                                AS order_no,
    SAFE_CAST(date AS TIMESTAMP)                           AS order_ts,
    JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory.id')                     AS inventory_id,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.unitPrice') AS NUMERIC)  AS unit_price,
    JSON_VALUE(line, '$.description')                      AS line_description
  FROM latest_sales_orders,
  UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(lines, '$')) AS line
  WHERE JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory.id') IS NOT NULL
    AND SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.unitPrice') AS NUMERIC) > 0
    AND COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.hasManualPrice'), 'false') = 'false'
    AND COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.hasManualDiscount'), 'false') = 'false'
    AND COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.discountPercent') AS NUMERIC), 0) = 0
),

inferred_sales_order_price_class_matches AS (
  SELECT
    l.tenant_id,
    l.customer_id,
    l.order_no,
    l.order_location_id,
    l.inventory_id,
    l.unit_price,
    p.price_class_id
  FROM clean_sales_order_lines AS l
  JOIN sales_order_class_prices AS p
    ON p.tenant_id = l.tenant_id
   AND p.inventory_id = l.inventory_id
   AND p.price_amount = l.unit_price
   AND (p.effective_at IS NULL OR p.effective_at <= l.order_ts)
   AND (p.expires_at IS NULL OR l.order_ts <= p.expires_at)
),

inferred_sales_order_price_class_summary AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    customer_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT price_class_id)                         AS inferred_price_class_count,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      DISTINCT price_class_id
      ORDER BY price_class_id
    )                                                      AS inferred_price_class_ids,
    STRING_AGG(
      DISTINCT CONCAT(inventory_id, '@', CAST(unit_price AS STRING)),
      ' | '
      ORDER BY CONCAT(inventory_id, '@', CAST(unit_price AS STRING))
      LIMIT 10
    )                                                      AS inferred_price_class_evidence
  FROM inferred_sales_order_price_class_matches
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),

inferred_sales_order_price_class_resolved AS (
  SELECT
    s.*,
    (s.inferred_price_class_count = 1)                     AS has_single_inferred_price_class,
    (s.inferred_price_class_count > 1)                     AS has_multiple_inferred_price_classes,
    s.inferred_price_class_ids[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]             AS unique_inferred_price_class_id,
    codebook.price_class_description                       AS unique_inferred_price_class_description
  FROM inferred_sales_order_price_class_summary AS s
  LEFT JOIN tenant_price_class_codebook AS codebook
    ON codebook.tenant_id = s.tenant_id
   AND codebook.price_class_id = s.inferred_price_class_ids[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
),

customer_specific_price_hits AS (
  SELECT
    l.tenant_id,
    l.customer_id,
    COUNT(*)                                               AS customer_specific_price_match_count,
    STRING_AGG(
      DISTINCT CONCAT(l.inventory_id, '@', CAST(l.unit_price AS STRING)),
      ' | '
      ORDER BY CONCAT(l.inventory_id, '@', CAST(l.unit_price AS STRING))
      LIMIT 10
    )                                                      AS customer_specific_price_evidence
  FROM clean_sales_order_lines AS l
  JOIN sales_order_customer_prices AS p
    ON p.tenant_id = l.tenant_id
   AND p.customer_id = l.customer_id
   AND p.inventory_id = l.inventory_id
   AND p.price_amount = l.unit_price
   AND (p.effective_at IS NULL OR p.effective_at <= l.order_ts)
   AND (p.expires_at IS NULL OR l.order_ts <= p.expires_at)
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),

customer_invoice_refs AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    customer_id,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      customer_name IGNORE NULLS
      ORDER BY document_date DESC, synced_at DESC
      LIMIT 1
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]                                      AS customer_name,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      organization_name IGNORE NULLS
      ORDER BY document_date DESC, synced_at DESC
      LIMIT 1
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]                                      AS organization_name,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      synced_at IGNORE NULLS
      ORDER BY document_date DESC, synced_at DESC
      LIMIT 1
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]                                      AS synced_at,
    MAX(COALESCE(TIMESTAMP(document_date), synced_at))     AS source_updated_at,
    1                                                      AS source_priority
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_customer_invoice`
  WHERE customer_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),

sales_order_customer_refs AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    customer_id,
    sales_order_customer_name                              AS customer_name,
    sales_order_organization_name                          AS organization_name,
    sales_order_synced_at                                  AS synced_at,
    TIMESTAMP(last_sales_order_date)                       AS source_updated_at,
    2                                                      AS source_priority
  FROM sales_order_customer_activity
),

customer_payment_refs AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    customer_id,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      customer_name IGNORE NULLS
      ORDER BY application_date DESC, synced_at DESC
      LIMIT 1
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]                                      AS customer_name,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      organization_name IGNORE NULLS
      ORDER BY application_date DESC, synced_at DESC
      LIMIT 1
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]                                      AS organization_name,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      synced_at IGNORE NULLS
      ORDER BY application_date DESC, synced_at DESC
      LIMIT 1
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]                                      AS synced_at,
    MAX(COALESCE(TIMESTAMP(application_date), synced_at))  AS source_updated_at,
    3                                                      AS source_priority
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_customer_payment`
  WHERE customer_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),

customer_credit_note_refs AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    customer_id,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      customer_name IGNORE NULLS
      ORDER BY document_date DESC, synced_at DESC
      LIMIT 1
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]                                      AS customer_name,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      organization_name IGNORE NULLS
      ORDER BY document_date DESC, synced_at DESC
      LIMIT 1
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]                                      AS organization_name,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      synced_at IGNORE NULLS
      ORDER BY document_date DESC, synced_at DESC
      LIMIT 1
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]                                      AS synced_at,
    MAX(COALESCE(TIMESTAMP(document_date), synced_at))     AS source_updated_at,
    4                                                      AS source_priority
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_customer_credit_note`
  WHERE customer_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),

fallback_customer_refs AS (
  SELECT * FROM customer_invoice_refs
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM sales_order_customer_refs
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM customer_payment_refs
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM customer_credit_note_refs
),

missing_customer_refs AS (
  SELECT
    r.tenant_id,
    r.customer_id,
    r.organization_name,
    r.synced_at,
    r.customer_name,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY r.tenant_id, r.customer_id
      ORDER BY r.source_priority ASC, r.source_updated_at DESC NULLS LAST
    )                                                      AS customer_rank
  FROM fallback_customer_refs AS r
  LEFT JOIN master_customers AS m
    ON m.tenant_id = r.tenant_id
   AND m.customer_id = r.customer_id
  WHERE r.customer_id IS NOT NULL
    AND m.customer_id IS NULL
),

master_customers_enriched AS (
  SELECT
    m.*,
    COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0)                      AS sales_order_count,
    so.last_sales_order_date,
    COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0                  AS has_sales_orders,
    COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0)
                                                           AS distinct_location_price_class_count,
    COALESCE(direct.has_multiple_direct_price_classes, FALSE)
                                                           AS has_multiple_location_price_classes,
    direct.unique_direct_price_class_id,
    direct.unique_direct_price_class_description,
    direct.sample_location_price_classes,
    COALESCE(inferred.inferred_price_class_count, 0)       AS inferred_price_class_count,
    inferred.unique_inferred_price_class_id,
    inferred.unique_inferred_price_class_description,
    inferred.inferred_price_class_evidence,
    COALESCE(customer_specific.customer_specific_price_match_count, 0)
                                                           AS customer_specific_price_match_count,
    customer_specific.customer_specific_price_evidence
  FROM master_customers AS m
  LEFT JOIN sales_order_customer_activity AS so
    ON so.tenant_id = m.tenant_id
   AND so.customer_id = m.customer_id
  LEFT JOIN direct_sales_order_price_class_resolved AS direct
    ON direct.tenant_id = m.tenant_id
   AND direct.customer_id = m.customer_id
  LEFT JOIN inferred_sales_order_price_class_resolved AS inferred
    ON inferred.tenant_id = m.tenant_id
   AND inferred.customer_id = m.customer_id
  LEFT JOIN customer_specific_price_hits AS customer_specific
    ON customer_specific.tenant_id = m.tenant_id
   AND customer_specific.customer_id = m.customer_id
),

base_dimension AS (
  SELECT
  FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
    CAST(tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
    CAST(customer_id AS STRING)
  ))                                                       AS customer_key,
  tenant_id,
  customer_id,
  customer_internal_id,
  customer_acumatica_id,
  organization_name,
  synced_at,
  customer_name,
  customer_class,
  customer_class_description,
  source_price_class_id,
  source_price_class_description,
  default_location_id,
  default_location_price_class_id,
  default_location_price_class_source,
  customer_class_price_class_lookup_id,
  customer_class_price_class_lookup_description,
  has_sales_orders,
  sales_order_count,
  last_sales_order_date,
  distinct_location_price_class_count,
  has_multiple_location_price_classes,
  inferred_price_class_count,
  customer_specific_price_match_count,
  CASE
    WHEN has_sales_orders AND distinct_location_price_class_count = 1
      THEN unique_direct_price_class_id
    WHEN has_sales_orders
     AND distinct_location_price_class_count = 0
     AND inferred_price_class_count = 1
      THEN unique_inferred_price_class_id
    ELSE NULL
  END                                                      AS sales_order_unique_price_class_id,
  CASE
    WHEN has_sales_orders AND distinct_location_price_class_count = 1
      THEN unique_direct_price_class_description
    WHEN has_sales_orders
     AND distinct_location_price_class_count = 0
     AND inferred_price_class_count = 1
      THEN unique_inferred_price_class_description
    ELSE NULL
  END                                                      AS sales_order_unique_price_class_description,
  sample_location_price_classes,
  inferred_price_class_evidence,
  customer_specific_price_evidence,
  CASE
    WHEN has_sales_orders AND distinct_location_price_class_count = 1
      THEN unique_direct_price_class_id
    WHEN has_sales_orders
     AND distinct_location_price_class_count = 0
     AND inferred_price_class_count = 1
      THEN unique_inferred_price_class_id
    ELSE NULL
  END                                                      AS price_class_id,
  CASE
    WHEN has_sales_orders AND distinct_location_price_class_count = 1
      THEN unique_direct_price_class_description
    WHEN has_sales_orders
     AND distinct_location_price_class_count = 0
     AND inferred_price_class_count = 1
      THEN unique_inferred_price_class_description
    ELSE NULL
  END                                                      AS price_class_description,
  CASE
    WHEN has_sales_orders AND distinct_location_price_class_count = 1
      THEN COALESCE(
        CONCAT(
          unique_direct_price_class_id,
          ' - ',
          unique_direct_price_class_description
        ),
        unique_direct_price_class_description,
        unique_direct_price_class_id
      )
    WHEN has_sales_orders
     AND distinct_location_price_class_count = 0
     AND inferred_price_class_count = 1
      THEN COALESCE(
        CONCAT(
          unique_inferred_price_class_id,
          ' - ',
          unique_inferred_price_class_description
        ),
        unique_inferred_price_class_description,
        unique_inferred_price_class_id
      )
    ELSE NULL
  END                                                      AS price_class,
  CASE
    WHEN has_sales_orders AND distinct_location_price_class_count = 1
      THEN 'sales_order_order_location_price_class'
    WHEN has_sales_orders AND distinct_location_price_class_count > 1
      THEN 'sales_order_multiple_order_location_price_classes_conflict'
    WHEN has_sales_orders
     AND distinct_location_price_class_count = 0
     AND inferred_price_class_count = 1
      THEN 'sales_order_price_signature_inferred'
    WHEN has_sales_orders
     AND distinct_location_price_class_count = 0
     AND inferred_price_class_count > 1
      THEN 'sales_order_price_signature_conflict'
    WHEN has_sales_orders
     AND distinct_location_price_class_count = 0
     AND customer_specific_price_match_count > 0
      THEN 'sales_order_customer_specific_pricing_no_class'
    WHEN has_sales_orders
      THEN 'sales_order_no_price_class_evidence'
    ELSE 'not_in_sales_orders'
  END                                                      AS price_class_mapping_method,
  CASE
    WHEN has_sales_orders AND distinct_location_price_class_count = 1
      THEN 'customer_locations.priceClassId'
    WHEN has_sales_orders
     AND distinct_location_price_class_count = 0
     AND inferred_price_class_count = 1
      THEN 'sales_orders_v3.lines.unitPrice -> customer_sales_prices.priceCode'
    ELSE NULL
  END                                                      AS price_class_mapping_source_field,
  CASE
    WHEN has_sales_orders AND distinct_location_price_class_count = 1
      THEN unique_direct_price_class_id
    WHEN has_sales_orders
     AND distinct_location_price_class_count = 0
     AND inferred_price_class_count = 1
      THEN unique_inferred_price_class_id
    ELSE NULL
  END                                                      AS price_class_mapping_source_code,
  currency_id,
  sales_account_id,
  export_type,
  credit_limit,
  credit_days_past_due,
  credit_terms,
  credit_terms_description,
  corporate_id,
  location_id,
  main_address_line1,
  main_address_line2,
  main_city,
  main_postal_code,
  main_state,
  main_country,
  main_contact_name,
  main_contact_email,
  main_contact_phone,
  consolidate_invoices,
  accept_auto_invoices,
  exclude_debt_collection,
  invoice_to_default_location,
  print_invoices,
  print_statements,
  print_dunning_letters,
  created_at,
  last_modified_at,
  'visma'                                                  AS source_system
  FROM master_customers_enriched

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
  FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
    CAST(r.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
    CAST(r.customer_id AS STRING)
  ))                                                       AS customer_key,
  r.tenant_id,
  r.customer_id,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS customer_internal_id,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS customer_acumatica_id,
  r.organization_name,
  r.synced_at,
  r.customer_name,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS customer_class,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS customer_class_description,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS source_price_class_id,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS source_price_class_description,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS default_location_id,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS default_location_price_class_id,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS default_location_price_class_source,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS customer_class_price_class_lookup_id,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS customer_class_price_class_lookup_description,
  COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0                    AS has_sales_orders,
  COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0)                        AS sales_order_count,
  so.last_sales_order_date,
  COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0)  AS distinct_location_price_class_count,
  COALESCE(direct.has_multiple_direct_price_classes, FALSE)
                                                           AS has_multiple_location_price_classes,
  COALESCE(inferred.inferred_price_class_count, 0)         AS inferred_price_class_count,
  COALESCE(customer_specific.customer_specific_price_match_count, 0)
                                                           AS customer_specific_price_match_count,
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
     AND COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0) = 1
      THEN direct.unique_direct_price_class_id
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
     AND COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0) = 0
     AND COALESCE(inferred.inferred_price_class_count, 0) = 1
      THEN inferred.unique_inferred_price_class_id
    ELSE NULL
  END                                                      AS sales_order_unique_price_class_id,
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
     AND COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0) = 1
      THEN direct.unique_direct_price_class_description
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
     AND COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0) = 0
     AND COALESCE(inferred.inferred_price_class_count, 0) = 1
      THEN inferred.unique_inferred_price_class_description
    ELSE NULL
  END                                                      AS sales_order_unique_price_class_description,
  direct.sample_location_price_classes,
  inferred.inferred_price_class_evidence,
  customer_specific.customer_specific_price_evidence,
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
     AND COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0) = 1
      THEN direct.unique_direct_price_class_id
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
     AND COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0) = 0
     AND COALESCE(inferred.inferred_price_class_count, 0) = 1
      THEN inferred.unique_inferred_price_class_id
    ELSE NULL
  END                                                      AS price_class_id,
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
     AND COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0) = 1
      THEN direct.unique_direct_price_class_description
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
     AND COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0) = 0
     AND COALESCE(inferred.inferred_price_class_count, 0) = 1
      THEN inferred.unique_inferred_price_class_description
    ELSE NULL
  END                                                      AS price_class_description,
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
     AND COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0) = 1
      THEN COALESCE(
        CONCAT(
          direct.unique_direct_price_class_id,
          ' - ',
          direct.unique_direct_price_class_description
        ),
        direct.unique_direct_price_class_description,
        direct.unique_direct_price_class_id
      )
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
     AND COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0) = 0
     AND COALESCE(inferred.inferred_price_class_count, 0) = 1
      THEN COALESCE(
        CONCAT(
          inferred.unique_inferred_price_class_id,
          ' - ',
          inferred.unique_inferred_price_class_description
        ),
        inferred.unique_inferred_price_class_description,
        inferred.unique_inferred_price_class_id
      )
    ELSE NULL
  END                                                      AS price_class,
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
     AND COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0) = 1
      THEN 'sales_order_order_location_price_class'
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
     AND COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0) > 1
      THEN 'sales_order_multiple_order_location_price_classes_conflict'
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
     AND COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0) = 0
     AND COALESCE(inferred.inferred_price_class_count, 0) = 1
      THEN 'sales_order_price_signature_inferred'
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
     AND COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0) = 0
     AND COALESCE(inferred.inferred_price_class_count, 0) > 1
      THEN 'sales_order_price_signature_conflict'
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
     AND COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0) = 0
     AND COALESCE(customer_specific.customer_specific_price_match_count, 0) > 0
      THEN 'sales_order_customer_specific_pricing_no_class'
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
      THEN 'sales_order_no_price_class_evidence'
    ELSE 'not_in_sales_orders'
  END                                                      AS price_class_mapping_method,
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
     AND COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0) = 1
      THEN 'customer_locations.priceClassId'
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
     AND COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0) = 0
     AND COALESCE(inferred.inferred_price_class_count, 0) = 1
      THEN 'sales_orders_v3.lines.unitPrice -> customer_sales_prices.priceCode'
    ELSE NULL
  END                                                      AS price_class_mapping_source_field,
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
     AND COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0) = 1
      THEN direct.unique_direct_price_class_id
    WHEN COALESCE(so.sales_order_count, 0) > 0
     AND COALESCE(direct.distinct_location_price_class_count, 0) = 0
     AND COALESCE(inferred.inferred_price_class_count, 0) = 1
      THEN inferred.unique_inferred_price_class_id
    ELSE NULL
  END                                                      AS price_class_mapping_source_code,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS currency_id,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS sales_account_id,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS export_type,
  CAST(NULL AS FLOAT64)                                    AS credit_limit,
  CAST(NULL AS INT64)                                      AS credit_days_past_due,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS credit_terms,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS credit_terms_description,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS corporate_id,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS location_id,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS main_address_line1,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS main_address_line2,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS main_city,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS main_postal_code,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS main_state,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS main_country,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS main_contact_name,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS main_contact_email,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                     AS main_contact_phone,
  CAST(NULL AS BOOL)                                       AS consolidate_invoices,
  CAST(NULL AS BOOL)                                       AS accept_auto_invoices,
  CAST(NULL AS BOOL)                                       AS exclude_debt_collection,
  CAST(NULL AS BOOL)                                       AS invoice_to_default_location,
  CAST(NULL AS BOOL)                                       AS print_invoices,
  CAST(NULL AS BOOL)                                       AS print_statements,
  CAST(NULL AS BOOL)                                       AS print_dunning_letters,
  CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP)                                  AS created_at,
  CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP)                                  AS last_modified_at,
  'visma'                                                  AS source_system
  FROM missing_customer_refs AS r
  LEFT JOIN sales_order_customer_activity AS so
    ON so.tenant_id = r.tenant_id
   AND so.customer_id = r.customer_id
  LEFT JOIN direct_sales_order_price_class_resolved AS direct
    ON direct.tenant_id = r.tenant_id
   AND direct.customer_id = r.customer_id
  LEFT JOIN inferred_sales_order_price_class_resolved AS inferred
    ON inferred.tenant_id = r.tenant_id
   AND inferred.customer_id = r.customer_id
  LEFT JOIN customer_specific_price_hits AS customer_specific
    ON customer_specific.tenant_id = r.tenant_id
   AND customer_specific.customer_id = r.customer_id
  WHERE r.customer_rank = 1
),

base_dimension_with_corporate_norm AS (
  SELECT
    b.*,
    CASE
      WHEN corporate_id_norm_raw IN (
        '0', '00', '000000000', '0000000000', '999999999', '9999999999',
        'NULL', 'NONE', 'NAN'
      ) THEN NULL
      ELSE corporate_id_norm_raw
    END                                                    AS corporate_id_norm
  FROM (
    SELECT
      b.*,
      CASE
        WHEN b.corporate_id IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE NULLIF(
          UPPER(REGEXP_REPLACE(TRIM(b.corporate_id), r'[^A-Z0-9]', '')),
          ''
        )
      END                                                  AS corporate_id_norm_raw
    FROM base_dimension AS b
  ) AS b
),

safe_corporate_merge_groups AS (
  SELECT
    corporate_id_norm,
    COUNT(DISTINCT tenant_id)                              AS group_tenant_count,
    COUNTIF(price_class_id IS NOT NULL)                    AS supporting_customer_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(price_class_id IS NOT NULL, tenant_id, NULL))
                                                           AS supporting_tenant_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT IF(price_class_id IS NOT NULL, price_class_id, NULL))
                                                           AS distinct_price_class_count,
    ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT price_class_id IGNORE NULLS ORDER BY price_class_id)
                                                           AS supporting_price_class_ids,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      DISTINCT price_class_description IGNORE NULLS
      ORDER BY price_class_description
    )                                                      AS supporting_price_class_descriptions,
    STRING_AGG(
      DISTINCT CONCAT(organization_name, ':', customer_id, ':', customer_name),
      ' | '
      ORDER BY CONCAT(organization_name, ':', customer_id, ':', customer_name)
      LIMIT 10
    )                                                      AS sample_supporting_customers
  FROM base_dimension_with_corporate_norm
  WHERE corporate_id_norm IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
  HAVING group_tenant_count > 1
     AND supporting_customer_count > 0
     AND distinct_price_class_count = 1
),

safe_corporate_merge_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    b.customer_key,
    b.tenant_id,
    b.customer_id,
    b.organization_name,
    g.corporate_id_norm,
    g.group_tenant_count,
    g.supporting_tenant_count,
    g.supporting_customer_count,
    g.supporting_price_class_ids[OFFSET(0)]                AS candidate_price_class_id,
    COALESCE(
      codebook.price_class_description,
      g.supporting_price_class_descriptions[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
    )                                                      AS candidate_price_class_description,
    g.sample_supporting_customers
  FROM base_dimension_with_corporate_norm AS b
  JOIN safe_corporate_merge_groups AS g
    ON g.corporate_id_norm = b.corporate_id_norm
  LEFT JOIN tenant_price_class_codebook AS codebook
    ON codebook.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
   AND codebook.price_class_id = g.supporting_price_class_ids[OFFSET(0)]
  WHERE b.price_class_id IS NULL
    AND codebook.price_class_id IS NOT NULL
)

SELECT
  b.customer_key,
  b.tenant_id,
  b.customer_id,
  b.customer_internal_id,
  b.customer_acumatica_id,
  b.organization_name,
  b.synced_at,
  b.customer_name,
  b.customer_class,
  b.customer_class_description,
  b.source_price_class_id,
  b.source_price_class_description,
  b.default_location_id,
  b.default_location_price_class_id,
  b.default_location_price_class_source,
  b.customer_class_price_class_lookup_id,
  b.customer_class_price_class_lookup_description,
  b.has_sales_orders,
  b.sales_order_count,
  b.last_sales_order_date,
  b.distinct_location_price_class_count,
  b.has_multiple_location_price_classes,
  b.inferred_price_class_count,
  b.customer_specific_price_match_count,
  b.sales_order_unique_price_class_id,
  b.sales_order_unique_price_class_description,
  b.sample_location_price_classes,
  b.inferred_price_class_evidence,
  b.customer_specific_price_evidence,
  COALESCE(b.price_class_id, m.candidate_price_class_id)   AS price_class_id,
  COALESCE(
    b.price_class_description,
    m.candidate_price_class_description
  )                                                        AS price_class_description,
  CASE
    WHEN b.price_class_id IS NOT NULL THEN b.price_class
    WHEN m.candidate_price_class_id IS NOT NULL
      THEN COALESCE(
        CONCAT(
          m.candidate_price_class_id,
          ' - ',
          m.candidate_price_class_description
        ),
        m.candidate_price_class_description,
        m.candidate_price_class_id
      )
    ELSE NULL
  END                                                      AS price_class,
  CASE
    WHEN b.price_class_id IS NOT NULL
      THEN b.price_class_mapping_method
    WHEN m.candidate_price_class_id IS NOT NULL
      THEN 'cross_tenant_corporate_id_safe_merge'
    ELSE b.price_class_mapping_method
  END                                                      AS price_class_mapping_method,
  CASE
    WHEN b.price_class_id IS NOT NULL
      THEN b.price_class_mapping_source_field
    WHEN m.candidate_price_class_id IS NOT NULL
      THEN 'cross_tenant.corporate_id -> unique cross-tenant price_class'
    ELSE b.price_class_mapping_source_field
  END                                                      AS price_class_mapping_source_field,
  CASE
    WHEN b.price_class_id IS NOT NULL
      THEN b.price_class_mapping_source_code
    WHEN m.candidate_price_class_id IS NOT NULL
      THEN m.candidate_price_class_id
    ELSE b.price_class_mapping_source_code
  END                                                      AS price_class_mapping_source_code,
  m.corporate_id_norm                                      AS cross_tenant_merge_corporate_id_norm,
  m.group_tenant_count                                     AS cross_tenant_merge_group_tenant_count,
  m.candidate_price_class_id                               AS cross_tenant_merge_candidate_price_class_id,
  m.candidate_price_class_description                      AS cross_tenant_merge_candidate_price_class_description,
  m.supporting_tenant_count                                AS cross_tenant_merge_supporting_tenant_count,
  m.supporting_customer_count                              AS cross_tenant_merge_supporting_customer_count,
  m.sample_supporting_customers                            AS cross_tenant_merge_sample_customers,
  b.currency_id,
  b.sales_account_id,
  b.export_type,
  b.credit_limit,
  b.credit_days_past_due,
  b.credit_terms,
  b.credit_terms_description,
  b.corporate_id,
  b.location_id,
  b.main_address_line1,
  b.main_address_line2,
  b.main_city,
  b.main_postal_code,
  b.main_state,
  b.main_country,
  b.main_contact_name,
  b.main_contact_email,
  b.main_contact_phone,
  b.consolidate_invoices,
  b.accept_auto_invoices,
  b.exclude_debt_collection,
  b.invoice_to_default_location,
  b.print_invoices,
  b.print_statements,
  b.print_dunning_letters,
  b.created_at,
  b.last_modified_at,
  b.source_system
FROM base_dimension_with_corporate_norm AS b
LEFT JOIN safe_corporate_merge_candidates AS m
  ON m.customer_key = b.customer_key

tables.query:
WITH fact_source AS (
    SELECT
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING))  AS company_key,
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
            CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
            CAST(f.customer_id AS STRING)
        ))                                          AS customer_key,
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.document_date AS STRING))
                                                    AS date_key,
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
            CAST(f.currency_id AS STRING)
        ))                                          AS currency_key,
        CASE
          WHEN f.account_id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(
            CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
            CAST(f.account_id AS STRING)
          )
        END                                         AS account_key,
        f.*
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_customer_credit_note` AS f
),
enriched AS (
    SELECT
        f.*,
        mr.currency_market_rate_daily_key,
        mr.market_currency_rate_key,
        mr.market_rate_date,
        mr.market_exchange_rate_to_nok,
        mr.market_inverse_exchange_rate_from_nok,
        mr.market_rate_source,
        COALESCE(mr.has_market_rate, FALSE) AS has_market_rate_to_nok,
        COALESCE(mr.is_rate_filled_forward, FALSE) AS is_market_rate_filled_forward
    FROM fact_source AS f
    LEFT JOIN `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_currency_market_rate_to_nok_daily` AS mr
        ON mr.date_key = f.date_key
       AND mr.currency_key = f.currency_key
)

SELECT
    company_key,
    customer_key,
    date_key,
    currency_key,
    account_key,
    reference_number,
    document_type,
    document_date,
    document_due_date,
    financial_period,
    post_period,
    status,
    sales_person_id,
    amount,
    amount_in_currency,
    balance,
    balance_in_currency,
    vat_total,
    vat_total_in_currency,
    detail_total,
    detail_total_in_currency,
    discount_total,
    discount_total_in_currency,
    exchange_rate,
    currency_market_rate_daily_key,
    market_currency_rate_key,
    market_rate_date,
    market_exchange_rate_to_nok,
    market_inverse_exchange_rate_from_nok,
    market_rate_source,
    has_market_rate_to_nok,
    is_market_rate_filled_forward,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(amount_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS amount_in_currency_market_nok,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(balance_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS balance_in_currency_market_nok,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(vat_total_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS vat_total_in_currency_market_nok,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(detail_total_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS detail_total_in_currency_market_nok,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(discount_total_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS discount_total_in_currency_market_nok,
    'visma' AS source_system
FROM enriched

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- fact_customer_invoice.sqlx
-- Gold finance fact: Customer invoice headers
-- Source: dw_1_silver_visma.fact_customer_invoice
-- Grain: one row per invoice header
-- =============================================================================

WITH fact_source AS (
    SELECT
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING))  AS company_key,
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.document_date AS STRING))
                                                    AS date_key,
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
            CAST(f.currency_id AS STRING)
        ))                                          AS currency_key,
        f.*
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_customer_invoice` AS f
),
location_strict AS (
    SELECT
        tenant_id,
        business_unit_id,
        location_id,
        ANY_VALUE(location_key) AS location_key
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_location`
    GROUP BY 1,2,3
),
location_fallback AS (
    SELECT
        tenant_id,
        location_id,
        ANY_VALUE(location_tenant_key) AS location_tenant_key
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_location`
    GROUP BY 1,2
),
enriched AS (
    SELECT
        f.*,
        COALESCE(ls.location_key, lf.location_tenant_key) AS resolved_location_key,
        mr.currency_market_rate_daily_key,
        mr.market_currency_rate_key,
        mr.market_rate_date,
        mr.market_exchange_rate_to_nok,
        mr.market_inverse_exchange_rate_from_nok,
        mr.market_rate_source,
        COALESCE(mr.has_market_rate, FALSE) AS has_market_rate_to_nok,
        COALESCE(mr.is_rate_filled_forward, FALSE) AS is_market_rate_filled_forward
    FROM fact_source AS f
    LEFT JOIN location_strict AS ls
        ON f.tenant_id = ls.tenant_id
     AND f.business_unit_id = ls.business_unit_id
     AND f.location_id = ls.location_id
    LEFT JOIN location_fallback AS lf
        ON f.tenant_id = lf.tenant_id
     AND f.location_id = lf.location_id
    LEFT JOIN `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_currency_market_rate_to_nok_daily` AS mr
        ON mr.date_key = f.date_key
       AND mr.currency_key = f.currency_key
)

SELECT
    -- Surrogate FKs (conformed dimensions from gold_common)
    company_key,
    date_key,
    currency_key,

    -- Surrogate FK (finance dimension)
    FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
        CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(f.customer_id AS STRING)
    ))                                              AS customer_key,

    -- Degenerate dimensions
    f.reference_number,
    f.document_type,
    f.document_date,
    f.document_due_date,
    f.financial_period,
    f.post_period,
    f.status,
    f.customer_ref_number,
    f.payment_reference,
    f.external_reference,
    f.sales_person_id,
    resolved_location_key                             AS location_key,
    f.location_id                                   AS location,
    f.project_id                                    AS project,
    f.credit_terms_id                               AS credit_terms,
    f.payment_method_id                             AS payment_method,

    -- Measures
    f.amount,
    f.amount_in_currency,
    f.balance,
    f.balance_in_currency,
    f.vat_total,
    f.vat_total_in_currency,
    f.cash_discount,
    f.cash_discount_in_currency,
    f.discount_total,
    f.discount_total_in_currency,
    f.detail_total,
    f.detail_total_in_currency,
    f.exchange_rate,
    f.rounding_diff,
    currency_market_rate_daily_key,
    market_currency_rate_key,
    market_rate_date,
    market_exchange_rate_to_nok,
    market_inverse_exchange_rate_from_nok,
    market_rate_source,
    has_market_rate_to_nok,
    is_market_rate_filled_forward,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(f.amount_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS amount_in_currency_market_nok,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(f.balance_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS balance_in_currency_market_nok,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(f.vat_total_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS vat_total_in_currency_market_nok,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(f.cash_discount_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS cash_discount_in_currency_market_nok,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(f.discount_total_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS discount_total_in_currency_market_nok,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(f.detail_total_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS detail_total_in_currency_market_nok,

    'visma' AS source_system

FROM enriched AS f

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- fact_customer_invoice_line.sqlx
-- Gold finance fact: Customer invoice lines
-- Source: dw_1_silver_visma.fact_customer_invoice_line
-- Grain: one row per invoice line
-- =============================================================================

WITH line_source AS (
    SELECT
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING))  AS company_key,
        CASE
          WHEN f.account_id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(
            CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
            CAST(f.account_id AS STRING)
          )
        END                                         AS account_key,
        CASE
          WHEN f.inventory_id IS NOT NULL THEN FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
            CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
            CAST(f.inventory_id AS STRING)
          ))
        END                                         AS item_key,
        f.*
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_customer_invoice_line` AS f
),
header_source AS (
    SELECT
        tenant_id,
        business_unit_id,
        reference_number,
        document_type,
        document_date,
        currency_id
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_customer_invoice`
),
enriched AS (
    SELECT
        f.*,
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(h.document_date AS STRING)) AS date_key,
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(h.currency_id AS STRING))   AS currency_key,
        h.document_date,
        h.currency_id,
        mr.currency_market_rate_daily_key,
        mr.market_currency_rate_key,
        mr.market_rate_date,
        mr.market_exchange_rate_to_nok,
        mr.market_inverse_exchange_rate_from_nok,
        mr.market_rate_source,
        COALESCE(mr.has_market_rate, FALSE)           AS has_market_rate_to_nok,
        COALESCE(mr.is_rate_filled_forward, FALSE)    AS is_market_rate_filled_forward
    FROM line_source AS f
    LEFT JOIN header_source AS h
      ON h.tenant_id = f.tenant_id
     AND h.business_unit_id = f.business_unit_id
     AND h.reference_number = f.reference_number
     AND h.document_type = f.document_type
    LEFT JOIN `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_currency_market_rate_to_nok_daily` AS mr
      ON mr.date_key = FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(h.document_date AS STRING))
     AND mr.currency_key = FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(h.currency_id AS STRING))
)

SELECT
    company_key,
    date_key,
    currency_key,
    account_key,
    item_key,
    reference_number,
    document_type,
    document_date,
    currency_id,
    line_number,
    line_description,
    unit_of_measure,
    subaccount_id,
    project_id,
    branch_id,
    sales_person_id,
    quantity,
    unit_price,
    amount_in_currency,
    amount,
    discount,
    discount_amount_in_currency,
    discount_amount,
    currency_market_rate_daily_key,
    market_currency_rate_key,
    market_rate_date,
    market_exchange_rate_to_nok,
    market_inverse_exchange_rate_from_nok,
    market_rate_source,
    has_market_rate_to_nok,
    is_market_rate_filled_forward,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(amount_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS amount_in_currency_market_nok,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(discount_amount_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS discount_amount_in_currency_market_nok,
    'visma' AS source_system
FROM enriched

tables.query:
WITH fact_source AS (
    SELECT
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING))  AS company_key,
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
            CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
            CAST(f.customer_id AS STRING)
        ))                                          AS customer_key,
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.application_date AS STRING))
                                                    AS date_key,
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
            CAST(f.currency_id AS STRING)
        ))                                          AS currency_key,
        f.*
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_customer_payment` AS f
),
enriched AS (
    SELECT
        f.*,
        mr.currency_market_rate_daily_key,
        mr.market_currency_rate_key,
        mr.market_rate_date,
        mr.market_exchange_rate_to_nok,
        mr.market_inverse_exchange_rate_from_nok,
        mr.market_rate_source,
        COALESCE(mr.has_market_rate, FALSE) AS has_market_rate_to_nok,
        COALESCE(mr.is_rate_filled_forward, FALSE) AS is_market_rate_filled_forward
    FROM fact_source AS f
    LEFT JOIN `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_currency_market_rate_to_nok_daily` AS mr
        ON mr.date_key = f.date_key
       AND mr.currency_key = f.currency_key
)

SELECT
    company_key,
    customer_key,
    date_key,
    currency_key,
    ref_nbr,
    payment_type,
    status,
    application_date,
    application_period,
    payment_ref,
    payment_method,
    cash_account,
    branch_id,
    payment_amount,
    payment_amount_in_currency,
    available_balance,
    available_balance_in_currency,
    write_off_amount,
    finance_charges,
    deducted_charges,
    currency_market_rate_daily_key,
    market_currency_rate_key,
    market_rate_date,
    market_exchange_rate_to_nok,
    market_inverse_exchange_rate_from_nok,
    market_rate_source,
    has_market_rate_to_nok,
    is_market_rate_filled_forward,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(payment_amount_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS payment_amount_in_currency_market_nok,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(available_balance_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS available_balance_in_currency_market_nok,
    'visma' AS source_system
FROM enriched

actionDescriptor.description: Customer payment fact with surrogate keys for AR payment analysis.

-- =============================================================================
-- Gold finance fact: Fixed asset transactions
