tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Gold finance fact: General ledger transaction lines
-- Source: dw_1_silver_visma.fact_general_ledger
-- Grain: one row per GL transaction line
-- Key rule: account_key is the readable tenant|account_cd key used in Power BI
-- =============================================================================

WITH fact_source AS (
  SELECT
    FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING))  AS company_key,
    FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.transaction_date AS STRING))
                                                  AS date_key,
    FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
      CAST(f.currency_id AS STRING)
    ))                                            AS currency_key,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(f.account_cd, f.account_id) IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(
        CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(COALESCE(f.account_cd, f.account_id) AS STRING)
      )
    END                                           AS account_key,
    f.*
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_general_ledger` AS f
),
enriched AS (
  SELECT
    f.*,
    CASE
      WHEN f.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL THEN FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
        CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(f.business_unit_id AS STRING)
      ))
    END                                           AS business_unit_key,
    bu.entity_code,
    bu.business_unit_name                         AS dim_business_unit_name,
    bu.group_name,
    mr.currency_market_rate_daily_key,
    mr.market_currency_rate_key,
    mr.market_rate_date,
    mr.market_exchange_rate_to_nok,
    mr.market_inverse_exchange_rate_from_nok,
    mr.market_rate_source,
    COALESCE(mr.has_market_rate, FALSE)           AS has_market_rate_to_nok,
    COALESCE(mr.is_rate_filled_forward, FALSE)    AS is_market_rate_filled_forward,
    -- Tenant's functional currency (Visma `baseCurrency`). Drives the
    -- amount_nok logic downstream — see BI_FinanceTable comments. For
    -- AQ AS / Group / Sense / Consult / Sensilist / Aqua Pharma /
    -- AQ Hygiene / AQ Food Factory this is 'NOK'. For AQ AB it is 'SEK',
    -- for AQ Aps / AQ Food Automation ApS it is 'DKK'.
    COALESCE(co.base_currency, 'NOK')             AS base_currency,
    -- Daily FX rate for the tenant's base currency → NOK. NULL on dates
    -- where the rate is missing; downstream COALESCE-chain handles the
    -- fallback. Equals 1.0 for NOK-functional tenants (self-rate row in
    -- dim_currency_market_rate_to_nok_daily).
    bc_mr.market_exchange_rate_to_nok             AS base_currency_market_rate_to_nok
  FROM fact_source AS f
  LEFT JOIN `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.dim_business_unit` AS bu
    ON  bu.tenant_id        = f.tenant_id
    AND bu.business_unit_id = f.business_unit_id
    AND f.transaction_date >= bu.bu_valid_from
    AND (bu.bu_valid_to IS NULL OR f.transaction_date <= bu.bu_valid_to)
  LEFT JOIN `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_currency_market_rate_to_nok_daily` AS mr
    ON mr.date_key = f.date_key
   AND mr.currency_key = f.currency_key
  LEFT JOIN `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_company` AS co
    ON co.tenant_id = f.tenant_id
  LEFT JOIN `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_currency_market_rate_to_nok_daily` AS bc_mr
    ON bc_mr.calendar_date    = f.transaction_date
   AND bc_mr.from_currency_id = COALESCE(co.base_currency, 'NOK')
   AND bc_mr.to_currency_id   = 'NOK'
)

SELECT
  company_key,
  date_key,
  currency_key,
  account_key,
  tenant_id,
  business_unit_id,
  COALESCE(account_cd, account_id)                AS account_cd,
  account_type,
  currency_id,
  batch_number,
  ref_number,
  module,
  line_number,
  transaction_date,
  financial_period,
  ledger,
  subaccount_id,
  branch_id,
  description,
  project_id,
  department_id,
  department_key,
  debit_amount,
  credit_amount,
  debit_amount_currency,
  credit_amount_currency,
  beginning_balance,
  ending_balance,
  beginning_balance_currency,
  ending_balance_currency,
  currency_market_rate_daily_key,
  market_currency_rate_key,
  market_rate_date,
  market_exchange_rate_to_nok,
  market_inverse_exchange_rate_from_nok,
  market_rate_source,
  has_market_rate_to_nok,
  is_market_rate_filled_forward,
  SAFE_MULTIPLY(debit_amount_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                  AS debit_amount_currency_market_nok,
  SAFE_MULTIPLY(credit_amount_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                  AS credit_amount_currency_market_nok,
  SAFE_MULTIPLY(beginning_balance_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                  AS beginning_balance_currency_market_nok,
  SAFE_MULTIPLY(ending_balance_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                  AS ending_balance_currency_market_nok,
  business_unit_key,
  entity_code,
  COALESCE(dim_business_unit_name, business_unit_name)
                                                  AS business_unit_name,
  group_name,
  -- Functional-currency context. base_currency = the tenant's books
  -- currency from Visma's organization profile (NOK for Norwegian tenants,
  -- SEK for AQ AB, DKK for AQ Aps / AQ Food Automation ApS).
  -- base_currency_market_rate_to_nok is the daily FX rate from
  -- base_currency to NOK. Both fields drive BI_FinanceTable.amount_nok.
  base_currency,
  base_currency_market_rate_to_nok,
  'visma' AS source_system
FROM enriched

actionDescriptor.description: General ledger transaction fact at journal-line grain. Includes company, business unit, account, currency, accounting segments, project where source-backed, and both local-currency and NOK measures for finance reporting.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Gold finance fact: GL period balances
-- Source: dw_1_silver_visma.fact_general_ledger_balance
-- Grain: one row per account/subaccount/branch/ledger/period/currency
-- Key rule: account_key is the readable tenant|account_cd key used in Power BI
-- =============================================================================

WITH balance_base AS (
  SELECT
    f.*,
    SAFE.PARSE_DATE('%Y%m', f.financial_period) AS accounting_period_date
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_general_ledger_balance` AS f
),
fact_source AS (
  SELECT
    FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING))  AS company_key,
    FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
      CAST(f.currency_id AS STRING)
    ))                                            AS currency_key,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(f.account_cd, f.account_id) IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(
        CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(COALESCE(f.account_cd, f.account_id) AS STRING)
      )
    END                                           AS account_key,
    f.*
  FROM balance_base AS f
),
enriched AS (
  SELECT
    f.*,
    bu.business_unit_key,
    bu.entity_code,
    bu.business_unit_name                         AS dim_business_unit_name,
    bu.group_name,
    mr.currency_market_rate_daily_key,
    mr.market_currency_rate_key,
    mr.market_rate_date,
    mr.market_exchange_rate_to_nok,
    mr.market_inverse_exchange_rate_from_nok,
    mr.market_rate_source,
    COALESCE(mr.has_market_rate, FALSE)           AS has_market_rate_to_nok,
    COALESCE(mr.is_rate_filled_forward, FALSE)    AS is_market_rate_filled_forward
  FROM fact_source AS f
  LEFT JOIN `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.dim_business_unit` AS bu
    ON  bu.tenant_id        = f.tenant_id
    AND bu.business_unit_id = f.business_unit_id
    AND f.accounting_period_date >= bu.bu_valid_from
    AND (bu.bu_valid_to IS NULL OR f.accounting_period_date <= bu.bu_valid_to)
  LEFT JOIN `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_currency_market_rate_to_nok_daily` AS mr
    ON mr.currency_key = f.currency_key
   AND mr.calendar_date = f.accounting_period_date
)

SELECT
  company_key,
  currency_key,
  account_key,
  tenant_id,
  business_unit_id,
  COALESCE(account_cd, account_id)                AS account_cd,
  account_type,
  subaccount_id,
  subaccount_cd,
  branch_id,
  ledger,
  currency_id,
  financial_period,
  accounting_period_date,
  balance_type,
  year_closed,
  beginning_balance,
  beginning_balance_currency,
  ptd_debit,
  ptd_debit_currency,
  ptd_credit,
  ptd_credit_currency,
  ytd_balance,
  ytd_balance_currency,
  last_modified_at,
  currency_market_rate_daily_key,
  market_currency_rate_key,
  market_rate_date,
  market_exchange_rate_to_nok,
  market_inverse_exchange_rate_from_nok,
  market_rate_source,
  has_market_rate_to_nok,
  is_market_rate_filled_forward,
  SAFE_MULTIPLY(beginning_balance_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                  AS beginning_balance_currency_market_nok,
  SAFE_MULTIPLY(ptd_debit_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                  AS ptd_debit_currency_market_nok,
  SAFE_MULTIPLY(ptd_credit_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                  AS ptd_credit_currency_market_nok,
  SAFE_MULTIPLY(ytd_balance_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                  AS ytd_balance_currency_market_nok,
  business_unit_key,
  entity_code,
  COALESCE(dim_business_unit_name, business_unit_name)
                                                  AS business_unit_name,
  group_name,
  'visma' AS source_system
FROM enriched

actionDescriptor.description: General ledger balance fact at period and account grain. Includes period balances in local currency and NOK for finance statement and trend reporting.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- fact_inventory_movement.sqlx
-- Gold finance fact: Inventory movement headers (adjustments, issues, receipts, transfers)
-- Source: dw_1_silver_visma.fact_inventory_movement
-- Grain: one row per movement header
-- =============================================================================

SELECT
    -- Surrogate FKs (conformed dimensions from gold_common)
    FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING))   AS company_key,

    FARM_FINGERPRINT(
        CAST(f.date AS STRING)
    )                                               AS date_key,

    CASE
      WHEN f.source_warehouse_id IS NOT NULL THEN FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
        CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(f.business_unit_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(f.source_warehouse_id AS STRING)
      ))
    END                                             AS source_warehouse_key,

    CASE
      WHEN f.destination_warehouse_id IS NOT NULL THEN FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
        CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(f.business_unit_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(f.destination_warehouse_id AS STRING)
      ))
    END                                             AS destination_warehouse_key,

    -- Degenerate dimensions
    f.tenant_id,
    f.business_unit_id,
    f.business_unit_name,
    f.movement_type,
    f.reference_number,
    f.batch_number,
    f.branch_number,
    f.status,
    f.post_period,
    f.description,
    f.control_quantity,
    f.is_hold,
    f.source_warehouse_id,
    f.source_warehouse_name,
    f.destination_warehouse_id,
    f.destination_warehouse_name,
    f.attachments_raw,
    f.metadata_raw,
    f.source_timestamp_raw,

    -- Measures
    f.total_quantity,
    f.total_amount,

    'visma' AS source_system

FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_inventory_movement` AS f

actionDescriptor.description: Inventory movement header fact table with surrogate key FKs, covering adjustments, issues, receipts, and transfers.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- fact_inventory_movement_line.sqlx
-- Gold finance fact: Inventory movement lines
-- Source: dw_1_silver_visma.fact_inventory_movement_line
-- Grain: one row per movement line
-- =============================================================================

WITH fact_source AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_inventory_movement_line`
),
warehouse_strict AS (
    SELECT
        tenant_id,
        business_unit_id,
        warehouse_id,
        ANY_VALUE(warehouse_key) AS warehouse_key
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_warehouse`
    GROUP BY 1,2,3
),
location_strict AS (
    SELECT
        tenant_id,
        business_unit_id,
        location_id,
        ANY_VALUE(location_key) AS location_key
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_location`
    GROUP BY 1,2,3
),
location_fallback AS (
    SELECT
        tenant_id,
        location_id,
        ANY_VALUE(location_tenant_key) AS location_tenant_key
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_location`
    GROUP BY 1,2
)

SELECT
    -- Surrogate FKs (conformed dimensions from gold_common)
    FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING))   AS company_key,

    -- Surrogate FK (finance dimension)
    CASE
      WHEN f.inventory_id IS NOT NULL THEN FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
        CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(f.inventory_id AS STRING)
      ))
    END                                             AS item_key,

    ws.warehouse_key                                AS source_warehouse_key,
    wd.warehouse_key                                AS destination_warehouse_key,

    -- Degenerate dimensions (line-level identifiers and header linkage)
    f.tenant_id,
    f.business_unit_id,
    f.business_unit_name,
    f.movement_type,
    f.reference_number,
    f.line_number,
    f.inventory_id,
    f.inventory_description,
    f.warehouse_id                                  AS warehouse,
    f.destination_warehouse_id                      AS to_warehouse,
    COALESCE(ls.location_key, lf.location_tenant_key) AS location_key,
    f.location_id                                   AS location,
    COALESCE(lts.location_key, ltf.location_tenant_key)
                                                    AS to_location_key,
    f.to_location_id                                AS to_location,
    f.location_name,
    f.to_location_name,
    f.line_description,
    f.unit_of_measure                               AS uom,
    f.lot_serial_number,
    f.allocations_raw,
    f.allocation_count,
    f.reason_code_id,
    f.reason_code_description,

    -- Measures
    f.quantity,
    f.unit_cost,
    f.amount,

    'visma' AS source_system

FROM fact_source AS f
LEFT JOIN warehouse_strict AS ws
    ON f.tenant_id = ws.tenant_id
 AND f.business_unit_id = ws.business_unit_id
 AND f.warehouse_id = ws.warehouse_id
LEFT JOIN warehouse_strict AS wd
    ON f.tenant_id = wd.tenant_id
 AND f.business_unit_id = wd.business_unit_id
 AND f.destination_warehouse_id = wd.warehouse_id
LEFT JOIN location_strict AS ls
    ON f.tenant_id = ls.tenant_id
 AND f.business_unit_id = ls.business_unit_id
 AND f.location_id = ls.location_id
LEFT JOIN location_fallback AS lf
    ON f.tenant_id = lf.tenant_id
 AND f.location_id = lf.location_id
LEFT JOIN location_strict AS lts
    ON f.tenant_id = lts.tenant_id
 AND f.business_unit_id = lts.business_unit_id
 AND f.to_location_id = lts.location_id
LEFT JOIN location_fallback AS ltf
    ON f.tenant_id = ltf.tenant_id
 AND f.to_location_id = ltf.location_id

actionDescriptor.description: Inventory movement line fact table with surrogate key FKs, covering adjustments, issues, receipts, and transfers.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- fact_supplier_invoice.sqlx
-- Gold finance fact: Supplier invoice headers
-- Source: dw_1_silver_visma.fact_supplier_invoice
-- Grain: one row per invoice header
-- =============================================================================

WITH fact_source AS (
    SELECT
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING))  AS company_key,
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.date AS STRING))
                                                    AS date_key,
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
            CAST(f.currency_id AS STRING)
        ))                                          AS currency_key,
        f.*
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_supplier_invoice` AS f
),
location_strict AS (
    SELECT
        tenant_id,
        business_unit_id,
        location_id,
        ANY_VALUE(location_key) AS location_key
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_location`
    GROUP BY 1,2,3
),
location_fallback AS (
    SELECT
        tenant_id,
        location_id,
        ANY_VALUE(location_tenant_key) AS location_tenant_key
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_location`
    GROUP BY 1,2
),
enriched AS (
    SELECT
        f.*,
        COALESCE(ls.location_key, lf.location_tenant_key) AS resolved_location_key,
        mr.currency_market_rate_daily_key,
        mr.market_currency_rate_key,
        mr.market_rate_date,
        mr.market_exchange_rate_to_nok,
        mr.market_inverse_exchange_rate_from_nok,
        mr.market_rate_source,
        COALESCE(mr.has_market_rate, FALSE) AS has_market_rate_to_nok,
        COALESCE(mr.is_rate_filled_forward, FALSE) AS is_market_rate_filled_forward
    FROM fact_source AS f
    LEFT JOIN location_strict AS ls
        ON f.tenant_id = ls.tenant_id
     AND f.business_unit_id = ls.business_unit_id
     AND f.location_id = ls.location_id
    LEFT JOIN location_fallback AS lf
        ON f.tenant_id = lf.tenant_id
     AND f.location_id = lf.location_id
    LEFT JOIN `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_currency_market_rate_to_nok_daily` AS mr
        ON mr.date_key = f.date_key
       AND mr.currency_key = f.currency_key
)

SELECT
    -- Surrogate FKs (conformed dimensions from gold_common)
    company_key,
    date_key,
    currency_key,

    -- Surrogate FK (finance dimension)
    FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
        CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(f.business_unit_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(f.supplier_id AS STRING)
    ))                                              AS supplier_key,

    -- Degenerate dimensions
    f.reference_number,
    f.document_type,
    f.date,
    f.due_date,
    f.financial_period,
    f.post_period,
    f.status,
    f.supplier_reference,
    f.approval_status,
    f.pay_date,
    f.branch_id,
    resolved_location_key                             AS location_key,
    f.location_id                                   AS location,
    f.credit_terms_id                               AS credit_terms,
    f.payment_method_id                             AS payment_method,

    -- Measures
    f.balance,
    f.balance_in_currency,
    f.vat_total,
    f.vat_total_in_currency,
    f.cash_discount,
    f.cash_discount_in_currency,
    f.detail_total,
    f.detail_total_in_currency,
    f.discount_total,
    f.discount_total_in_currency,
    f.exchange_rate,
    f.rounding_diff,
    f.rounding_diff_in_currency,
    currency_market_rate_daily_key,
    market_currency_rate_key,
    market_rate_date,
    market_exchange_rate_to_nok,
    market_inverse_exchange_rate_from_nok,
    market_rate_source,
    has_market_rate_to_nok,
    is_market_rate_filled_forward,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(f.balance_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS balance_in_currency_market_nok,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(f.vat_total_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS vat_total_in_currency_market_nok,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(f.cash_discount_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS cash_discount_in_currency_market_nok,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(f.detail_total_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS detail_total_in_currency_market_nok,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(f.discount_total_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS discount_total_in_currency_market_nok,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(f.rounding_diff_in_currency, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS rounding_diff_in_currency_market_nok,

    'visma' AS source_system

FROM enriched AS f

actionDescriptor.description: Supplier invoice header fact table with surrogate key FKs.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- fact_supplier_invoice_line.sqlx
-- Gold finance fact: Supplier invoice lines
-- Source: dw_1_silver_visma.fact_supplier_invoice_line
-- Grain: one row per invoice line
-- =============================================================================

WITH line_source AS (
    SELECT
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING))  AS company_key,
        CASE
          WHEN f.account_id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(
            CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
            CAST(f.account_id AS STRING)
          )
        END                                         AS account_key,
        CASE
          WHEN f.inventory_id IS NOT NULL THEN FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
            CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
            CAST(f.inventory_id AS STRING)
          ))
        END                                         AS item_key,
        f.*
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_supplier_invoice_line` AS f
),
header_source AS (
    SELECT
        tenant_id,
        business_unit_id,
        reference_number,
        document_type,
        supplier_id,
        date AS document_date,
        currency_id
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_supplier_invoice`
),
enriched AS (
    SELECT
        f.*,
        CASE
          WHEN h.supplier_id IS NOT NULL THEN FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
            CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
            CAST(h.business_unit_id AS STRING), '|',
            CAST(h.supplier_id AS STRING)
          ))
        END                                         AS supplier_key,
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(COALESCE(f.document_date, h.document_date) AS STRING))
                                                    AS date_key,
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(COALESCE(f.currency_id, h.currency_id) AS STRING))
                                                    AS currency_key,
        h.supplier_id AS header_supplier_id,
        h.business_unit_id AS header_business_unit_id,
        COALESCE(f.document_date, h.document_date)  AS resolved_document_date,
        COALESCE(f.currency_id, h.currency_id)      AS resolved_currency_id,
        mr.currency_market_rate_daily_key,
        mr.market_currency_rate_key,
        mr.market_rate_date,
        mr.market_exchange_rate_to_nok,
        mr.market_inverse_exchange_rate_from_nok,
        mr.market_rate_source,
        COALESCE(mr.has_market_rate, FALSE)           AS has_market_rate_to_nok,
        COALESCE(mr.is_rate_filled_forward, FALSE)    AS is_market_rate_filled_forward
    FROM line_source AS f
    LEFT JOIN header_source AS h
      ON h.tenant_id = f.tenant_id
     AND h.reference_number = f.reference_number
     AND h.document_type = f.document_type
    LEFT JOIN `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_currency_market_rate_to_nok_daily` AS mr
      ON mr.date_key = FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(COALESCE(f.document_date, h.document_date) AS STRING))
     AND mr.currency_key = FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(COALESCE(f.currency_id, h.currency_id) AS STRING))
)

SELECT
    company_key,
    date_key,
    currency_key,
    supplier_key,
    account_key,
    item_key,
    tenant_id,
    header_business_unit_id                           AS business_unit_id,
    business_unit_id                                 AS line_business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name                               AS line_business_unit_name,
    COALESCE(header_supplier_id, supplier_id)        AS supplier_id,
    reference_number,
    document_type,
    resolved_document_date                           AS document_date,
    resolved_currency_id                             AS currency_id,
    line_number,
    inventory_id,
    line_description,
    unit_of_measure,
    subaccount_id,
    project_id,
    branch_id,
    quantity,
    unit_cost,
    amount,
    currency_market_rate_daily_key,
    market_currency_rate_key,
    market_rate_date,
    market_exchange_rate_to_nok,
    market_inverse_exchange_rate_from_nok,
    market_rate_source,
    has_market_rate_to_nok,
    is_market_rate_filled_forward,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(amount, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS amount_market_nok,
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(unit_cost, market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                    AS unit_cost_market_nok,
    'visma' AS source_system
FROM enriched

WITH fact_source AS (

                                                    AS date_key,

enriched AS (

)

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Gold sales dimension: Sales order headers
-- Source: dw_1_silver_visma.fact_sales_order
-- Grain: one row per tenant + order_id
-- Key rule: sales_order_key is independent of business_unit_id so mixed-BU
--           headers still join cleanly to line facts.
-- =============================================================================

WITH sales_order_base AS (
  SELECT
    f.*,
    COALESCE(f.business_unit_id, f.representative_business_unit_id)
                                                  AS reporting_business_unit_id,
    COALESCE(f.business_unit_name, f.representative_business_unit_name)
                                                  AS reporting_business_unit_name,
    COALESCE(f.sales_person_id, f.representative_sales_person_id)
                                                  AS reporting_sales_person_id
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_sales_order` AS f
)

SELECT
  FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
    CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
    CAST(f.order_id AS STRING)
  ))                                              AS sales_order_key,

  FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING))   AS company_key,

  FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.order_date AS STRING))  AS date_key,

  FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.currency_id AS STRING)) AS currency_key,

  CASE
    WHEN f.customer_id IS NOT NULL THEN FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
        CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(f.customer_id AS STRING)
      ))
  END                                             AS customer_key,

  CASE
    WHEN f.reporting_business_unit_id IS NOT NULL
      AND f.header_warehouse_id IS NOT NULL THEN FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
        CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(f.reporting_business_unit_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(f.header_warehouse_id AS STRING)
      ))
  END                                             AS warehouse_key,

  CASE
    WHEN f.reporting_sales_person_id IS NOT NULL THEN FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
        CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(f.reporting_sales_person_id AS STRING)
      ))
  END                                             AS sales_person_key,

  f.tenant_id,
  f.business_unit_id,
  f.business_unit_name,
  f.representative_business_unit_id,
  f.representative_business_unit_name,
  f.reporting_business_unit_id,
  f.reporting_business_unit_name,
  f.source_consistent_business_unit_id,
  f.source_consistent_business_unit_name,
  f.effective_consistent_business_unit_id,
  f.effective_consistent_business_unit_name,
  f.line_business_unit_count,
  f.has_multiple_line_business_units,
  f.effective_line_business_unit_count,
  f.has_multiple_effective_line_business_units,
  f.source_material_line_count,
  f.unresolved_source_material_line_count,
  f.effective_material_line_count,
  f.unresolved_effective_material_line_count,
  f.header_business_unit_selection_method,

  f.order_no,
  f.order_id,
  f.order_type,
  f.status,
  f.order_date,
  f.due_date,
  f.request_date,
  f.cancel_by_date,
  f.customer_id,
  f.customer_name,
  f.customer_order,
  f.customer_ref_no,

  f.sales_person_id,
  f.sales_person_name,
  f.representative_sales_person_id,
  f.representative_sales_person_name,
  f.line_sales_person_count,
  f.sales_person_resolution_method,

  f.header_warehouse_id                             AS warehouse_id,
  f.currency_id,
  f.branch_id,
  f.order_description                              AS description,
  f.hold,
  f.order_total,
  f.order_total_base,
  f.order_discount_total                           AS discount_total,
  f.order_discount_total_base                      AS discount_total_base,
  f.order_tax_total                                AS tax_total,
  f.order_tax_total_base                           AS tax_total_base,
  f.order_cost_total                               AS cost_total,
  f.order_cost_total_base                          AS cost_total_base,
  f.header_order_qty                               AS order_qty,
  f.exchange_rate,
  f.last_modified_at,

  'visma' AS source_system

FROM sales_order_base AS f

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Gold sales fact: Sales order lines
-- Source: dw_1_silver_visma.fact_sales_order_line
-- Grain: one row per tenant + order_id + line_nbr
-- Key rule: sales_order_key is tenant + order_id, independent of BU

WITH sales_order_line_base AS (

    f.*,
    COALESCE(f.line_sales_person_id, f.sales_person_id)
                                                  AS resolved_sales_person_id,
    f.line_sales_person_name                      AS resolved_sales_person_name
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_sales_order_line` AS f
),
enriched AS (
  SELECT
    f.*,
    mr.currency_market_rate_daily_key,
    mr.market_currency_rate_key,
    mr.market_rate_date,
    mr.market_exchange_rate_to_nok,
    mr.market_inverse_exchange_rate_from_nok,
    mr.market_rate_source,
    COALESCE(mr.has_market_rate, FALSE)           AS has_market_rate_to_nok,
    COALESCE(mr.is_rate_filled_forward, FALSE)    AS is_market_rate_filled_forward
  FROM sales_order_line_base AS f
  LEFT JOIN `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_currency_market_rate_to_nok_daily` AS mr
    ON mr.date_key = FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.order_date AS STRING))
   AND mr.currency_key = FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.currency_id AS STRING))
)

SELECT
  FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING))  AS company_key,

  FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
    CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
    CAST(f.order_id AS STRING)
  ))                                              AS sales_order_key,

  FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.order_date AS STRING))  AS date_key,

  FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.currency_id AS STRING)) AS currency_key,

  CASE
    WHEN f.customer_id IS NOT NULL THEN FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
      CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
      CAST(f.customer_id AS STRING)
    ))
  END                                             AS customer_key,

  CASE
    WHEN f.inventory_id IS NOT NULL THEN FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
      CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
      CAST(f.inventory_id AS STRING)
    ))
  END                                             AS item_key,

  CASE
    WHEN f.line_warehouse_id IS NOT NULL THEN FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
      CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
      CAST(f.business_unit_id AS STRING), '|',
      CAST(f.line_warehouse_id AS STRING)
    ))
  END                                             AS warehouse_key,

  CASE
    WHEN f.resolved_sales_person_id IS NOT NULL THEN FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
      CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
      CAST(f.resolved_sales_person_id AS STRING)
    ))
  END                                             AS sales_person_key,

  CASE
    WHEN f.account_id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(
      CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
      CAST(f.account_id AS STRING)
    )
  END                                             AS account_key,

  f.tenant_id,

  f.sales_person_id                               AS header_sales_person_id,
  f.line_sales_person_id,
  f.resolved_sales_person_id,
  f.resolved_sales_person_name,
  f.account_id                                     AS source_account_id,
  f.subaccount_id,

  f.subaccount_segment_3,
  f.line_project_id                               AS project_id,
  f.requested_on,
  f.ship_on,
  f.is_completed,
  f.is_free_item,
  f.business_unit_match_rule,
  f.line_business_unit_strategy,
  f.line_is_zero_value,
  f.line_is_material,

  f.line_order_qty                                AS order_qty,
  f.line_open_qty                                 AS open_qty,
  f.line_qty_on_shipments                         AS qty_on_shipments,
  f.unit_price,
  f.unit_price_base,
  f.line_discount_percent                         AS discount_percent,
  f.line_discount_amount                          AS discount_amount,
  f.line_discount_amount_base                     AS discount_amount_base,
  f.line_amount                                   AS amount,
  f.line_amount_base                              AS amount_base,
  f.unit_cost,
  f.unit_cost_base,
  f.average_cost,
  f.discounted_unit_price,
  f.discounted_unit_price_base,
  f.currency_market_rate_daily_key,
  f.market_currency_rate_key,
  f.market_rate_date,
  f.market_exchange_rate_to_nok,
  f.market_inverse_exchange_rate_from_nok,
  f.market_rate_source,
  f.has_market_rate_to_nok,
  f.is_market_rate_filled_forward,
  SAFE_MULTIPLY(f.line_amount, f.market_exchange_rate_to_nok)
                                                  AS amount_market_nok,
  SAFE_MULTIPLY(
    SAFE_MULTIPLY(f.line_order_qty, COALESCE(f.unit_cost, f.average_cost)),
    f.market_exchange_rate_to_nok
  )                                               AS cost_amount_market_nok,

  CASE
    WHEN f.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL THEN FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
      CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
      CAST(f.business_unit_id AS STRING)
    ))
  END                                             AS business_unit_key,
  bu.entity_code,
  bu.business_unit_name,
  bu.group_name,

  'visma' AS source_system

FROM enriched AS f
LEFT JOIN `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.dim_business_unit` AS bu
  ON  bu.tenant_id        = f.tenant_id
  AND bu.business_unit_id = f.business_unit_id
  AND f.order_date >= bu.bu_valid_from
  AND (bu.bu_valid_to IS NULL OR f.order_date <= bu.bu_valid_to)

actionDescriptor.description: Sales order line fact at order-line grain. Includes customer, item, warehouse, salesperson, source business-unit logic, and both local-currency and NOK commercial amounts.

tables.query:
WITH fact_source AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_shipment_line`
),
location_strict AS (
    SELECT
        tenant_id,
        business_unit_id,
        location_id,
        ANY_VALUE(location_key) AS location_key
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_location`
    GROUP BY 1,2,3
),
location_fallback AS (
    SELECT
        tenant_id,
        location_id,
        ANY_VALUE(location_tenant_key) AS location_tenant_key
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_gold_common.dim_location`
    GROUP BY 1,2
)

SELECT
    FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING))  AS company_key,

    FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
        CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(f.business_unit_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(f.shipment_number AS STRING)
    ))                                              AS shipment_key,

    FARM_FINGERPRINT(CAST(f.shipment_date AS STRING)) AS date_key,

    CASE
      WHEN f.inventory_id IS NOT NULL THEN FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
        CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(f.inventory_id AS STRING)
      ))
    END                                             AS item_key,

    FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
        CAST(f.tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(f.business_unit_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(f.warehouse_id AS STRING)
    ))                                              AS warehouse_key,

    f.shipment_number,
    f.shipment_type,
    f.line_nbr,
    f.line_description,
    f.unit_of_measure,
        COALESCE(ls.location_key, lf.location_tenant_key) AS location_key,
    f.location_id,
    f.lot_serial_nbr,
    f.shipped_qty,
    f.ordered_qty,
    'visma' AS source_system

FROM fact_source AS f
LEFT JOIN location_strict AS ls
    ON f.tenant_id = ls.tenant_id
 AND f.business_unit_id = ls.business_unit_id
 AND f.location_id = ls.location_id
LEFT JOIN location_fallback AS lf
    ON f.tenant_id = lf.tenant_id
 AND f.location_id = lf.location_id

-- Grain:
--   one row per source tenant + optional source_segment_2_value + validity window.
--
-- Join rule:
--   facts join on tenant_id + accounting/business date, with exact segment-2 matches
--   preferred over NULL segment defaults.
--
-- Canonical BU IDs:
--   - unaffected tenants keep their own tenant as the BU (`tenant_id|00`)
--   - Aquatiq AS BUs use the parent tenant plus segment 2 (`33f...|01`, `|02`, ...)
--   - historical tenants map into the post-2026 Aquatiq AS canonical BU IDs
--     so reporting can trace BU history across the reorganisation.

SELECT *
FROM UNNEST([
  -- Standalone tenants: BU = tenant/org name
  STRUCT(
    'ab0e5d06-fa25-11ed-a0e0-0693d8a7c3dd' AS tenant_id,
    'Aqua Pharma AS' AS organization_name,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS source_segment_2_value,
    'ab0e5d06-fa25-11ed-a0e0-0693d8a7c3dd|00' AS business_unit_id,
    'Aqua Pharma AS' AS business_unit_name,
    'ab0e5d06-fa25-11ed-a0e0-0693d8a7c3dd' AS reporting_tenant_id,
    'Aqua Pharma AS' AS reporting_organization_name,

tables.query:
WITH bronze_raw AS (
  SELECT
    NULLIF(TRIM(SAFE_CAST(bs_pl AS STRING)), '') AS bs_pl,
    NULLIF(TRIM(SAFE_CAST(fsli_1 AS STRING)), '') AS fsli_1,
    NULLIF(TRIM(SAFE_CAST(fsli_2 AS STRING)), '') AS fsli_2,
    NULLIF(TRIM(SAFE_CAST(fsli_3 AS STRING)), '') AS fsli_3,
    CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(SAFE_CAST(ebitda_flag AS STRING))) IN ('X', 'TRUE', '1', 'YES') THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS ebitda_flag,
    CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(SAFE_CAST(net_income_flag AS STRING))) IN ('X', 'TRUE', '1', 'YES') THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS net_income_flag,
    NULLIF(TRIM(SAFE_CAST(cf1 AS STRING)), '') AS cf1,
    NULLIF(TRIM(SAFE_CAST(cf2 AS STRING)), '') AS cf2,
    NULLIF(TRIM(SAFE_CAST(cf3 AS STRING)), '') AS cf3,
    NULLIF(TRIM(SAFE_CAST(nwc AS STRING)), '') AS nwc,
    NULLIF(TRIM(SAFE_CAST(capex AS STRING)), '') AS capex,
    CASE WHEN UPPER(TRIM(SAFE_CAST(intercompany_flag AS STRING))) IN ('X', 'TRUE', '1', 'YES') THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS intercompany_flag,
    SAFE_CAST(account_code_1 AS INT64) AS account_code_1,
    SAFE_CAST(account_code_2 AS INT64) AS account_code_2,
    SAFE_CAST(account_code_3 AS INT64) AS account_code_3,
    'bronze' AS _source
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_excel.raw_charts_of_accounts`
  WHERE account_code_3 IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(account_code_3) != ''
),

bronze_valid AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM bronze_raw
  WHERE bs_pl IS NOT NULL
),

seed_data AS (
  SELECT
    bs_pl,
    fsli_1,
    fsli_2,
    fsli_3,
    ebitda_flag,
    net_income_flag,
    cf1,
    cf2,
    cf3,
    nwc,
    capex,
    FALSE AS intercompany_flag,
    account_code_1,
    account_code_2,
    account_code_3,
    'seed' AS _source
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.seed_chart_of_accounts`
),

seed_available_codes AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT account_code_3
  FROM seed_data
),

preferred_seed_codes AS (
  SELECT code AS account_code_3
  FROM UNNEST([
    5000,
    5200
  ]) AS code
),

low_quality_bronze_codes AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT account_code_3
  FROM bronze_valid
  WHERE
    fsli_1 IS NULL
    OR fsli_2 IS NULL
    OR fsli_3 IS NULL
    OR REGEXP_CONTAINS(COALESCE(fsli_1, ''), r'^\d+$')
    OR REGEXP_CONTAINS(COALESCE(fsli_2, ''), r'^\d+$')
    OR REGEXP_CONTAINS(COALESCE(fsli_3, ''), r'^\d+$')
),

duplicate_bronze_codes AS (
  SELECT account_code_3
  FROM bronze_valid
  GROUP BY 1
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
),

bronze_unique_codes AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM bronze_valid
  WHERE account_code_3 NOT IN (SELECT account_code_3 FROM duplicate_bronze_codes)
    AND account_code_3 NOT IN (SELECT account_code_3 FROM preferred_seed_codes)
    AND NOT (
      account_code_3 IN (SELECT account_code_3 FROM low_quality_bronze_codes)
      AND account_code_3 IN (SELECT account_code_3 FROM seed_available_codes)
    )
),

bronze_duplicate_fallbacks AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT
      b.*,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY b.account_code_3
        ORDER BY
          CASE WHEN b.fsli_3 IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
          CASE WHEN b.fsli_2 IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
          CASE WHEN b.fsli_1 IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
          LENGTH(COALESCE(b.fsli_3, '')) DESC,
          LENGTH(COALESCE(b.fsli_2, '')) DESC,
          LENGTH(COALESCE(b.fsli_1, '')) DESC
      ) AS duplicate_rank
    FROM bronze_valid AS b
    WHERE b.account_code_3 IN (SELECT account_code_3 FROM duplicate_bronze_codes)
      AND b.account_code_3 NOT IN (SELECT account_code_3 FROM seed_available_codes)
      AND b.account_code_3 NOT IN (SELECT account_code_3 FROM preferred_seed_codes)
  )
  WHERE duplicate_rank = 1
),

resolved_bronze_data AS (
  SELECT * FROM bronze_unique_codes
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    bs_pl,
    fsli_1,
    fsli_2,
    fsli_3,
    ebitda_flag,
    net_income_flag,
    cf1,
    cf2,
    cf3,
    nwc,
    capex,
    intercompany_flag,
    account_code_1,
    account_code_2,
    account_code_3,
    _source
  FROM bronze_duplicate_fallbacks
),

final_seed_data AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM seed_data
  WHERE account_code_3 NOT IN (SELECT account_code_3 FROM resolved_bronze_data)
)

SELECT
  bs_pl,
  fsli_1,
  fsli_2,
  fsli_3,
  ebitda_flag,
  net_income_flag,
  cf1,
  cf2,
  cf3,
  nwc,
  capex,
  intercompany_flag,
  account_code_1,
  account_code_2,
  account_code_3,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS _loaded_at,
  _source
FROM resolved_bronze_data

UNION ALL

SELECT
  bs_pl,
  fsli_1,
  fsli_2,
  fsli_3,
  ebitda_flag,
  net_income_flag,
  cf1,
  cf2,
  cf3,
  nwc,
  capex,
  intercompany_flag,
  account_code_1,
  account_code_2,
  account_code_3,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS _loaded_at,
  _source
FROM final_seed_data

actionDescriptor.description: Cleaned and typed Chart of Accounts. Primary source: reference_data.xlsx via bronze (pre-deduplicated via MERGE). Fallback: seed data for bootstrap.

tables.query:
WITH target_shortlist AS (
  SELECT
    shortlist_rank,
    shortlist_bucket,
    shortlist_reason,
    source_code,
    raw_rows                                          AS code_raw_rows,
    distinct_items                                    AS code_distinct_items,
    sample_items                                      AS code_sample_items,
    customer_class_overlap_customers                  AS code_overlap_customers,
    customer_class_overlap_tenants                    AS code_overlap_tenants,
    review_priority,
    review_signal
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.customer_price_class_review_shortlist`
  WHERE source_code IN ('4', '5')
),

price_usage_by_tenant AS (
  SELECT
    priceCode                                          AS source_code,
    tenantId                                           AS usage_tenant_id,
    organizationName                                   AS usage_organization_name,
    COUNT(*)                                           AS usage_raw_rows,
    COUNT(DISTINCT inventoryId)                        AS usage_distinct_items,
    ARRAY_TO_STRING(
      ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT inventoryId IGNORE NULLS ORDER BY inventoryId LIMIT 15),
      ' | '
    )                                                  AS usage_sample_items
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_customer_sales_prices`
  WHERE priceType = 'CustomerPriceClass'
    AND priceCode IN ('4', '5')
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
),

customer_overlap_examples AS (
  SELECT
    customer_class                                     AS source_code,
    tenant_id,
    organization_name,
    customer_id,
    customer_name
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.dim_customer`
  WHERE customer_class IN ('4', '5')
),

customer_overlap_by_tenant AS (
  SELECT
    source_code,
    tenant_id,
    organization_name,
    COUNT(*)                                           AS tenant_customer_count,
    COUNTIF(
      REGEXP_CONTAINS(LOWER(customer_name), r'(aquatiq|aqua pharma)')
    )                                                  AS tenant_group_affiliate_customer_count,
    COUNTIF(
      NOT REGEXP_CONTAINS(LOWER(customer_name), r'(aquatiq|aqua pharma)')
    )                                                  AS tenant_non_group_customer_count,
    ARRAY_TO_STRING(
      ARRAY_AGG(
        CONCAT(customer_id, ': ', customer_name)
        ORDER BY customer_name, customer_id
        LIMIT 15
      ),
      ' | '
    )                                                  AS tenant_customer_examples,
    ARRAY_TO_STRING(
      ARRAY_AGG(customer_name ORDER BY customer_name, customer_id LIMIT 15),
      ' | '
    )                                                  AS tenant_customer_names
  FROM customer_overlap_examples
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
),

review_pack AS (
  SELECT
    s.shortlist_rank,
    s.shortlist_bucket,
    s.shortlist_reason,
    s.review_priority,
    s.review_signal,
    s.source_code,
    CASE
      WHEN s.source_code = '4'
        THEN 'Mixed overlap sample across group entities and external customers. Validate whether code 4 is a broad commercial segment rather than one customer family.'
      WHEN s.source_code = '5'
        THEN 'Overlap sample is dominated by Aquatiq/Aqua Pharma legal entities. Check whether code 5 represents affiliate or intercompany pricing.'
      ELSE 'Review manually.'
    END                                                AS review_hypothesis,
    s.code_raw_rows,
    s.code_distinct_items,
    s.code_sample_items,
    s.code_overlap_customers,
    s.code_overlap_tenants,
    p.usage_tenant_id,
    p.usage_organization_name,
    p.usage_raw_rows,
    p.usage_distinct_items,
    p.usage_sample_items,
    c.tenant_id                                        AS overlap_tenant_id,
    c.organization_name                                AS overlap_organization_name,
    c.tenant_customer_count,
    c.tenant_group_affiliate_customer_count,
    c.tenant_non_group_customer_count,
    c.tenant_customer_names,
    c.tenant_customer_examples,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (
      PARTITION BY s.source_code
      ORDER BY c.tenant_customer_count DESC, c.organization_name
    )                                                  AS overlap_tenant_rank
  FROM target_shortlist AS s
  LEFT JOIN price_usage_by_tenant AS p
    USING (source_code)
  LEFT JOIN customer_overlap_by_tenant AS c
    USING (source_code)
)

SELECT
  shortlist_rank,
  shortlist_bucket,
  shortlist_reason,
  review_priority,
  review_signal,
  source_code,
  review_hypothesis,
  code_raw_rows,
  code_distinct_items,
  code_sample_items,
  code_overlap_customers,
  code_overlap_tenants,
  usage_tenant_id,
  usage_organization_name,
  usage_raw_rows,
  usage_distinct_items,
  usage_sample_items,
  overlap_tenant_rank,
  overlap_tenant_id,
  overlap_organization_name,
  tenant_customer_count,
  tenant_group_affiliate_customer_count,
  tenant_non_group_customer_count,
  tenant_customer_names,
  tenant_customer_examples
FROM review_pack
ORDER BY shortlist_rank, overlap_tenant_rank, overlap_organization_name

actionDescriptor.description: Tight business-review pack for CustomerPriceClass codes 4 and 5. Combines shortlist ranking, observed price-code usage, customerClass overlap by tenant, and concrete customer examples to support manual approval.

tables.query:
WITH approved_seed_rows AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    organization_name,
    source_field,
    source_code,
    candidate_lookup_name,
    candidate_lookup_source,
    NULLIF(TRIM(validated_price_class_id), '')       AS validated_price_class_id,
    NULLIF(TRIM(validated_price_class_name), '')     AS validated_price_class_name,
    NULLIF(TRIM(validated_customer_group_name), '')  AS validated_customer_group_name,
    COALESCE(include_in_final_mapping, FALSE)        AS include_in_final_mapping,
    LOWER(NULLIF(TRIM(mapping_status), ''))          AS mapping_status,
    NULLIF(TRIM(notes), '')                          AS notes,
    1                                                AS mapping_priority
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.seed_customer_price_class_mapping`
  WHERE COALESCE(include_in_final_mapping, FALSE) = TRUE
    AND LOWER(COALESCE(mapping_status, '')) = 'approved'
    AND NULLIF(TRIM(validated_price_class_id), '') IS NOT NULL
),

global_seed_codebook_rows AS (
  SELECT
    validated_price_class_id,
    validated_price_class_name
  FROM approved_seed_rows
  WHERE source_field = 'customer_sales_prices.CustomerPriceClass'
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),

latest_tenant_price_classes AS (
  SELECT
    tenantId                                          AS tenant_id,
    organizationName                                  AS organization_name,
    id                                                AS price_class_id,
    description                                       AS price_class_description
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_price_classes`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenantId, id
    ORDER BY syncedAt DESC
  ) = 1
),

source_backed_codebook_rows AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    sp.tenantId                                       AS tenant_id,
    pc.organization_name,
    'customer_sales_prices.CustomerPriceClass'        AS source_field,
    sp.priceCode                                      AS source_code,
    pc.price_class_description                        AS candidate_lookup_name,
    'visma_price_classes'                             AS candidate_lookup_source,
    sp.priceCode                                      AS validated_price_class_id,
    pc.price_class_description                        AS validated_price_class_name,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING)                              AS validated_customer_group_name,
    TRUE                                              AS include_in_final_mapping,
    'approved'                                        AS mapping_status,
    'Auto-approved from tenant-scoped visma_price_classes master joined to observed CustomerPriceClass codes.'
                                                      AS notes,
    2                                                 AS mapping_priority
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_customer_sales_prices` AS sp
  JOIN latest_tenant_price_classes AS pc
    ON pc.tenant_id = sp.tenantId
   AND pc.price_class_id = sp.priceCode
  WHERE sp.priceType = 'CustomerPriceClass'
    AND sp.priceCode IS NOT NULL
),

tenant_source_codebook_rows AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    organization_name,
    validated_price_class_id,
    validated_price_class_name,
    candidate_lookup_source,
    mapping_priority
  FROM source_backed_codebook_rows
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenant_id, validated_price_class_id
    ORDER BY mapping_priority, validated_price_class_name
  ) = 1
),

master_customer_refs AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    customer_id,
    organization_name,
    customer_name,
    synced_at                                        AS source_synced_at,
    synced_at                                        AS source_updated_at,
    1                                                AS source_priority
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.dim_customer`
  WHERE customer_id IS NOT NULL
),

sales_order_customer_refs AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    customer_id,
    ARRAY_AGG(customer_name IGNORE NULLS ORDER BY order_date DESC, synced_at DESC LIMIT 1)[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
                                                     AS customer_name,
    ARRAY_AGG(organization_name IGNORE NULLS ORDER BY order_date DESC, synced_at DESC LIMIT 1)[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
                                                     AS organization_name,
    ARRAY_AGG(synced_at IGNORE NULLS ORDER BY order_date DESC, synced_at DESC LIMIT 1)[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
                                                     AS source_synced_at,
    MAX(COALESCE(TIMESTAMP(order_date), synced_at))  AS source_updated_at,
    3                                                AS source_priority
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_sales_order`
  WHERE customer_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),

customer_invoice_refs AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    customer_id,
    ARRAY_AGG(customer_name IGNORE NULLS ORDER BY document_date DESC, synced_at DESC LIMIT 1)[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
                                                     AS customer_name,
    ARRAY_AGG(organization_name IGNORE NULLS ORDER BY document_date DESC, synced_at DESC LIMIT 1)[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
                                                     AS organization_name,
    ARRAY_AGG(synced_at IGNORE NULLS ORDER BY document_date DESC, synced_at DESC LIMIT 1)[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
                                                     AS source_synced_at,
    MAX(COALESCE(TIMESTAMP(document_date), synced_at))
                                                     AS source_updated_at,
    2                                                AS source_priority
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_customer_invoice`
  WHERE customer_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),

customer_payment_refs AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    customer_id,
    ARRAY_AGG(customer_name IGNORE NULLS ORDER BY application_date DESC, synced_at DESC LIMIT 1)[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
                                                     AS customer_name,
    ARRAY_AGG(organization_name IGNORE NULLS ORDER BY application_date DESC, synced_at DESC LIMIT 1)[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
                                                     AS organization_name,
    ARRAY_AGG(synced_at IGNORE NULLS ORDER BY application_date DESC, synced_at DESC LIMIT 1)[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
                                                     AS source_synced_at,
    MAX(COALESCE(TIMESTAMP(application_date), synced_at))
                                                     AS source_updated_at,
    4                                                AS source_priority
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_customer_payment`
  WHERE customer_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),

customer_credit_note_refs AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    customer_id,
    ARRAY_AGG(customer_name IGNORE NULLS ORDER BY document_date DESC, synced_at DESC LIMIT 1)[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
                                                     AS customer_name,
    ARRAY_AGG(organization_name IGNORE NULLS ORDER BY document_date DESC, synced_at DESC LIMIT 1)[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
                                                     AS organization_name,
    ARRAY_AGG(synced_at IGNORE NULLS ORDER BY document_date DESC, synced_at DESC LIMIT 1)[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]
                                                     AS source_synced_at,
    MAX(COALESCE(TIMESTAMP(document_date), synced_at))
                                                     AS source_updated_at,
    5                                                AS source_priority
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_customer_credit_note`
  WHERE customer_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),

customer_mapping_universe AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    customer_id,
    organization_name,
    customer_name
  FROM (
    SELECT * FROM master_customer_refs
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM customer_invoice_refs
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM sales_order_customer_refs
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM customer_payment_refs
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM customer_credit_note_refs
  )
  WHERE customer_id IS NOT NULL
    AND customer_name IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
),

auto_customer_id_matches AS (
  SELECT
    c.tenant_id,
    c.organization_name,
    'customerId'                                     AS source_field,
    c.customer_id                                    AS source_code,
    codebook.validated_price_class_name              AS candidate_lookup_name,
    'derived_from_tenant_price_class_master'         AS candidate_lookup_source,
    codebook.validated_price_class_id                AS validated_price_class_id,
    codebook.validated_price_class_name              AS validated_price_class_name,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING)                             AS validated_customer_group_name,
    TRUE                                             AS include_in_final_mapping,
    'approved'                                       AS mapping_status,
    CONCAT(
      'Auto-derived from tenant-scoped visma_price_classes boundary match on customer_name: ',
      codebook.validated_price_class_name
    )                                                AS notes,
    3                                                AS mapping_priority
  FROM customer_mapping_universe AS c
  JOIN tenant_source_codebook_rows AS codebook
    ON codebook.tenant_id = c.tenant_id
   AND REGEXP_CONTAINS(
     LOWER(c.customer_name),
     CONCAT(
       r'(^|[^a-z0-9])',
       LOWER(codebook.validated_price_class_name),
       r'([^a-z0-9]|$)'
     )
   )
  QUALIFY COUNT(DISTINCT codebook.validated_price_class_id) OVER (
    PARTITION BY c.tenant_id, c.customer_id
  ) = 1
),

fallback_auto_customer_id_matches AS (
  SELECT
    c.tenant_id,
    c.organization_name,
    'customerId'                                     AS source_field,
    c.customer_id                                    AS source_code,
    codebook.validated_price_class_name              AS candidate_lookup_name,
    'derived_from_global_seed_codebook'              AS candidate_lookup_source,
    codebook.validated_price_class_id                AS validated_price_class_id,
    codebook.validated_price_class_name              AS validated_price_class_name,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING)                             AS validated_customer_group_name,
    TRUE                                             AS include_in_final_mapping,
    'approved'                                       AS mapping_status,
    CONCAT(
      'Auto-derived from customer_name boundary match against globally approved seed label: ',
      codebook.validated_price_class_name
    )                                                AS notes,
    4                                                AS mapping_priority
  FROM customer_mapping_universe AS c
  JOIN global_seed_codebook_rows AS codebook
    ON REGEXP_CONTAINS(
      LOWER(c.customer_name),
      CONCAT(
        r'(^|[^a-z0-9])',
        LOWER(codebook.validated_price_class_name),
        r'([^a-z0-9]|$)'
      )
    )
  LEFT JOIN auto_customer_id_matches AS tenant_match
    ON tenant_match.tenant_id = c.tenant_id
   AND tenant_match.source_code = c.customer_id
  WHERE tenant_match.source_code IS NULL
  QUALIFY COUNT(DISTINCT codebook.validated_price_class_id) OVER (
    PARTITION BY c.tenant_id, c.customer_id
  ) = 1
),

combined_mappings AS (
  SELECT * FROM approved_seed_rows
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM source_backed_codebook_rows
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM auto_customer_id_matches
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM fallback_auto_customer_id_matches
)

SELECT
  tenant_id,
  organization_name,
  source_field,
  source_code,
  candidate_lookup_name,
  candidate_lookup_source,
  validated_price_class_id,
  validated_price_class_name,
  validated_customer_group_name,
  include_in_final_mapping,
  mapping_status,
  notes
FROM combined_mappings
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY tenant_id, source_field, source_code
  ORDER BY mapping_priority, organization_name, validated_price_class_name, validated_price_class_id
) = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Validated customer price class mapping cleaned from the manual seed, plus deterministic customer-level mappings derived from approved codebook labels matched against customer names. Tenant-scoped Visma price class masters are used first where available, with manual approved seed labels retained as fallback.

tables.query:
WITH ranked_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    source_code,
    candidate_lookup_name,
    candidate_lookup_source,
    salesrestr_label,
    source_code_has_letters,
    raw_rows,
    distinct_items,
    sample_items,
    matched_customers_by_name,
    matched_tenants_by_name,
    sample_customers_by_name,
    customer_class_overlap_customers,
    customer_class_overlap_tenants,
    customer_class_sample_customers,
    review_priority,
    review_signal,
    CASE
      WHEN review_priority = 'high' THEN 1
      WHEN review_priority = 'medium' THEN 2
      WHEN matched_customers_by_name > 0 THEN 3
      WHEN candidate_lookup_name IS NOT NULL THEN 4
      WHEN source_code_has_letters THEN 5
      WHEN customer_class_overlap_customers > 0 THEN 6
      ELSE 7
    END                                             AS shortlist_bucket,
    CASE
      WHEN review_priority = 'high'
        THEN 'Strong signal. Can likely be approved after a quick business check.'
      WHEN review_priority = 'medium' AND customer_class_overlap_customers > 0
        THEN 'Has customerClassId overlap. Validate whether this class consistently means one business customer family.'
      WHEN matched_customers_by_name > 0
        THEN 'Has customer-name match signal. Review the sample customers and approve if the label is consistent.'
      WHEN candidate_lookup_name IS NOT NULL
        THEN 'Has a candidate label. Confirm that the label truly represents a customer price class.'
      WHEN source_code_has_letters
        THEN 'Readable source code. Check whether the code itself is the intended business label.'
      ELSE 'No clear label signal. High-volume code only; requires manual lookup in Visma or business review.'
    END                                             AS shortlist_reason,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      ORDER BY
        CASE
          WHEN review_priority = 'high' THEN 1
          WHEN review_priority = 'medium' THEN 2
          WHEN matched_customers_by_name > 0 THEN 3
          WHEN candidate_lookup_name IS NOT NULL THEN 4
          WHEN source_code_has_letters THEN 5
          WHEN customer_class_overlap_customers > 0 THEN 6
          ELSE 7
        END,
        customer_class_overlap_customers DESC,
        matched_customers_by_name DESC,
        distinct_items DESC,
        raw_rows DESC,
        SAFE_CAST(source_code AS INT64),
        source_code
    )                                               AS shortlist_rank
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.customer_price_class_unmapped_review`
)

SELECT
  shortlist_rank,
  shortlist_bucket,
  shortlist_reason,
  source_code,
  candidate_lookup_name,
  candidate_lookup_source,
  salesrestr_label,
  source_code_has_letters,
  raw_rows,
  distinct_items,
  sample_items,
  matched_customers_by_name,
  matched_tenants_by_name,
  sample_customers_by_name,
  customer_class_overlap_customers,
  customer_class_overlap_tenants,
  customer_class_sample_customers,
  review_priority,
  review_signal
FROM ranked_candidates
WHERE shortlist_rank <= 20
ORDER BY shortlist_rank

actionDescriptor.description: Ranked shortlist of the best next CustomerPriceClass approval candidates, distilled from the full unmapped review table. Keeps the top reviewable codes first and trims the queue to a smaller manual-review set.

tables.query:
WITH approved_codebook AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    source_code
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.customer_price_class_mapping`
  WHERE source_field = 'customer_sales_prices.CustomerPriceClass'
),

price_class_code_universe AS (
  SELECT
    p.priceCode                                      AS source_code,
    COUNT(*)                                         AS raw_rows,
    COUNT(DISTINCT p.inventoryId)                    AS distinct_items,
    ARRAY_TO_STRING(
      ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT p.inventoryId IGNORE NULLS ORDER BY p.inventoryId LIMIT 10),
      ' | '
    )                                                AS sample_items
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_customer_sales_prices` AS p
  WHERE p.priceType = 'CustomerPriceClass'
    AND p.priceCode IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
),

salesrestr_lookup AS (
  SELECT
    JSON_VALUE(item, '$.valueId')                    AS source_code,
    STRING_AGG(
      DISTINCT JSON_VALUE(item, '$.description'),
      ' | '
      ORDER BY JSON_VALUE(item, '$.description')
    )                                                AS salesrestr_label
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_attributes`,
    UNNEST(JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(details)) AS item
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
    AND attributeID = 'SALESRESTR'
    AND JSON_VALUE(item, '$.valueId') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
),

candidate_labels AS (
  SELECT
    u.source_code,
    s.salesrestr_label,
    COALESCE(
      s.salesrestr_label,
      CASE
        WHEN REGEXP_CONTAINS(u.source_code, r'[A-Za-zÆØÅæøå]')
          THEN CONCAT(
            UPPER(SUBSTR(u.source_code, 1, 1)),
            LOWER(SUBSTR(u.source_code, 2))
          )
        ELSE NULL
      END
    )                                                AS candidate_review_label,
    COALESCE(
      IF(s.salesrestr_label IS NOT NULL, 'visma_attributes.SALESRESTR', NULL),
      CASE
        WHEN REGEXP_CONTAINS(u.source_code, r'[A-Za-zÆØÅæøå]')
          THEN 'customer_sales_prices.priceCode'
        ELSE NULL
      END
    )                                                AS candidate_label_source,
    REGEXP_CONTAINS(u.source_code, r'[A-Za-zÆØÅæøå]')
                                                     AS source_code_has_letters
  FROM price_class_code_universe AS u
  LEFT JOIN salesrestr_lookup AS s
    USING (source_code)
),

name_match_signals AS (
  SELECT
    c.source_code,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(d.tenant_id, '|', d.customer_id))
                                                     AS matched_customers_by_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT d.tenant_id)                      AS matched_tenants_by_name,
    ARRAY_TO_STRING(
      ARRAY_AGG(
        DISTINCT CONCAT(d.organization_name, ': ', d.customer_name)
        ORDER BY CONCAT(d.organization_name, ': ', d.customer_name)
        LIMIT 10
      ),
      ' | '
    )                                                AS sample_customers_by_name
  FROM candidate_labels AS c
  JOIN `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.dim_customer` AS d
    ON c.candidate_review_label IS NOT NULL
   AND REGEXP_CONTAINS(
     TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(LOWER(d.customer_name), r'[^a-z0-9]+', ' ')),
     CONCAT(
       r'(^| )',
       TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(LOWER(c.candidate_review_label), r'[^a-z0-9]+', ' ')),
       r'( |$)'
     )
   )
  GROUP BY 1
),

customer_class_overlap AS (
  SELECT
    c.customerClassId                                AS source_code,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.number)                         AS customer_class_overlap_customers,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.tenantId)                       AS customer_class_overlap_tenants,
    ARRAY_TO_STRING(
      ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT c.name IGNORE NULLS ORDER BY c.name LIMIT 10),
      ' | '
    )                                                AS customer_class_sample_customers
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_customers` AS c
  WHERE c.isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
    AND c.customerClassId IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
)

SELECT
  u.source_code,
  l.candidate_review_label                           AS candidate_lookup_name,
  l.candidate_label_source                           AS candidate_lookup_source,
  l.salesrestr_label,
  l.source_code_has_letters,
  u.raw_rows,
  u.distinct_items,
  u.sample_items,
  COALESCE(n.matched_customers_by_name, 0)          AS matched_customers_by_name,
  COALESCE(n.matched_tenants_by_name, 0)            AS matched_tenants_by_name,
  n.sample_customers_by_name,
  COALESCE(cc.customer_class_overlap_customers, 0)  AS customer_class_overlap_customers,
  COALESCE(cc.customer_class_overlap_tenants, 0)    AS customer_class_overlap_tenants,
  cc.customer_class_sample_customers,
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(n.matched_customers_by_name, 0) >= 20 THEN 'high'
    WHEN COALESCE(n.matched_customers_by_name, 0) > 0 THEN 'medium'
    WHEN l.source_code_has_letters THEN 'medium'
    WHEN COALESCE(cc.customer_class_overlap_customers, 0) > 0 THEN 'medium'
    ELSE 'low'
  END                                               AS review_priority,
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(n.matched_customers_by_name, 0) >= 20 THEN 'safe_name_match_candidate'
    WHEN COALESCE(n.matched_customers_by_name, 0) > 0 THEN 'limited_name_match_candidate'
    WHEN l.source_code_has_letters THEN 'readable_code_candidate'
    WHEN COALESCE(cc.customer_class_overlap_customers, 0) > 0 THEN 'customer_class_overlap_candidate'
    ELSE 'needs_manual_lookup'
  END                                               AS review_signal
FROM price_class_code_universe AS u
LEFT JOIN approved_codebook AS a
  USING (source_code)
LEFT JOIN candidate_labels AS l
  USING (source_code)
LEFT JOIN name_match_signals AS n
  USING (source_code)
LEFT JOIN customer_class_overlap AS cc
  USING (source_code)
WHERE a.source_code IS NULL
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(n.matched_customers_by_name, 0) >= 20 THEN 1
    WHEN COALESCE(n.matched_customers_by_name, 0) > 0 THEN 2
    WHEN l.source_code_has_letters THEN 3
    WHEN COALESCE(cc.customer_class_overlap_customers, 0) > 0 THEN 4
    ELSE 5
  END,
  matched_customers_by_name DESC,
  distinct_items DESC,
  SAFE_CAST(source_code AS INT64),
  source_code

actionDescriptor.description: Focused review table for CustomerPriceClass codes observed in bronze but not yet approved into the codebook. Includes code-level usage, readable-label heuristics, customer-name match signals, and customerClassId overlap to support safer approval decisions.

tables.query:
-- Primary source: Excel data ingested through bronze (pre-deduplicated via MERGE)
WITH 
bronze_data AS (
  SELECT
    SAFE_CAST(r.company_id AS INT64) AS company_id,
    UPPER(TRIM(SAFE_CAST(r.entity_code AS STRING))) AS entity_code,
    SAFE_CAST(r.entity_name AS STRING) AS entity_name,
    SAFE_CAST(r.business_unit_code AS STRING) AS business_unit_code,
    SAFE_CAST(r.business_unit_name AS STRING) AS business_unit_name,
    SAFE_CAST(r.group_name AS STRING) AS group_name,
    COALESCE(m.tenant_id, SAFE_CAST(r.company_id AS STRING)) AS tenant_id,
    CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS entity_valid_to,
    'bronze' AS _source
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_excel.raw_entity_mapping` r
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT company_id, tenant_id
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.seed_entity_mapping`
    WHERE company_id IS NOT NULL
  ) m ON SAFE_CAST(r.company_id AS INT64) = m.company_id
  WHERE r.company_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(r.company_id) != ''
--    AND COALESCE(r.deleted, '0') != '1'
),

-- Fallback: seed data for keys not yet in bronze
seed_rows AS (
  SELECT
    company_id,
    entity_code,
    entity_name,
    business_unit_code,
    business_unit_name,
    group_name,
    tenant_id,
    entity_valid_to,
    'seed' AS _source
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.seed_entity_mapping`
),

bronze_entity_code_keys AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(entity_code, ''))) AS entity_code_key
  FROM bronze_data
),

bronze_entity_name_keys AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(entity_name, ''))) AS entity_name_key
  FROM bronze_data
),

bronze_company_id_keys AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT company_id
  FROM bronze_data
  WHERE company_id IS NOT NULL
),

seed_data AS (
  SELECT s.*
  FROM seed_rows AS s
  LEFT JOIN bronze_entity_code_keys AS bec
    ON UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(s.entity_code, ''))) = bec.entity_code_key
  LEFT JOIN bronze_entity_name_keys AS ben
    ON UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(s.entity_name, ''))) = ben.entity_name_key
  LEFT JOIN bronze_company_id_keys AS bci
    ON s.company_id = bci.company_id
  WHERE bec.entity_code_key IS NULL
    AND ben.entity_name_key IS NULL
    AND bci.company_id IS NULL  -- exclude entire company_id already covered by bronze
)

SELECT
  company_id,
  entity_code,
  entity_name,
  business_unit_code,
  business_unit_name,
  group_name,
  tenant_id,
  entity_valid_to,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS _loaded_at,
  _source
FROM bronze_data

UNION ALL

SELECT
  company_id,
  entity_code,
  entity_name,
  business_unit_code,
  business_unit_name,
  group_name,
  tenant_id,
  entity_valid_to,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS _loaded_at,
  _source
FROM seed_data

actionDescriptor.description: Cleaned and typed entity mapping. Primary source: reference_data.xlsx via bronze (pre-deduplicated via MERGE). Fallback: seed data for bootstrap.

tables.query:
WITH normalized AS (
  SELECT
    mapping_scope,
    local_account_digits,
    range_start_account_code,
    mapped_account_code_3,
    mapped_account_description,
    LEAD(range_start_account_code) OVER (
      PARTITION BY mapping_scope, local_account_digits
      ORDER BY range_start_account_code
    )                                               AS next_range_start_account_code
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.seed_global_account_range_mapping`
)

SELECT
  mapping_scope,
  local_account_digits,
  range_start_account_code,
  CASE
    WHEN next_range_start_account_code IS NULL AND local_account_digits = 4 THEN 9999
    WHEN next_range_start_account_code IS NULL AND local_account_digits = 5 THEN 99999
    WHEN next_range_start_account_code IS NULL THEN range_start_account_code
    ELSE next_range_start_account_code - 1
  END                                               AS range_end_account_code,
  mapped_account_code_3,
  mapped_account_description,
  next_range_start_account_code IS NOT NULL         AS supports_previous_account_fallback
FROM normalized

actionDescriptor.description: Resolved NO/SE/DK breakpoint-based account mapping. Accounts between two breakpoints inherit the previous breakpoint within the same account-length bucket. The final breakpoint remains exact-only.

tables.query:
-- Grain:
--   one row per inventory_id + optional line_type/sales_account_id match.

-- Purpose:
--   canonical line BU always comes from raw Visma subaccount segment 2.
--   this mapping only controls how certain ancillary lines participate in
--   order-header BU resolution and reporting rollups.

SELECT *
FROM UNNEST([
  STRUCT(
    '1A1' AS inventory_id,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS line_type,

    'allocate_to_material_goods_bu' AS line_business_unit_strategy,

actionDescriptor.description: Bootstrap Chart of Accounts seed. Used as fallback until reference_data.xlsx is ingested via bronze.
