actionDescriptor.description: Exact company-scoped account mapping extracted from Group mapping (kun NO, SE, DK).xlsx. Used as the primary account-to-group bridge before generic fallbacks.

tables.query:
WITH manual_approved_codebook_rows AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM UNNEST([
    STRUCT(
      '33f319b9-4d57-11ee-960c-025417856183' AS tenant_id,
      'Aquatiq AS' AS organization_name,
      'customer_sales_prices.CustomerPriceClass' AS source_field,
      '6' AS source_code,
      'Nortura' AS candidate_lookup_name,
      'user_validated' AS candidate_lookup_source,
      '6' AS validated_price_class_id,
      'Nortura' AS validated_price_class_name,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS validated_customer_group_name,
      TRUE AS include_in_final_mapping,
      'approved' AS mapping_status,
      'Approved from user business validation. Confirms price code label and enables deterministic customer-name matching.' AS notes
    ),
    STRUCT(
      '33f319b9-4d57-11ee-960c-025417856183' AS tenant_id,
      'Aquatiq AS' AS organization_name,
      'customer_sales_prices.CustomerPriceClass' AS source_field,
      'BAMA' AS source_code,
      'Bama' AS candidate_lookup_name,
      'customer_sales_prices.priceCode' AS candidate_lookup_source,
      'BAMA' AS validated_price_class_id,
      'Bama' AS validated_price_class_name,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS validated_customer_group_name,
      TRUE AS include_in_final_mapping,
      'approved' AS mapping_status,
      'Approved from bronze CustomerPriceClass code itself. Code is human-readable and matches customer names cleanly with no multi-label overlap.' AS notes
    ),
    STRUCT(
      '33f319b9-4d57-11ee-960c-025417856183',
      'Aquatiq AS',
      'customer_sales_prices.CustomerPriceClass',
      'COOP',
      'Coop',
      'customer_sales_prices.priceCode',
      'COOP',
      'Coop',
      CAST(NULL AS STRING),
      TRUE,
      'approved',
      'Approved from bronze CustomerPriceClass code itself. Code is human-readable and matches customer names cleanly with no multi-label overlap.'
    )
  ])
),

salesrestr_lookup AS (
  SELECT
    JSON_VALUE(item, '$.valueId')                  AS source_code,
    STRING_AGG(
      DISTINCT JSON_VALUE(item, '$.description'),
      ' | '
      ORDER BY JSON_VALUE(item, '$.description')
    )                                              AS candidate_lookup_name,
    'visma_attributes.SALESRESTR'                  AS candidate_lookup_source
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_attributes`,
    UNNEST(JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(details)) AS item
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
    AND attributeID = 'SALESRESTR'
    AND JSON_VALUE(item, '$.valueId') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
),

salesrestr_approved_codebook_rows AS (
  SELECT
    '33f319b9-4d57-11ee-960c-025417856183'         AS tenant_id,
    'Aquatiq AS'                                   AS organization_name,
    'customer_sales_prices.CustomerPriceClass'     AS source_field,
    source_code,
    candidate_lookup_name,
    candidate_lookup_source,
    source_code                                    AS validated_price_class_id,
    candidate_lookup_name                          AS validated_price_class_name,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING)                           AS validated_customer_group_name,
    TRUE                                           AS include_in_final_mapping,
    'approved'                                     AS mapping_status,
    'Approved codebook row from SALESRESTR. Confirms price code label only; customer assignment source is still missing.'
                                                    AS notes
  FROM salesrestr_lookup
),

customer_price_class_code_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    '33f319b9-4d57-11ee-960c-025417856183'         AS tenant_id,
    'Aquatiq AS'                                   AS organization_name,
    'customer_sales_prices.CustomerPriceClass'     AS source_field,
    p.priceCode                                    AS source_code,
    COALESCE(
      s.candidate_lookup_name,
      CASE
        WHEN REGEXP_CONTAINS(p.priceCode, r'[A-Za-zÆØÅæøå]')
          THEN CONCAT(UPPER(SUBSTR(p.priceCode, 1, 1)), LOWER(SUBSTR(p.priceCode, 2)))
        ELSE ''
      END
    )                                              AS candidate_lookup_name,
    COALESCE(
      s.candidate_lookup_source,
      CASE
        WHEN REGEXP_CONTAINS(p.priceCode, r'[A-Za-zÆØÅæøå]')
          THEN 'customer_sales_prices.priceCode'
        ELSE ''
      END
    )                                              AS candidate_lookup_source,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING)                           AS validated_price_class_id,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING)                           AS validated_price_class_name,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING)                           AS validated_customer_group_name,
    FALSE                                          AS include_in_final_mapping,
    'pending_business_review'                      AS mapping_status,
    CONCAT(
      'Observed CustomerPriceClass code in visma_customer_sales_prices. Distinct items=',
      CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT p.inventoryId) AS STRING),
      '. Sample items: ',
      ARRAY_TO_STRING(
        ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT p.inventoryId IGNORE NULLS ORDER BY p.inventoryId LIMIT 5),
        ' | '
      )
    )                                              AS notes
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_customer_sales_prices` AS p
  LEFT JOIN salesrestr_lookup AS s
    ON s.source_code = p.priceCode
  WHERE p.priceType = 'CustomerPriceClass'
    AND p.priceCode IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
),

customer_class_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    c.tenantId                                     AS tenant_id,
    c.organizationName                             AS organization_name,
    'customerClassId'                              AS source_field,
    c.customerClassId                              AS source_code,
    COALESCE(s.candidate_lookup_name, '')          AS candidate_lookup_name,
    COALESCE(s.candidate_lookup_source, '')        AS candidate_lookup_source,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING)                           AS validated_price_class_id,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING)                           AS validated_price_class_name,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING)                           AS validated_customer_group_name,
    FALSE                                          AS include_in_final_mapping,
    'pending_business_review'                      AS mapping_status,
    CONCAT(
      'Auto-generated candidate from visma_customers.customerClassId. Distinct customers=',
      CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT c.number) AS STRING),
      '. Sample customers: ',
      ARRAY_TO_STRING(
        ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT c.name IGNORE NULLS ORDER BY c.name LIMIT 5),
        ' | '
      )
    )                                              AS notes
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_customers` AS c
  LEFT JOIN salesrestr_lookup AS s
    ON s.source_code = c.customerClassId
  WHERE c.isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
    AND c.customerClassId IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
)

SELECT *
FROM manual_approved_codebook_rows

UNION ALL

SELECT *
FROM salesrestr_approved_codebook_rows

UNION ALL

SELECT *
FROM customer_price_class_code_candidates

UNION ALL

SELECT *
FROM customer_class_candidates

actionDescriptor.description: Seed and review table for customer price class mapping. Contains approved code-to-name lookup rows from bronze lookups plus the full observed CustomerPriceClass code universe and auto-generated customerClassId candidate rows for business validation. Only approved rows marked for inclusion should flow downstream.

tables.query:
-- Seed data for entity → business unit mapping.
-- company_id sourced from Visma authoritative company list (IDs 1661–1672).
-- tenant_id = first 8 chars of UUID from visma_subaccounts / dim_company.
-- entity_valid_to = NULL means active; explicit date = ended/merged entity.
--
-- Post-2026 structure (from authoritative Python tenant config):
--   AQUATIQ_AS (tenant 33f319b9) is parent and hosts 5 BUs:
--     01 Chemistry, 02 Hygiene Systems, 03 Consult, 04 Food Technology & Aquaculture, 05 Commercial
--   AQUATIQ_GROUP (tenant 7d2c489e) is group holding with 05 Group Services.
-- Historical entities (ACHEM, CONSULT, AFF, AHS, SENSE) merged into AQUATIQ_AS on 2026-01-01.
-- NOTE: company_id for Aquatiq Group AS is not yet known in Visma (set NULL until assigned).

SELECT * FROM UNNEST([
  -- Aquatiq AS (post-2026 parent) — 5 active BUs absorbed from merged entities
  STRUCT(1661 AS company_id, 'AQUATIQ_AS' AS entity_code, 'Aquatiq AS' AS entity_name, '01' AS business_unit_code, 'Chemistry' AS business_unit_name, 'Aquatiq' AS group_name, '33f319b9' AS tenant_id, CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS entity_valid_to),
  STRUCT(1661, 'AQUATIQ_AS', 'Aquatiq AS', '02', 'Hygiene Systems',                'Aquatiq', '33f319b9', CAST(NULL AS DATE)),
  STRUCT(1661, 'AQUATIQ_AS', 'Aquatiq AS', '03', 'Consult',                        'Aquatiq', '33f319b9', CAST(NULL AS DATE)),
  STRUCT(1661, 'AQUATIQ_AS', 'Aquatiq AS', '04', 'Food Technology & Aquaculture',  'Aquatiq', '33f319b9', CAST(NULL AS DATE)),
  STRUCT(1661, 'AQUATIQ_AS', 'Aquatiq AS', '05', 'Commercial',                     'Aquatiq', '33f319b9', CAST(NULL AS DATE)),

  -- Aquatiq Group AS — group holding (Group Services)
  STRUCT(CAST(NULL AS INT64), 'AQUATIQ_GROUP', 'Aquatiq Group AS', '05', 'Group Services', 'Aquatiq', '7d2c489e', CAST(NULL AS DATE)),

  -- Historical entities (merged/reorganised into Aquatiq AS per 2026 restructuring)
  STRUCT(1665, 'ACHEM',   'Aquatiq Chemistry AS',       '01', 'Chemistry',                        'Aquatiq', 'd6dc7fbc', DATE '2025-12-31'),
  STRUCT(1666, 'CONSULT', 'Aquatiq Consult AS',          '03', 'Consult',                         'Aquatiq', '9b1fa69b', DATE '2025-12-31'),
  STRUCT(1668, 'AFF',     'Aquatiq Food Factory AS',     '02', 'Hygiene Systems',                 'Aquatiq', 'f630d6b0', DATE '2025-12-31'),
  STRUCT(1669, 'AHS',     'Aquatiq Hygiene Systems AS',  '02', 'Hygiene Systems',                 'Aquatiq', '61320c0a', DATE '2025-12-31'),
  STRUCT(1670, 'SENSE',   'Aquatiq Sense AS',            '04', 'Food Technology & Aquaculture',   'Aquatiq', 'bb6c024e', DATE '2025-12-31'),

  -- Active entities (post-2026 structure, standalone legal entities)
  STRUCT(1662, 'APHARMA',       'Aqua Pharma AS',              '01', 'Chemistry',                       'Aquatiq', 'ab0e5d06', CAST(NULL AS DATE)),
  STRUCT(1663, 'APHARMA_GROUP', 'Aqua Pharma Group AS',        '01', 'Chemistry',                       'Aquatiq', 'ffa4a061', CAST(NULL AS DATE)),
  STRUCT(1664, 'AQUATIQ_APS',   'Aquatiq Aps',                 '02', 'Hygiene Systems',                 'Aquatiq', 'd1507c4a', CAST(NULL AS DATE)),
  STRUCT(1667, 'FOODAUTO',      'Aquatiq Food Automation ApS', '02', 'Hygiene Systems',                 'Aquatiq', 'bed46bb6', CAST(NULL AS DATE)),
  STRUCT(1671, 'SENSILIST',     'Sensilist AS',                '04', 'Food Technology & Aquaculture',   'Aquatiq', 'eda0dd16', CAST(NULL AS DATE)),
  STRUCT(1672, 'AQUATIQ_AB',    'Aquatiq AB',                  '02', 'Hygiene Systems',                 'Aquatiq', '2b6e5cd6', CAST(NULL AS DATE))
])

actionDescriptor.description: NO/SE/DK breakpoint mapping extracted from Group mapping (kun NO, SE, DK pr 2304).xlsx. Accounts between two breakpoints inherit the previous breakpoint mapping.

tables.query:
-- Maintain one row per user principal name + tenant + salesperson.
-- Use this only for overrides or shared-access cases that are not covered by the
-- salesperson directory email mapping.
-- Example:
-- STRUCT('user@aquatiq.com', '33f319b9-4d57-11ee-960c-025417856183', '159', 'sales_person', TRUE, 'Example row')

SELECT *
FROM UNNEST(
  ARRAY<STRUCT<
    user_principal_name STRING,
    tenant_id STRING,
    sales_person_id STRING,
    access_scope STRING,
    is_active BOOL,
    notes STRING
  >>[]
)

actionDescriptor.description: Manual override mapping between Power BI user principal names and Visma salespersons for salesperson row-level security. Applied on top of auto email-based salesperson mapping.

actionDescriptor.description: Salesperson directory seed extracted from Selgere 20260420.xlsx. Uses the first Selgernr. as the canonical salesperson id because it matches the Visma sales person API.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- dim_account.sqlx
-- Silver dimension: GL chart of accounts
-- Source master: dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_accounts
-- Primary mapping: exact company-scoped workbook mapping from Group mapping workbook
-- Secondary mapping: NO/SE/DK breakpoint fallback, then chart-of-accounts exact/family fallback
-- Grain: one row per tenant_id + account_cd (latest non-deleted record)
-- =============================================================================

WITH visma_accounts AS (
  SELECT
      tenantId                                            AS tenant_id,
      syncedAt                                            AS synced_at,
      organizationName                                    AS organization_name,

      -- Natural keys
      CAST(accountID AS STRING)                           AS account_id,
      CAST(accountID AS STRING)                           AS account_internal_id,
      CAST(accountCD AS STRING)                           AS account_cd,
      SAFE_CAST(accountCD AS INT64)                       AS account_cd_numeric,

      -- Classification
      accountClass                                        AS account_class,
      accountGroupCD                                      AS account_group_cd,
      type                                                AS account_type,
      controlAccountModule                                AS control_account_module,
      taxCategory                                         AS tax_category,
      postOption                                          AS post_option,
      publicCode1                                         AS public_code,
      publicCode1                                         AS public_code_1,

      -- Attributes
      description                                         AS account_description,
      active                                              AS is_active,
      cashAccount                                         AS is_cash_account,
      allowManualEntry                                    AS allow_manual_entry,
      useDefaultSub                                       AS use_default_sub,
      useDefaultSub                                       AS use_default_subaccount,

      -- Currency
      currency                                            AS currency_id,

      SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)        AS last_modified_at
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_accounts`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY tenantId, accountCD
      ORDER BY syncedAt DESC, SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) DESC
  ) = 1
),

global_account_mapping_scopes AS (
  SELECT
    mapping_scope,
    organization_name,
    country_code
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.seed_global_account_mapping_scope`
),

tenant_account_mapping_profiles AS (
  SELECT
    v.tenant_id,
    ANY_VALUE(v.organization_name)                             AS organization_name,
    CASE
      WHEN COUNTIF(s.organization_name IS NOT NULL) > 0
        THEN 'global_no_se_dk_chart'
      WHEN SAFE_DIVIDE(COUNTIF(LENGTH(v.account_cd) = 5), COUNT(*)) >= 0.5
        THEN 'local_five_digit_chart'
      ELSE 'group_excel_chart'
    END                                                     AS account_mapping_profile
  FROM visma_accounts AS v
  LEFT JOIN global_account_mapping_scopes AS s
    ON s.mapping_scope = 'NO_SE_DK'
   AND s.organization_name = v.organization_name
  GROUP BY v.tenant_id
),

company_account_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    organization_name,
    local_account_code,
    mapped_account_code_3
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.seed_company_account_mapping`
),

chart_of_accounts AS (
  SELECT
    account_code_1,
    account_code_2,
    account_code_3,
    bs_pl,
    fsli_1,
    fsli_2,
    fsli_3,
    ebitda_flag,
    net_income_flag,
    cf1,
    cf2,
    cf3,
    nwc,
    capex,
    intercompany_flag,
    _source                                             AS chart_of_accounts_source
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.chart_of_accounts`
),

global_account_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    mapping_scope,
    local_account_digits,
    range_start_account_code,
    range_end_account_code,
    mapped_account_code_3,
    mapped_account_description
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.global_account_mapping`
),

safe_account_family_root_codes AS (
  SELECT code AS account_code_2
  FROM UNNEST([
    1400,
    1500,
    1600,
    1900,
    2400,
    2450,
    2500,
    2600,
    2800,
    2900,
    3000,
    3100,
    4000,
    4100,
    4200,
    4300,
    4400,
    4700,
    4900,
    5000,
    5100,
    5200,
    5400,
    6000,
    6100,
    6200,
    6300,
    6400,
    6500,
    6600,
    6700,
    6800,
    6900,
    7000,
    7100,
    7700,
    8000,
    8100,
    2700
  ]) AS code
),

chart_of_accounts_family_roots AS (
  SELECT
    account_code_1,
    account_code_2,
    account_code_3,
    bs_pl,
    fsli_1,
    fsli_2,
    fsli_3,
    ebitda_flag,
    net_income_flag,
    cf1,
    cf2,
    cf3,
    nwc,
    capex,
    intercompany_flag,
    chart_of_accounts_source
  FROM chart_of_accounts
  WHERE account_code_3 = account_code_2
    AND account_code_2 IN (SELECT account_code_2 FROM safe_account_family_root_codes)
)

SELECT
    v.tenant_id,
    v.synced_at,
    v.organization_name,

    v.account_id,
    v.account_internal_id,
    v.account_cd,
    v.account_cd_numeric,

    v.account_class,
    v.account_group_cd,
    v.account_type,
    v.control_account_module,
    v.tax_category,
    v.post_option,
    v.public_code,
    v.public_code_1,

    v.account_description,
    v.is_active,
    v.is_cash_account,
    v.allow_manual_entry,
    v.use_default_sub,
    v.use_default_subaccount,
    v.currency_id,
    v.last_modified_at,

    p.account_mapping_profile,

    COALESCE(em.account_code_1, gm.account_code_1, c.account_code_1, r.account_code_1)
                                                        AS account_code_1,
    COALESCE(em.account_code_2, gm.account_code_2, c.account_code_2, r.account_code_2)
                                                        AS account_code_2,
    COALESCE(em.account_code_3, gm.account_code_3, c.account_code_3, r.account_code_3)
                                                        AS account_code_3,
    COALESCE(
      em.bs_pl,
      gm.bs_pl,
      c.bs_pl,
      r.bs_pl,
      CASE
        WHEN v.account_type IN ('Asset', 'Liability') THEN 'BS'
        WHEN v.account_type IN ('Income', 'Expense') THEN 'P&L'
      END
    )                                                  AS bs_pl,
    COALESCE(
      em.fsli_1,
      gm.fsli_1,
      c.fsli_1,
      r.fsli_1,
      CASE
        WHEN v.account_type = 'Asset' THEN 'Assets'
        WHEN v.account_type = 'Liability' THEN 'Equity and liabilities'
        WHEN v.account_type = 'Income' THEN 'Revenue'
        WHEN v.account_type = 'Expense' THEN 'Operating expenses'
      END
    )                                                  AS fsli_1,
    COALESCE(em.fsli_2, gm.fsli_2, c.fsli_2, r.fsli_2) AS fsli_2,
    CASE
      WHEN em.account_code_3 IS NOT NULL THEN em.fsli_3
      WHEN gm.account_code_3 IS NOT NULL THEN gm.fsli_3
      WHEN c.account_code_3 IS NOT NULL THEN c.fsli_3
      WHEN r.account_code_3 IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(r.fsli_2, r.fsli_1, r.fsli_3)
      ELSE NULL
    END                                                 AS fsli_3,
    COALESCE(em.ebitda_flag, gm.ebitda_flag, c.ebitda_flag, r.ebitda_flag)
                                                        AS is_ebitda,
    COALESCE(em.net_income_flag, gm.net_income_flag, c.net_income_flag, r.net_income_flag)
                                                        AS is_net_income,
    COALESCE(em.cf1, gm.cf1, c.cf1, r.cf1)             AS cf_1,
    COALESCE(em.cf2, gm.cf2, c.cf2, r.cf2)             AS cf_2,
    COALESCE(em.cf3, gm.cf3, c.cf3, r.cf3)             AS cf_3,
    COALESCE(em.nwc, gm.nwc, c.nwc, r.nwc)             AS nwc,
    COALESCE(em.capex, gm.capex, c.capex, r.capex)     AS capex,
    COALESCE(em.intercompany_flag, gm.intercompany_flag, c.intercompany_flag, r.intercompany_flag)
                                                        AS intercompany_flag,
    COALESCE(
      em.chart_of_accounts_source,
      gm.chart_of_accounts_source,
      c.chart_of_accounts_source,
      r.chart_of_accounts_source
    )                                                  AS chart_of_accounts_source,
    (
      em.account_code_3 IS NOT NULL
      OR
      gm.account_code_3 IS NOT NULL
      OR c.account_code_3 IS NOT NULL
      OR r.account_code_3 IS NOT NULL
    )                                                  AS has_chart_of_accounts_mapping,
    CASE
      WHEN em.account_code_3 IS NOT NULL
        THEN 'company_workbook_exact_match'
      WHEN gm.account_code_3 IS NOT NULL
       AND v.account_cd_numeric = g.range_start_account_code
        THEN 'global_account_exact_match'
      WHEN gm.account_code_3 IS NOT NULL
        THEN 'global_previous_account_range_fallback'
      WHEN c.account_code_3 IS NOT NULL
        THEN 'exact_account_cd_match'
      WHEN r.account_code_3 IS NOT NULL
        THEN 'account_family_root_fallback'
      WHEN v.account_type IN ('Asset', 'Liability', 'Income', 'Expense')
        THEN 'native_account_type_fallback'
      ELSE 'unmapped'
    END                                                 AS account_mapping_method
FROM visma_accounts AS v
LEFT JOIN tenant_account_mapping_profiles AS p
  ON p.tenant_id = v.tenant_id
LEFT JOIN company_account_mapping AS m
  ON m.organization_name = v.organization_name
 AND m.local_account_code = v.account_cd_numeric
LEFT JOIN chart_of_accounts AS em
  ON m.mapped_account_code_3 = em.account_code_3
LEFT JOIN global_account_mapping AS g
  ON p.account_mapping_profile = 'global_no_se_dk_chart'
 AND em.account_code_3 IS NULL
 AND g.mapping_scope = 'NO_SE_DK'
 AND v.account_cd_numeric IS NOT NULL
 AND LENGTH(CAST(v.account_cd_numeric AS STRING)) = g.local_account_digits
 AND v.account_cd_numeric BETWEEN g.range_start_account_code AND g.range_end_account_code
LEFT JOIN chart_of_accounts AS gm
  ON g.mapped_account_code_3 = gm.account_code_3
LEFT JOIN chart_of_accounts AS c
  ON p.account_mapping_profile IN ('group_excel_chart', 'global_no_se_dk_chart')
 AND gm.account_code_3 IS NULL
 AND v.account_cd_numeric = c.account_code_3
LEFT JOIN chart_of_accounts_family_roots AS r
  ON p.account_mapping_profile IN ('group_excel_chart', 'global_no_se_dk_chart')
 AND gm.account_code_3 IS NULL
 AND c.account_code_3 IS NULL
 AND v.account_cd_numeric BETWEEN 1000 AND 9999
 AND CAST(FLOOR(v.account_cd_numeric / 100) * 100 AS INT64) = r.account_code_2

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: GL chart of accounts dimension enriched with a shared NO/SE/DK global account mapping and safe fallback classifications.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- dim_branch.sqlx
-- Source: dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_branches
-- Grain: one row per tenantId + branchId (latest non-deleted record)
-- =============================================================================

SELECT
  tenantId AS tenant_id,
  syncedAt AS synced_at,
  CAST(branchId AS STRING) AS branch_id,
  number AS branch_number,
  name AS branch_name,
  organizationName AS organization_name,
  CAST(organizationId AS STRING) AS organization_id,
  corporateId AS corporate_id,
  IFNULL(isActive, FALSE) AS is_active,
  IFNULL(isMainBranch, FALSE) AS is_main_branch,
  vatRegistrationId AS vat_registration_id,
  SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) AS last_modified_at
FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_branches`
WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY tenantId, branchId
  ORDER BY syncedAt DESC
) = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: Branch dimension from visma_branches. One row per tenant + branch.

tables.query:
WITH business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    organization_name,
    source_segment_2_value AS segment2,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    reporting_tenant_id,
    reporting_organization_name,
    entity_code,
    group_name,
    valid_from AS bu_valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS bu_valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

main_branch AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    branch_id,
    branch_number,
    branch_name,
    organization_id,
    corporate_id,
    IFNULL(is_active, FALSE) AS is_active,
    IFNULL(is_main_branch, FALSE) AS is_main_branch,
    synced_at
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.dim_branch`
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenant_id
    ORDER BY IFNULL(is_main_branch, FALSE) DESC, synced_at DESC, branch_id
  ) = 1
)

SELECT
  m.tenant_id,
  m.organization_name,
  m.business_unit_id,
  m.segment2,
  m.business_unit_name,
  CAST(FARM_FINGERPRINT(m.tenant_id || '|' || m.business_unit_id || '|' || CAST(m.bu_valid_from AS STRING)) AS STRING) AS business_unit_key,

  m.entity_code,
  m.group_name,
  m.reporting_tenant_id,
  m.reporting_organization_name,

  CASE
    WHEN m.bu_valid_to = DATE '9999-12-31' THEN NULL
    ELSE m.bu_valid_to
  END AS entity_valid_to,
  m.bu_valid_from,
  CASE
    WHEN m.bu_valid_to = DATE '9999-12-31' THEN NULL
    ELSE m.bu_valid_to
  END AS bu_valid_to,
  m.bu_valid_to <> DATE '9999-12-31' AS is_historical,

  b.branch_id AS visma_branch_id,
  b.branch_number AS visma_branch_number,
  b.branch_name AS visma_branch_name,
  b.organization_id AS visma_branch_organization_id,
  IF(b.branch_id IS NULL, 0, 100) AS branch_match_score,
  CASE
    WHEN b.branch_id IS NULL THEN 'no_branch_for_tenant'
    ELSE 'tenant_main_branch'
  END AS branch_match_rule,

  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS mapped_department_id,
  CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS mapped_department_description,

  b.synced_at
FROM business_unit_mapping AS m
LEFT JOIN main_branch AS b
  ON m.tenant_id = b.tenant_id

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: historized business unit dimension keyed by source tenant, canonical BU, and validity window.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- dim_cash_account.sqlx
-- Silver dimension: Cash and bank account master data
-- Source: dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_cash_accounts
-- Grain: one row per tenantId + cashAccountNumber (latest non-deleted record)
-- entryTypes is a JSON array of allowed entry type codes.
-- account/subaccount are JSON references extracted to their IDs.
-- =============================================================================

SELECT
    -- Sync metadata
    tenantId                                            AS tenant_id,
    syncedAt                                            AS synced_at,
    organizationName                                    AS organization_name,

    -- Natural key
    number                                              AS cash_account_number,

    -- Attributes
    description                                         AS cash_account_description,

    -- JSON: account → {accountCD, description}
    COALESCE(
        JSON_VALUE(account, '$.accountCD'),
        account
    )                                                   AS gl_account_cd,

    -- JSON: subaccount → {subaccountNumber}
    COALESCE(
        JSON_VALUE(subaccount, '$.subaccountNumber'),
        subaccount
    )                                                   AS gl_subaccount_number,

    -- JSON: currency → {id}
    COALESCE(
        JSON_VALUE(currency, '$.id'),
        currency
    )                                                   AS currency_id,

    SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)        AS last_modified_at

FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_cash_accounts`
WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenantId, number
    ORDER BY syncedAt DESC
) = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: Cash/bank account master dimension. Source: visma_cash_accounts.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- dim_company.sqlx
-- Silver dimension: Company / branch / business unit
-- Source: dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_branches
-- Grain: one row per tenantId + branchId (latest non-deleted record)
-- =============================================================================

SELECT
    -- Sync metadata
    tenantId                                            AS tenant_id,
    syncedAt                                            AS synced_at,

    -- Natural keys
    CAST(branchId AS STRING)                            AS branch_id,
    number                                              AS business_unit_id,   -- branch code = BU identifier
    name                                                AS branch_name,
    name                                                AS business_unit_name,

    -- Attributes
    organizationName                                    AS organization_name,
    CAST(organizationId AS STRING)                      AS organization_id,
    corporateId                                         AS corporate_id,
    isActive                                            AS is_active,
    isMainBranch                                        AS is_main_branch,
    vatRegistrationId                                   AS vat_registration_id,
    SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)        AS last_modified_at

FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_branches`
WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenantId, branchId
    ORDER BY syncedAt DESC
) = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: Company/branch dimension. One row per tenant + branch. Source: visma_branches.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- dim_currency.sqlx
-- Silver dimension: Currency reference data
-- Source: dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_currencies
-- Grain: one row per tenantId + currencyId (latest non-deleted record)
-- Visma is the source of tenant currency availability.
-- The external market-rate feed lives in dw_1_staging_currency_n2.HistoryratesPowerBI,
-- but that dataset is in a different BigQuery region. We therefore store the
-- deterministic currency-code mapping in silver and keep the actual rate model
-- on the same-region Visma rate source until the staging feed is mirrored into
-- europe-north2.
-- =============================================================================

WITH latest_currency AS (
  SELECT
    tenantId                                            AS tenant_id,
    syncedAt                                            AS synced_at,
    organizationName                                    AS organization_name,
    id                                                  AS currency_id,
    description                                         AS source_currency_description,
    symbol                                              AS source_symbol,
    decimalPrecision                                    AS decimal_precision,
    isBaseCurrency                                      AS is_base_currency,
    isUsedForAccounting                                 AS is_used_for_accounting
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_currencies`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenantId, id
    ORDER BY syncedAt DESC
  ) = 1
),
currency_reference AS (
  SELECT * FROM UNNEST([
    STRUCT('AUD' AS currency_code, 'Australian dollar' AS standard_currency_name, 'A$' AS standard_symbol),
    STRUCT('CAD', 'Canadian dollar', 'C$'),
    STRUCT('CHF', 'Swiss franc', 'CHF'),
    STRUCT('CLP', 'Chilean peso', 'CLP'),
    STRUCT('DKK', 'Danish krone', 'DKK'),
    STRUCT('EUR', 'Euro', '€'),
    STRUCT('GBP', 'British pound', '£'),
    STRUCT('ISK', 'Icelandic krona', 'ISK'),
    STRUCT('JPY', 'Japanese yen', '¥'),
    STRUCT('NOK', 'Norwegian krone', 'NOK'),
    STRUCT('NZD', 'New Zealand dollar', 'NZ$'),
    STRUCT('SEK', 'Swedish krona', 'SEK'),
    STRUCT('USD', 'US dollar', '$')
  ])
),
staging_market_feed AS (
  SELECT * FROM UNNEST([
    STRUCT('AUD' AS currency_code, 'NOK' AS quote_currency_code, 'dw_1_staging_currency_n2.HistoryratesPowerBI' AS market_rate_source),
    STRUCT('BRL', 'NOK', 'dw_1_staging_currency_n2.HistoryratesPowerBI'),
    STRUCT('CAD', 'NOK', 'dw_1_staging_currency_n2.HistoryratesPowerBI'),
    STRUCT('CLP', 'NOK', 'dw_1_staging_currency_n2.HistoryratesPowerBI'),
    STRUCT('DKK', 'NOK', 'dw_1_staging_currency_n2.HistoryratesPowerBI'),
    STRUCT('EUR', 'NOK', 'dw_1_staging_currency_n2.HistoryratesPowerBI'),
    STRUCT('GBP', 'NOK', 'dw_1_staging_currency_n2.HistoryratesPowerBI'),
    STRUCT('IDR', 'NOK', 'dw_1_staging_currency_n2.HistoryratesPowerBI'),
    STRUCT('ISK', 'NOK', 'dw_1_staging_currency_n2.HistoryratesPowerBI'),
    STRUCT('JPY', 'NOK', 'dw_1_staging_currency_n2.HistoryratesPowerBI'),
    STRUCT('NZD', 'NOK', 'dw_1_staging_currency_n2.HistoryratesPowerBI'),
    STRUCT('SEK', 'NOK', 'dw_1_staging_currency_n2.HistoryratesPowerBI'),
    STRUCT('USD', 'NOK', 'dw_1_staging_currency_n2.HistoryratesPowerBI')
  ])
)

SELECT
  c.tenant_id,
  c.synced_at,
  c.organization_name,
  c.currency_id,
  c.currency_id                                        AS currency_code,
  c.source_currency_description                        AS currency_description,
  r.standard_currency_name,
  c.source_symbol                                      AS source_symbol,
  COALESCE(c.source_symbol, r.standard_symbol, c.currency_id)
                                                      AS symbol,
  r.standard_symbol,
  c.decimal_precision,
  c.is_base_currency,
  c.is_used_for_accounting,
  m.currency_code IS NOT NULL                          AS has_staging_market_rate,
  m.quote_currency_code                                AS staging_market_quote_currency_code,
  m.market_rate_source                                 AS staging_market_rate_source
FROM latest_currency AS c
LEFT JOIN currency_reference AS r
  ON r.currency_code = c.currency_id
LEFT JOIN staging_market_feed AS m
  ON m.currency_code = c.currency_id

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: Tenant currency dimension conformed to ISO currency code and aligned to the staging market-rate feed by currency code.

tables.query:
WITH source_rates AS (
  SELECT
    currency_code                                    AS base_currency_id,
    quote_currency                                   AS quote_currency_id,
    SAFE_CAST(rate AS NUMERIC)                       AS exchange_rate,
    SAFE_CAST(date AS DATE)                          AS rate_date,
    source                                           AS rate_source,
    SAFE_CAST(created_at AS TIMESTAMP)               AS source_timestamp
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_staging_currency_n2.HistoryratesPowerBI`
  WHERE currency_code IS NOT NULL
    AND quote_currency IS NOT NULL
    AND rate IS NOT NULL
    AND date IS NOT NULL
),
deduped_rates AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM source_rates
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY base_currency_id, quote_currency_id, rate_date
    ORDER BY source_timestamp DESC, rate_source DESC
  ) = 1
),
direct_and_inverse_rates AS (
  SELECT
    base_currency_id                                 AS from_currency_id,
    quote_currency_id                                AS to_currency_id,
    rate_date,
    exchange_rate,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(1, exchange_rate)                    AS inverse_exchange_rate,
    rate_source,
    source_timestamp,
    FALSE                                            AS is_inverse_rate
  FROM deduped_rates

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    quote_currency_id                                AS from_currency_id,
    base_currency_id                                 AS to_currency_id,
    rate_date,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(1, exchange_rate)                    AS exchange_rate,
    exchange_rate                                    AS inverse_exchange_rate,
    rate_source,
    source_timestamp,
    TRUE                                             AS is_inverse_rate
  FROM deduped_rates
)

SELECT
  from_currency_id,
  to_currency_id,
  rate_date,
  exchange_rate,
  inverse_exchange_rate,
  rate_source,
  source_timestamp,
  is_inverse_rate,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY from_currency_id, to_currency_id, is_inverse_rate
    ORDER BY rate_date DESC, source_timestamp DESC
  ) = 1                                              AS is_latest_rate_for_pair
FROM direct_and_inverse_rates

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: External market currency-rate reference table from the staging currency feed. Grain: one row per currency pair + rate date + direction.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- dim_currency_rate.sqlx
-- Silver dimension: Visma API exchange rates
-- Source: dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_currency_rates
-- Grain: one row per tenantId + rateType + effectiveDate + fromCurrencyId + toCurrencyId
--
-- multDiv: Visma convention for how to apply the rate.
--   'M' (multiply) → to_amount = from_amount * rate
--   'D' (divide)   → to_amount = from_amount / rate
-- We normalise this to a standard to-NOK exchange_rate so downstream
-- consumers don't need to branch on multDiv.
-- =============================================================================

WITH latest_rates AS (
  SELECT
    tenantId                                              AS tenant_id,
    organizationName                                      AS organization_name,
    id                                                    AS rate_id,
    fromCurrencyId                                        AS from_currency_id,
    toCurrencyId                                          AS to_currency_id,
    SAFE_CAST(effectiveDate AS DATE)                      AS effective_date,
    rateType                                              AS rate_type,
    CAST(rate AS NUMERIC)                                 AS rate,
    CAST(rateReciprocal AS NUMERIC)                       AS rate_reciprocal,
    multDiv                                               AS mult_div,
    -- Normalise to a standard direct exchange rate (from_currency → to_currency).
    -- When multDiv = 'M': amount_to = amount_from * rate  → rate IS already direct.
    -- When multDiv = 'D': amount_to = amount_from / rate  → direct rate = 1 / rate.
    CASE
      WHEN multDiv = 'M' THEN CAST(rate AS NUMERIC)
      WHEN multDiv = 'D' THEN SAFE_DIVIDE(1, CAST(rate AS NUMERIC))
    END                                                   AS exchange_rate,
    SAFE_CAST(timeStamp AS TIMESTAMP)                     AS visma_timestamp,
    SAFE_CAST(syncedAt AS TIMESTAMP)                      AS synced_at,
    businessUnitId                                        AS business_unit_id,
    businessUnitName                                      AS business_unit_name
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_currency_rates`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenantId, rateType, effectiveDate, fromCurrencyId, toCurrencyId
    ORDER BY syncedAt DESC
  ) = 1
)

SELECT
  tenant_id,
  organization_name,
  rate_id,
  from_currency_id,
  to_currency_id,
  effective_date,
  rate_type,
  rate,
  rate_reciprocal,
  mult_div,
  exchange_rate,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(1, exchange_rate)                           AS inverse_exchange_rate,
  visma_timestamp,
  synced_at,
  business_unit_id,
  business_unit_name,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenant_id, from_currency_id, to_currency_id, rate_type
    ORDER BY effective_date DESC, synced_at DESC
  ) = 1                                                   AS is_latest_rate_for_pair
FROM latest_rates

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: Tenant-specific exchange rates from the Visma API. Grain: one row per tenantId + rateType + effectiveDate + fromCurrencyId + toCurrencyId (latest non-deleted record).

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- dim_customer.sqlx
-- Silver dimension: Customer master data
-- Source: dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_customers plus visma_customer_locations and
--         visma_price_classes lookup
-- Grain: one row per tenantId + customerId (latest non-deleted record)
-- =============================================================================

WITH latest_customers AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_customers`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY tenantId, number
      ORDER BY syncedAt DESC
  ) = 1
),

latest_customer_locations AS (
  SELECT
    tenantId                                                    AS tenant_id,
    organizationName                                            AS organization_name,
    syncedAt                                                    AS synced_at,
    customerId                                                  AS customer_id,
    locationId                                                  AS location_id,
    CAST(internalId AS STRING)                                  AS location_internal_id,
    name                                                        AS location_name,
    countryId                                                   AS location_country_id,
    taxRegistrationId                                           AS location_tax_registration_id,
    corporateId                                                 AS location_corporate_id,
    warehouseId                                                 AS warehouse_id,
    priceClassId                                                AS price_class_id
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_customer_locations`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY tenantId, customerId, locationId
      ORDER BY syncedAt DESC
  ) = 1
),

latest_price_classes AS (
  SELECT
    tenantId                                                    AS tenant_id,
    id                                                          AS price_class_id,
    description                                                 AS price_class_description
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_price_classes`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenantId, id
    ORDER BY syncedAt DESC
  ) = 1
)

SELECT
    c.tenantId                                                  AS tenant_id,
    c.syncedAt                                                  AS synced_at,
    c.organizationName                                          AS organization_name,

    c.number                                                    AS customer_id,
    c.id                                                        AS customer_internal_id,
    CAST(c.internalId AS STRING)                                AS customer_acumatica_id,

    c.name                                                      AS customer_name,
    COALESCE(c.corporateId, JSON_VALUE(c.defaultLocation, '$.corporateId'))
                                                                AS corporate_id,
    c.currencyId                                                AS currency_id,
    c.salesAccountId                                            AS sales_account_id,
    c.exportType                                                AS export_type,
    c.creditLimit                                               AS credit_limit,
    c.creditDaysPastDue                                         AS credit_days_past_due,

    JSON_VALUE(c.creditTerms, '$.id')                           AS credit_terms,
    JSON_VALUE(c.creditTerms, '$.description')                  AS credit_terms_description,

    JSON_VALUE(c.customerClass, '$.id')                         AS customer_class,
    JSON_VALUE(c.customerClass, '$.description')                AS customer_class_description,

    JSON_VALUE(c.defaultLocation, '$.id')                       AS default_location_id,
    loc.price_class_id                                          AS default_location_price_class_id,
    CASE
      WHEN loc.customer_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'v3_customer_locations'
      ELSE NULL
    END                                                         AS default_location_price_class_source,

    loc.price_class_id                                          AS source_price_class_id,
    price_lookup.price_class_description                        AS source_price_class_description,

    customer_class_lookup.price_class_id                        AS customer_class_price_class_lookup_id,
    customer_class_lookup.price_class_description               AS customer_class_price_class_lookup_description,

    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(c.location, '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(c.location, '$.locationId'),
      JSON_VALUE(c.defaultLocation, '$.id')
    )                                                           AS location_id,

    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(c.mainAddress, '$.addressLine1'), c.addressLine1)
                                                                AS main_address_line1,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(c.mainAddress, '$.addressLine2'), c.addressLine2)
                                                                AS main_address_line2,
    JSON_VALUE(c.mainAddress, '$.city')                         AS main_city,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(c.mainAddress, '$.postalCode'), c.postalCode)
                                                                AS main_postal_code,
    JSON_VALUE(c.mainAddress, '$.state')                        AS main_state,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(c.mainAddress, '$.countryId'),
      JSON_VALUE(c.mainAddress, '$.country'),
      c.country
    )                                                           AS main_country,

    JSON_VALUE(c.mainContact, '$.fullName')                     AS main_contact_name,
    JSON_VALUE(c.mainContact, '$.email')                        AS main_contact_email,
    JSON_VALUE(c.mainContact, '$.phone1')                       AS main_contact_phone,

    c.consolidateInvoices                                       AS consolidate_invoices,
    c.acceptAutoInvoices                                        AS accept_auto_invoices,
    c.excludeDebtCollection                                     AS exclude_debt_collection,
    c.invoiceToDefaultLocation                                  AS invoice_to_default_location,
    c.printInvoices                                             AS print_invoices,
    c.printStatements                                           AS print_statements,
    c.printDunningLetters                                       AS print_dunning_letters,

    SAFE_CAST(c.createdDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)                   AS created_at,
    SAFE_CAST(c.lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)              AS last_modified_at

FROM latest_customers AS c
LEFT JOIN latest_customer_locations AS loc
  ON loc.tenant_id = c.tenantId
 AND loc.customer_id = c.number
 AND loc.location_id = JSON_VALUE(c.defaultLocation, '$.id')
LEFT JOIN latest_price_classes AS price_lookup
  ON price_lookup.tenant_id = c.tenantId
 AND price_lookup.price_class_id = loc.price_class_id
LEFT JOIN latest_price_classes AS customer_class_lookup
  ON customer_class_lookup.tenant_id = c.tenantId
 AND customer_class_lookup.price_class_id = c.customerClassId

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: Customer master dimension. Keeps customer grain at tenant plus customer and resolves price class from SalesOrders V3 default location rows when available.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- dim_department.sqlx
-- Silver dimension: Department master data
-- Source: dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_departments + synthetic "Uspesifisert"
-- sentinels for the no-department placeholder Visma encodes in
-- subaccount.segment3 ('000' / '0000' / '0' depending on tenant segment width).
-- Grain: one row per (tenant_id, department_id), latest non-deleted record.
--
-- Why sentinels are added here (not in source):
--   The Visma /v1/department endpoint does not return a row for "Uspesifisert"
--   — it is implicit. But fact_general_ledger pulls department_id from
--   subaccount.segment3, where ~870k of 970k GL rows resolve to the zero-only
--   sentinel. Without these synthetic rows the fact→dim join misses 92.8% of
--   real GL traffic. Adding them in silver keeps the gap closed for any
--   downstream join (gold_finance, BI_FinanceTable, Superset).
-- =============================================================================

WITH visma_departments AS (
    SELECT
        FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
            CAST(tenantId AS STRING), '|',
            CAST(departmentId AS STRING)
        ))                                                  AS department_key,
        tenantId                                            AS tenant_id,
        syncedAt                                            AS synced_at,
        organizationName                                    AS organization_name,
        departmentId                                        AS department_id,
        publicId                                            AS public_id,
        description                                         AS department_name,
        SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)        AS last_modified_at
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_departments`
    WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY tenantId, departmentId
        ORDER BY syncedAt DESC
    ) = 1
),

-- Discover the actual zero-only sentinel value used by each tenant.
-- Visma uses different segment widths ('000', '0000', '0'), so we derive the
-- value rather than hardcoding it. Only zero-pattern segment3 values that
-- are NOT already covered by visma_departments are surfaced as sentinels.
unspecified_sentinels AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        s.tenant_id                                                            AS tenant_id,
        s.segment3                                                             AS department_id
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.dim_subaccount` AS s
    LEFT JOIN visma_departments AS vd
        ON  vd.tenant_id     = s.tenant_id
        AND vd.department_id = s.segment3
    WHERE s.segment3 IS NOT NULL
        AND REGEXP_CONTAINS(s.segment3, r'^0+$')
        AND vd.department_id IS NULL
)

SELECT * FROM visma_departments

UNION ALL

SELECT
    FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
        CAST(tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(department_id AS STRING)
    ))                                                      AS department_key,
    tenant_id,
    CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP)                                 AS synced_at,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                    AS organization_name,
    department_id,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                    AS public_id,
    'Uspesifisert'                                          AS department_name,
    CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP)                                 AS last_modified_at
FROM unspecified_sentinels

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: Department master dimension. Source: visma_departments.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Silver dimension: Employee master data
-- Source: visma_employees
-- Why: Needed for time card analysis, expense claim ownership, project resource
--      allocation, and as a conformed dimension in the gold layer.
-- =============================================================================

WITH source_data AS (
SELECT
    tenantId                                    AS tenant_id,
    employeeId                                  AS employee_id,
    employeeNumber                              AS employee_number,
    employeeName                                AS employee_name,
    status,
    department                                  AS department_id,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) AS last_modified_at

FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_employees`
WHERE isDeleted = false OR isDeleted IS NULL
),
current_tenant_business_unit AS (
  SELECT
         tenant_id,
         business_unit_id,
         business_unit_name,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
           PARTITION BY tenant_id
           ORDER BY
             CASE
               WHEN source_segment_2_value = '0' THEN 1
               WHEN source_segment_2_value IS NULL THEN 2
               ELSE 3
             END,
             COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') DESC,
             valid_from DESC
         ) AS rn
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
  WHERE CURRENT_DATE() BETWEEN valid_from AND COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31')
)
SELECT
  source_data.*,
  current_tenant_business_unit.business_unit_id,
  current_tenant_business_unit.business_unit_name
FROM source_data
LEFT JOIN current_tenant_business_unit
  ON source_data.tenant_id = current_tenant_business_unit.tenant_id
 AND current_tenant_business_unit.rn = 1
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY source_data.tenant_id, source_data.employee_id
  ORDER BY source_data.last_modified_at DESC, source_data.employee_number DESC
) = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Employee master dimension from Visma HR module.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Silver dimension: Fiscal calendar periods
-- Source: visma_financial_periods
-- Why: Links GL transactions, budgets, and balances to fiscal periods.
--      Critical for time-intelligence DAX measures (YTD, MTD, YoY) in Power BI.
--      The finPeriodID (YYYYMM format) is the standard period key used by
--      all financial endpoints.
-- =============================================================================

WITH source_data AS (
SELECT
    tenantId                                    AS tenant_id,
    period                                      AS financial_period_id,
    description                                 AS period_description,
    SAFE_CAST(startDate AS DATE)                AS start_date,
    SAFE_CAST(endDate AS DATE)                  AS end_date,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SAFE_CAST(startDate AS DATE)) AS fiscal_year,
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM SAFE_CAST(startDate AS DATE)) AS fiscal_month,
    closedInSupplierLedger                      AS is_closed_in_ap,
    closedInCustomerLedger                      AS is_closed_in_ar,
    closedInGeneralLedger                       AS is_closed_in_gl,
    closedInFixedAssets                         AS is_closed_in_fa,
    closedInInventoryManagement                 AS is_closed_in_in,
    year

FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_financial_periods`
WHERE isDeleted = false OR isDeleted IS NULL
),
current_tenant_business_unit AS (
  SELECT
         tenant_id,
         business_unit_id,
         business_unit_name,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
           PARTITION BY tenant_id
           ORDER BY
             CASE
               WHEN source_segment_2_value = '0' THEN 1
               WHEN source_segment_2_value IS NULL THEN 2
               ELSE 3
             END,
             COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') DESC,
             valid_from DESC
         ) AS rn
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
  WHERE CURRENT_DATE() BETWEEN valid_from AND COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31')
)
SELECT
  source_data.*,
  current_tenant_business_unit.business_unit_id,
  current_tenant_business_unit.business_unit_name
FROM source_data
LEFT JOIN current_tenant_business_unit
  ON source_data.tenant_id = current_tenant_business_unit.tenant_id
 AND current_tenant_business_unit.rn = 1
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY source_data.tenant_id, source_data.financial_period_id
  ORDER BY source_data.end_date DESC, source_data.start_date DESC, source_data.period_description DESC
) = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Fiscal calendar period dimension from Visma.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Silver dimension: Fixed asset register
-- Source: visma_fixed_assets
-- Why: Master data for all capital assets. Links to fixed asset transactions
--      (acquisition, depreciation, disposal) and the balance sheet.
--      Maps to Power BI dimFixedAsset for fctFixedAssetTransaction analysis.
-- =============================================================================

WITH source_data AS (
SELECT
    tenantId                                    AS tenant_id,
    assetID                                     AS asset_id,
    description                                 AS asset_description,
    classID                                     AS class_id,
    type                                        AS asset_type,
    recordType                                  AS record_type,
    depreciable                                 AS is_depreciable,
    isTangible                                  AS is_tangible,
    location,
    quantity,
    usefulLife                                   AS useful_life,
    bookBalance                                 AS book_balance,
    SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) AS last_modified_at

FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_fixed_assets`
WHERE isDeleted = false OR isDeleted IS NULL
),
current_tenant_business_unit AS (
  SELECT
         tenant_id,
         business_unit_id,
         business_unit_name,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
           PARTITION BY tenant_id
           ORDER BY
             CASE
               WHEN source_segment_2_value = '0' THEN 1
               WHEN source_segment_2_value IS NULL THEN 2
               ELSE 3
             END,
             COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') DESC,
             valid_from DESC
         ) AS rn
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
  WHERE CURRENT_DATE() BETWEEN valid_from AND COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31')
)
SELECT
  source_data.*,
  current_tenant_business_unit.business_unit_id,
  current_tenant_business_unit.business_unit_name
FROM source_data
LEFT JOIN current_tenant_business_unit
  ON source_data.tenant_id = current_tenant_business_unit.tenant_id
 AND current_tenant_business_unit.rn = 1
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY source_data.tenant_id, source_data.asset_id
  ORDER BY source_data.last_modified_at DESC, source_data.asset_description DESC
) = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Fixed asset register dimension from Visma.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Silver dimension: Inventory item master data
-- Source: visma_inventory_items
-- =============================================================================

WITH source_data AS (
SELECT
    syncId                                      AS sync_id,
    tenantId                                    AS tenant_id,
    syncedAt                                    AS synced_at,
    firstSyncedAt                               AS first_synced_at,
    refreshedAt                                 AS refreshed_at,
    seenInFullScopeRuns                         AS seen_in_full_scope_runs,
    consecutiveMissingFullRuns                  AS consecutive_missing_full_runs,
    isDeleted                                   AS source_is_deleted,
    deletedAt                                   AS source_deleted_at,
    syncBatch                                   AS sync_batch,
    organizationName                            AS organization_name,
    `timestamp`                                 AS source_timestamp_raw,
    inventoryId                                 AS inventory_id,
    inventoryNumber                             AS inventory_number,
    CAST(internalId AS STRING)                  AS inventory_internal_id,
    description                                 AS item_description,
    itemClass                                   AS item_class,
    type                                        AS item_type,
    status                                      AS item_status,
    stockItem                                   AS is_stock_item,
    kitItem                                     AS is_kit_item,
    baseUnit                                    AS base_unit,
    salesUnit                                   AS sales_unit,
    purchaseUnit                                AS purchase_unit,
    SAFE_CAST(defaultPrice AS NUMERIC)          AS default_price,
    SAFE_CAST(recommendedPrice AS NUMERIC)      AS recommended_price,
    SAFE_CAST(lastCost AS NUMERIC)              AS last_cost,
    SAFE_CAST(currentCost AS NUMERIC)           AS current_cost,
    SAFE_CAST(pendingCost AS NUMERIC)           AS pending_cost,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(pendingCostDate AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(pendingCostDate AS DATETIME)),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(pendingCostDate AS TIMESTAMP))
    )                                           AS pending_cost_date,
    vatCode                                     AS vat_code,
    postingClass                                AS posting_class,
    priceClass                                  AS price_class,
    priceClassID                                AS price_class_id,
    unspsc                                      AS unspsc,
    intrastat                                   AS intrastat,
    defaultWarehouse                            AS default_warehouse_raw,
    JSON_VALUE(defaultWarehouse, '$.warehouseId') AS default_warehouse_id,
    JSON_VALUE(defaultWarehouse, '$.description') AS default_warehouse_name,
    defaultIssueFrom                            AS default_issue_from_raw,
    defaultReceiptTo                            AS default_receipt_to_raw,
    lotSerialClass                              AS lot_serial_class_raw,
    inventoryUnits                              AS inventory_units_raw,
    availability                                AS availability_raw,
    attributes                                  AS attributes_raw,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.WEBVARE')         AS attribute_webvare,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.KATEGORI')        AS attribute_kategori,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.UKATPRODTY')      AS attribute_ukatprodty,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.ECOONLINE')       AS attribute_ecoonline,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.PRISANTALL')      AS attribute_prisantall,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.LAGLOK15')        AS attribute_laglok15,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.LAGLOK10')        AS attribute_laglok10,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.LAGLOK1')         AS attribute_laglok1,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.LAGLOK16')        AS attribute_laglok16,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.LAGLOK14')        AS attribute_laglok14,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.LAGLOK11')        AS attribute_laglok11,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.UNSPSC')          AS attribute_unspsc,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.EGENVEKT')        AS attribute_egenvekt,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.INTERNNR')        AS attribute_internnr,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.SHOPLINK')        AS attribute_shoplink,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.PARENTSKU')       AS attribute_parentsku,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$."MÅLENHETER"')    AS attribute_malenheter,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.FORPAKNING')      AS attribute_forpakning,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.DEKLNR')          AS attribute_deklnr,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$."INNKJØPSIN"')    AS attribute_innkjopsin,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.DOKTYPE')         AS attribute_doktype,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.PRODTYPE3')       AS attribute_prodtype3,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.UNNR')            AS attribute_unnr,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$."GRØNTPUNKT"')    AS attribute_grontpunkt,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.ADRKL')           AS attribute_adrkl,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.EMBGRP')          AS attribute_embgrp,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.FARESEDDEL')      AS attribute_fareseddel,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.TUNELL')          AS attribute_tunell,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.UN')              AS attribute_un,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.IMPORTID')        AS attribute_importid,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.DSB')             AS attribute_dsb,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.NOS')             AS attribute_nos,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.PRODKAT')         AS attribute_prodkat,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.SIZE')            AS attribute_size,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$.PRODTYPE')        AS attribute_prodtype,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$."ERKLÆRING"')     AS attribute_erklaring,
    JSON_VALUE(attributes, '$."Internal r"')    AS attribute_internal_r,
    attachments                                 AS attachments_raw,
    metadata                                    AS metadata_raw,
    packaging                                   AS packaging_raw,
    supplierDetails                             AS supplier_details_raw,
    warehouseDetails                            AS warehouse_details_raw,
    salesCategories                             AS sales_categories_raw,
    crossReferences                             AS cross_references_raw,
    businessUnitId                              AS source_business_unit_id_raw,
    businessUnitName                            AS source_business_unit_name_raw,
    ARRAY_LENGTH(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(COALESCE(inventoryUnits, '[]')))
                                                AS inventory_unit_count,
    ARRAY_LENGTH(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))
                                                AS availability_count,
    (SELECT COUNT(*)
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
     WHERE COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityAvailable') AS NUMERIC), 0) > 0
        OR COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityOnHand') AS NUMERIC), 0) > 0
        OR COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityAvailableForShipment') AS NUMERIC), 0) > 0
    )                                           AS availability_active_warehouse_count,
    (SELECT STRING_AGG(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.warehouseId'), ', ' ORDER BY JSON_VALUE(a, '$.warehouseId'))
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
    )                                           AS availability_warehouse_ids,
    (SELECT STRING_AGG(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.description'), ', ' ORDER BY JSON_VALUE(a, '$.warehouseId'))
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
    )                                           AS availability_warehouse_names,
    (SELECT SUM(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityOnHand') AS NUMERIC))
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
    )                                           AS availability_total_quantity_on_hand,
    (SELECT SUM(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityAvailable') AS NUMERIC))
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
    )                                           AS availability_total_quantity_available,
    (SELECT SUM(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityAvailableForShipment') AS NUMERIC))
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
    )                                           AS availability_total_quantity_available_for_shipment,
    (SELECT SUM(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityNotAvailable') AS NUMERIC))
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
    )                                           AS availability_total_quantity_not_available,
    (SELECT SUM(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityPurchaseOrders') AS NUMERIC))
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
    )                                           AS availability_total_quantity_purchase_orders,
    (SELECT SUM(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.estimatedTotalCost') AS NUMERIC))
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
    )                                           AS availability_total_estimated_cost,
    (SELECT MAX(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.lastModified') AS TIMESTAMP))
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
    )                                           AS availability_last_modified_at,
    (SELECT SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.internalWarehouseId') AS INT64)
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
     ORDER BY
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityAvailable') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityOnHand') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.estimatedTotalCost') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       JSON_VALUE(a, '$.warehouseId')
     LIMIT 1
    )                                           AS primary_availability_internal_warehouse_id,
    (SELECT JSON_VALUE(a, '$.warehouseId')
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
     ORDER BY
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityAvailable') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityOnHand') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.estimatedTotalCost') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       JSON_VALUE(a, '$.warehouseId')
     LIMIT 1
    )                                           AS primary_availability_warehouse_id,
    (SELECT JSON_VALUE(a, '$.description')
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
     ORDER BY
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityAvailable') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityOnHand') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.estimatedTotalCost') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       JSON_VALUE(a, '$.warehouseId')
     LIMIT 1
    )                                           AS primary_availability_warehouse_name,
    (SELECT SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityOnHand') AS NUMERIC)
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
     ORDER BY
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityAvailable') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityOnHand') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.estimatedTotalCost') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       JSON_VALUE(a, '$.warehouseId')
     LIMIT 1
    )                                           AS primary_availability_quantity_on_hand,
    (SELECT SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityAvailable') AS NUMERIC)
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
     ORDER BY
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityAvailable') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityOnHand') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.estimatedTotalCost') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       JSON_VALUE(a, '$.warehouseId')
     LIMIT 1
    )                                           AS primary_availability_quantity_available,
    (SELECT SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityAvailableForShipment') AS NUMERIC)
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
     ORDER BY
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityAvailable') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityOnHand') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.estimatedTotalCost') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       JSON_VALUE(a, '$.warehouseId')
     LIMIT 1
    )                                           AS primary_availability_quantity_available_for_shipment,
    (SELECT SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityNotAvailable') AS NUMERIC)
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
     ORDER BY
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityAvailable') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityOnHand') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.estimatedTotalCost') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       JSON_VALUE(a, '$.warehouseId')
     LIMIT 1
    )                                           AS primary_availability_quantity_not_available,
    (SELECT SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityPurchaseOrders') AS NUMERIC)
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
     ORDER BY
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityAvailable') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityOnHand') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.estimatedTotalCost') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       JSON_VALUE(a, '$.warehouseId')
     LIMIT 1
    )                                           AS primary_availability_quantity_purchase_orders,
    (SELECT SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.estimatedTotalCost') AS NUMERIC)
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
     ORDER BY
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityAvailable') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityOnHand') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.estimatedTotalCost') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       JSON_VALUE(a, '$.warehouseId')
     LIMIT 1
    )                                           AS primary_availability_estimated_total_cost,
    (SELECT SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.estimatedUnitCost') AS NUMERIC)
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
     ORDER BY
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityAvailable') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityOnHand') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.estimatedTotalCost') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       JSON_VALUE(a, '$.warehouseId')
     LIMIT 1
    )                                           AS primary_availability_estimated_unit_cost,
    (SELECT SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.lastModified') AS TIMESTAMP)
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(PARSE_JSON(COALESCE(availability, '[]')))) AS a
     ORDER BY
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityAvailable') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.quantityOnHand') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       COALESCE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(a, '$.estimatedTotalCost') AS NUMERIC), 0) DESC,
       JSON_VALUE(a, '$.warehouseId')
     LIMIT 1
    )                                           AS primary_availability_last_modified_at,
    ARRAY_LENGTH(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(COALESCE(crossReferences, '[]')))
                                                AS cross_reference_count,
    SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) AS last_modified_at

FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_inventory_items`
WHERE isDeleted = false OR isDeleted IS NULL
),
current_tenant_reporting_business_unit AS (
  SELECT
         tenant_id,
         business_unit_id,
         business_unit_name,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
           PARTITION BY tenant_id
           ORDER BY
             CASE
               WHEN source_segment_2_value = '0' THEN 1
               WHEN source_segment_2_value IS NULL THEN 2
               ELSE 3
             END,
             COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') DESC,
             valid_from DESC
         ) AS rn
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
  WHERE CURRENT_DATE() BETWEEN valid_from AND COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31')
)
SELECT
  source_data.*,
  current_tenant_reporting_business_unit.business_unit_id
                                                AS tenant_reporting_business_unit_id,
  current_tenant_reporting_business_unit.business_unit_name
                                                AS tenant_reporting_business_unit_name
FROM source_data
LEFT JOIN current_tenant_reporting_business_unit
  ON source_data.tenant_id = current_tenant_reporting_business_unit.tenant_id
 AND current_tenant_reporting_business_unit.rn = 1
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY source_data.tenant_id, source_data.inventory_id
  ORDER BY source_data.last_modified_at DESC, source_data.inventory_number DESC
) = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Inventory item dimension sourced from Visma inventory items at tenant plus inventory grain. Inventory items are tenant-scoped in Visma; any business-unit fields in this model are tenant-level reporting defaults, not item-level ownership. Bronze ingest metadata and raw source helper fields are preserved with explicit source-prefixed names, and raw inventory attributes and availability are unpacked into helper columns where the source consistently provides data.

-- =============================================================================
-- dim_ledger.sqlx
-- Silver dimension: General ledger definitions
-- Source: dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_ledgers
-- Grain: one row per tenantId + ledger number (latest non-deleted record)
-- All fields are flat — no JSON extraction required.
-- =============================================================================

SELECT
    -- Sync metadata
    tenantId                                            AS tenant_id,
    syncedAt                                            AS synced_at,
    organizationName                                    AS organization_name,

    -- Natural keys
    number                                              AS ledger_id,
    CAST(internalId AS STRING)                          AS ledger_internal_id,

    -- Attributes
    description                                         AS ledger_description,
    balanceType                                         AS balance_type,
    currencyId                                          AS currency_id,
    branchAccounting                                    AS branch_accounting,
    consolidationSource                                 AS consolidation_source,
    postInterCompany                                    AS post_inter_company,

    SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)        AS last_modified_at

FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_ledgers`
WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenantId, number
    ORDER BY syncedAt DESC
) = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: GL ledger type dimension (actual, budget, statistical). Source: visma_ledgers.
