-- =============================================================================
-- Silver dimension: Location master data
-- Source: visma_locations
-- Why: Referenced by invoices, shipments, purchase orders, and warehouse
--      operations. Provides address and tax zone context for transactions.
-- =============================================================================

WITH source_data AS (
SELECT
    tenantId                                    AS tenant_id,
    SAFE_CAST(locationId AS STRING)             AS location_id,
    locationName                                AS location_name,
    active                                      AS is_active,
    address,
    vatZone                                     AS vat_zone,
    gln,
    corporateId                                 AS corporate_id,
    SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) AS last_modified_at

FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_locations`
WHERE isDeleted = false OR isDeleted IS NULL
),
current_tenant_business_unit AS (
  SELECT
         tenant_id,
         business_unit_id,
         business_unit_name,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
           PARTITION BY tenant_id
           ORDER BY
             CASE
               WHEN source_segment_2_value = '0' THEN 1
               WHEN source_segment_2_value IS NULL THEN 2
               ELSE 3
             END,
             COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') DESC,
             valid_from DESC
         ) AS rn
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
  WHERE CURRENT_DATE() BETWEEN valid_from AND COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31')
)
SELECT
  source_data.*,
  current_tenant_business_unit.business_unit_id,
  current_tenant_business_unit.business_unit_name
FROM source_data
LEFT JOIN current_tenant_business_unit
  ON source_data.tenant_id = current_tenant_business_unit.tenant_id
 AND current_tenant_business_unit.rn = 1
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY source_data.tenant_id, source_data.location_id
  ORDER BY source_data.last_modified_at DESC, source_data.location_name DESC
) = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Location master dimension from Visma.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Silver dimension: Project master data
-- Source: visma_projects
-- =============================================================================

WITH source_data AS (
SELECT
    tenantId                                    AS tenant_id,
    SAFE_CAST(projectID AS STRING)              AS project_id,
    description                                 AS project_name,
    status,
    SAFE_CAST(startDate AS DATE)                AS start_date,
    SAFE_CAST(endDate AS DATE)                  AS end_date,
    customer                                    AS customer,
    customer                                    AS customer_raw,
    JSON_VALUE(customer, '$.number')            AS customer_id,
    JSON_VALUE(customer, '$.name')              AS customer_name,
    billingRule                                 AS billing_rule,
    billingRule                                 AS billing_rule_raw,
    JSON_VALUE(billingRule, '$.id')             AS billing_rule_id,
    JSON_VALUE(billingRule, '$.description')    AS billing_rule_description,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(billingRule, '$.active') AS BOOL)
                                                AS billing_rule_active,
    branch                                      AS branch_raw,
    JSON_VALUE(branch, '$.number')              AS branch_id,
    JSON_VALUE(branch, '$.name')                AS branch_name,
    customerLocation                            AS customer_location_raw,
    JSON_VALUE(customerLocation, '$.id')        AS customer_location_id,
    JSON_VALUE(customerLocation, '$.name')      AS customer_location_name,
    projectManager                              AS project_manager_raw,
    JSON_VALUE(projectManager, '$.employeeId')  AS project_manager_employee_id,
    JSON_VALUE(projectManager, '$.employeeNumber')
                                                AS project_manager_employee_number,
    JSON_VALUE(projectManager, '$.employeeName') AS project_manager_name,
    JSON_VALUE(projectManager, '$.department')  AS project_manager_department,
    JSON_VALUE(projectManager, '$.status')      AS project_manager_status,
    defSub                                      AS default_subaccount_raw,
    JSON_VALUE(defSub, '$.id')                  AS default_subaccount_id,
    template                                    AS template_raw,
    JSON_VALUE(template, '$.number')            AS template_id,
    JSON_VALUE(template, '$.description')       AS template_description,
    JSON_VALUE(template, '$.status')            AS template_status,
    visibility                                  AS visibility_raw,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(visibility, '$.visibleInGl') AS BOOL)
                                                AS visible_in_gl,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(visibility, '$.visibleInAp') AS BOOL)
                                                AS visible_in_ap,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(visibility, '$.visibleInAr') AS BOOL)
                                                AS visible_in_ar,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(visibility, '$.visibleInSo') AS BOOL)
                                                AS visible_in_so,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(visibility, '$.visibleInPo') AS BOOL)
                                                AS visible_in_po,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(visibility, '$.visibleInEa') AS BOOL)
                                                AS visible_in_ea,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(visibility, '$.visibleInTa') AS BOOL)
                                                AS visible_in_ta,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(visibility, '$.visibleInIn') AS BOOL)
                                                AS visible_in_in,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(visibility, '$.visibleInCa') AS BOOL)
                                                AS visible_in_ca,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(visibility, '$.visibleInCr') AS BOOL)
                                                AS visible_in_cr,
    SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) AS last_modified_at

FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_projects`
WHERE isDeleted = false OR isDeleted IS NULL
),
current_tenant_business_unit AS (
  SELECT
         tenant_id,
         business_unit_id,
         business_unit_name,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
           PARTITION BY tenant_id
           ORDER BY
             CASE
               WHEN source_segment_2_value = '0' THEN 1
               WHEN source_segment_2_value IS NULL THEN 2
               ELSE 3
             END,
             COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') DESC,
             valid_from DESC
         ) AS rn
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
  WHERE CURRENT_DATE() BETWEEN valid_from AND COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31')
)
SELECT
  source_data.*,
  current_tenant_business_unit.business_unit_id,
  current_tenant_business_unit.business_unit_name
FROM source_data
LEFT JOIN current_tenant_business_unit
  ON source_data.tenant_id = current_tenant_business_unit.tenant_id
 AND current_tenant_business_unit.rn = 1
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY source_data.tenant_id, source_data.project_id
  ORDER BY source_data.last_modified_at DESC, source_data.project_name DESC
) = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Project dimension sourced from Visma projects.

tables.query:
WITH salesperson AS (
  SELECT
      tenantId                                        AS tenant_id,
      syncedAt                                        AS synced_at,
      organizationName                                AS organization_name,
      salespersonID                                   AS sales_person_id,
      name                                            AS sales_person_name,
      commissionPct                                   AS commission_pct,
      isActive                                        AS is_active,
      COALESCE(
          JSON_VALUE(salesSub, '$.id'),
          salesSub
      )                                               AS sales_sub_account,
      CASE
          WHEN NULLIF(
              REGEXP_REPLACE(
                  COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(salesSub, '$.id'), salesSub, ''),
                  r'[^0-9]',
                  ''
              ),
              ''
          ) IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(
              LPAD(
                  REGEXP_REPLACE(
                      COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(salesSub, '$.id'), salesSub, ''),
                      r'[^0-9]',
                      ''
                  ),
                  6,
                  '0'
              ),
              1,
              2
          )
      END                                             AS sales_sub_account_segment_1,
      CASE
          WHEN NULLIF(
              REGEXP_REPLACE(
                  COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(salesSub, '$.id'), salesSub, ''),
                  r'[^0-9]',
                  ''
              ),
              ''
          ) IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(
              LPAD(
                  REGEXP_REPLACE(
                      COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(salesSub, '$.id'), salesSub, ''),
                      r'[^0-9]',
                      ''
                  ),
                  6,
                  '0'
              ),
              3,
              1
          )
      END                                             AS sales_sub_account_segment_2,
      CASE
          WHEN NULLIF(
              REGEXP_REPLACE(
                  COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(salesSub, '$.id'), salesSub, ''),
                  r'[^0-9]',
                  ''
              ),
              ''
          ) IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(
              LPAD(
                  REGEXP_REPLACE(
                      COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(salesSub, '$.id'), salesSub, ''),
                      r'[^0-9]',
                      ''
                  ),
                  6,
                  '0'
              ),
              4,
              3
          )
      END                                             AS sales_sub_account_segment_3,
      SAFE_CAST(createdDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)         AS created_at,
      SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)    AS last_modified_at
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_sales_persons`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY tenantId, salespersonID
      ORDER BY syncedAt DESC, SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) DESC
  ) = 1
),
mapped_salesperson AS (
  SELECT
      salesperson.tenant_id,
      salesperson.synced_at,
      salesperson.organization_name,
      salesperson.sales_person_id,
      salesperson.sales_person_name,
      salesperson.commission_pct,
      salesperson.is_active,
      salesperson.sales_sub_account,
      salesperson.sales_sub_account_segment_1,
      salesperson.sales_sub_account_segment_2,
      salesperson.sales_sub_account_segment_3,
      mapped_bu.business_unit_id                          AS home_business_unit_id,
      mapped_bu.business_unit_name                        AS home_business_unit_name,
      CASE
          WHEN mapped_bu.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL
            AND mapped_bu.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL
            THEN 'sales_sub_segment2_match'
          WHEN mapped_bu.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL
            THEN 'tenant_default_match'
          ELSE 'no_match'
      END                                                 AS home_business_unit_match_rule,
      salesperson.created_at,
      salesperson.last_modified_at
  FROM salesperson
  LEFT JOIN `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping` AS mapped_bu
      ON salesperson.tenant_id = mapped_bu.tenant_id
     AND DATE(COALESCE(salesperson.last_modified_at, salesperson.synced_at))
          BETWEEN mapped_bu.valid_from AND COALESCE(mapped_bu.valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31')
     AND (
          mapped_bu.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
          OR mapped_bu.source_segment_2_value = NULLIF(salesperson.sales_sub_account_segment_2, '')
     )
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY salesperson.tenant_id, salesperson.sales_person_id
      ORDER BY
          CASE WHEN mapped_bu.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
          mapped_bu.valid_from DESC
  ) = 1
)
SELECT
    mapped_salesperson.tenant_id,
    mapped_salesperson.synced_at,
    mapped_salesperson.organization_name,
    mapped_salesperson.sales_person_id,
    mapped_salesperson.sales_person_name,
    directory.employee_id,
    directory.phone,
    directory.email,
    directory.legacy_sales_person_id,
    CASE
      WHEN directory.sales_person_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'excel_directory_match'
      ELSE 'no_directory_match'
    END                                                 AS directory_match_rule,
    mapped_salesperson.commission_pct,
    mapped_salesperson.is_active,
    mapped_salesperson.sales_sub_account,
    mapped_salesperson.sales_sub_account_segment_1,
    mapped_salesperson.sales_sub_account_segment_2,
    mapped_salesperson.sales_sub_account_segment_3,
    mapped_salesperson.home_business_unit_id,
    mapped_salesperson.home_business_unit_name,
    mapped_salesperson.home_business_unit_match_rule,
    mapped_salesperson.created_at,
    mapped_salesperson.last_modified_at
FROM mapped_salesperson
LEFT JOIN `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.seed_sales_person_directory` AS directory
  ON directory.tenant_id = mapped_salesperson.tenant_id
 AND directory.sales_person_id = mapped_salesperson.sales_person_id

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: Salesperson master dimension. Source: visma_sales_persons enriched with salesperson directory contact details from Selgere 20260420.xlsx.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- dim_subaccount.sqlx
-- Silver dimension: GL subaccount segment codes
-- Source: dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_subaccounts
-- Grain: one row per tenantId + subaccountId (latest non-deleted record)
-- segments is a JSON array of segment key/value pairs.
-- Extract segment 1/2/3 values + value descriptions into dedicated columns.
-- =============================================================================

SELECT
    -- Sync metadata
    tenantId                                            AS tenant_id,
    syncedAt                                            AS synced_at,
    organizationName                                    AS organization_name,

    -- Natural keys
    CAST(subaccountId AS STRING)                        AS subaccount_id,
    subaccountNumber                                    AS subaccount_number,

    -- Attributes
    description                                         AS subaccount_description,
    active                                              AS is_active,

    -- segments is a JSON array like:
    -- [{"segmentId":1,"segmentDescription":"IC","segmentValue":"56","segmentValueDescription":"..."}, ...]
    -- Expose parsed columns for segment 1/2/3.

    (SELECT JSON_VALUE(seg, '$.segmentValue')
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(segments)) AS seg
     WHERE JSON_VALUE(seg, '$.segmentId') = '1'
     LIMIT 1)                                           AS segment1,

    (SELECT JSON_VALUE(seg, '$.segmentValueDescription')
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(segments)) AS seg
     WHERE JSON_VALUE(seg, '$.segmentId') = '1'
     LIMIT 1)                                           AS segment1_value_description,

    (SELECT JSON_VALUE(seg, '$.segmentValue')
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(segments)) AS seg
     WHERE JSON_VALUE(seg, '$.segmentId') = '2'
     LIMIT 1)                                           AS segment2,

    (SELECT JSON_VALUE(seg, '$.segmentValueDescription')
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(segments)) AS seg
     WHERE JSON_VALUE(seg, '$.segmentId') = '2'
     LIMIT 1)                                           AS segment2_value_description,

    (SELECT JSON_VALUE(seg, '$.segmentValue')
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(segments)) AS seg
     WHERE JSON_VALUE(seg, '$.segmentId') = '3'
     LIMIT 1)                                           AS segment3,

    (SELECT JSON_VALUE(seg, '$.segmentValueDescription')
     FROM UNNEST(JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(segments)) AS seg
     WHERE JSON_VALUE(seg, '$.segmentId') = '3'
     LIMIT 1)                                           AS segment3_value_description,

    SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)        AS last_modified_at

FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_subaccounts`
WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenantId, subaccountId
    ORDER BY syncedAt DESC
) = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: GL subaccount segment code dimension. Source: visma_subaccounts.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Silver dimension: Supplier master data
-- Source: visma_suppliers
-- =============================================================================

WITH source_data AS (
SELECT
    tenantId                                    AS tenant_id,
    SAFE_CAST(number AS STRING)                 AS supplier_id,
    name                                        AS supplier_name,
    status,
    supplierClass                               AS supplier_class,
    currencyId                                  AS currency_id,
    creditTerms                                 AS credit_terms,
    vatZone                                     AS vat_zone,
    vatRegistrationId                           AS vat_registration_id,
    corporateId                                 AS corporate_id,
    SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) AS last_modified_at

FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_suppliers`
WHERE isDeleted = false OR isDeleted IS NULL
),
current_tenant_business_unit AS (
  SELECT
         tenant_id,
         business_unit_id,
         business_unit_name,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
           PARTITION BY tenant_id
           ORDER BY
             CASE
               WHEN source_segment_2_value = '0' THEN 1
               WHEN source_segment_2_value IS NULL THEN 2
               ELSE 3
             END,
             COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') DESC,
             valid_from DESC
         ) AS rn
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
  WHERE CURRENT_DATE() BETWEEN valid_from AND COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31')
)
SELECT
  source_data.*,
  current_tenant_business_unit.business_unit_id,
  current_tenant_business_unit.business_unit_name
FROM source_data
LEFT JOIN current_tenant_business_unit
  ON source_data.tenant_id = current_tenant_business_unit.tenant_id
 AND current_tenant_business_unit.rn = 1
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY source_data.tenant_id, source_data.supplier_id
  ORDER BY source_data.last_modified_at DESC, source_data.supplier_name DESC
) = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Supplier dimension sourced from Visma suppliers.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Silver dimension: Warehouse master data
-- Source: visma_warehouses
-- Why: Central to all inventory operations (receipts, issues, transfers,
--      shipments). Provides the warehouse context for stock valuation and
--      quantity-on-hand calculations in the gold/sales layer.
-- =============================================================================

WITH source_data AS (
  SELECT
      tenantId                                    AS tenant_id,
      SAFE_CAST(warehouseID AS STRING)            AS warehouse_id,
      description                                 AS warehouse_name,
      active                                      AS is_active,
      branch,
      receiptLocation                             AS receipt_location,
      shipLocation                                AS ship_location,
      locations
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_warehouses`
  WHERE isDeleted = false OR isDeleted IS NULL
),

current_tenant_business_unit AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY tenant_id
      ORDER BY
        CASE
          WHEN source_segment_2_value = '0' THEN 1
          WHEN source_segment_2_value IS NULL THEN 2
          ELSE 3
        END,
        COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') DESC,
        valid_from DESC
    ) AS row_num
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
  WHERE CURRENT_DATE() BETWEEN valid_from AND COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31')
)

SELECT
  src.tenant_id,
  bu.business_unit_id,
  bu.business_unit_name,
  src.warehouse_id,
  src.warehouse_name,
  src.is_active,
  src.branch,
  src.receipt_location,
  src.ship_location,
  src.locations
FROM source_data AS src
LEFT JOIN current_tenant_business_unit AS bu
  ON src.tenant_id = bu.tenant_id
 AND bu.row_num = 1
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY src.tenant_id, src.warehouse_id
  ORDER BY src.is_active DESC, src.warehouse_name DESC
) = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Warehouse master dimension from Visma logistics module.

tables.query:
WITH business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

base AS (
  SELECT
    tenantId AS tenant_id,
    syncedAt AS synced_at,
    organizationName AS organization_name,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(businessUnitId, '$.id'), CAST(businessUnitId AS STRING)) AS source_business_unit_id,
    businessUnitName AS source_business_unit_name,

    referenceNbr AS reference_nbr,
    tranType AS tran_type,
    disbReceipt AS disb_receipt,
    status,

    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(cashAccount, '$.cashAccountId'),
      JSON_VALUE(cashAccount, '$.id'),
      cashAccount
    ) AS cash_account_number,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(entryType, '$.id'), entryType) AS entry_type_id,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(currency, '$.id'), currency) AS currency_id,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(owner, '$.id'), owner) AS owner_id,
    JSON_VALUE(documentRef, '$.type') AS document_ref_type,
    JSON_VALUE(documentRef, '$.referenceNumber') AS document_ref_number,

    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(tranDate AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(tranDate AS DATETIME)),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(tranDate AS TIMESTAMP))
    ) AS transaction_date,
    financialPeriod AS financial_period,
    finPeriod AS fin_period,

    description,
    hold,

    amount,
    controlTotal AS control_total,
    taxAmount AS tax_amount,
    taxTotal AS tax_total,
    vatExemptTotal AS vat_exempt_total,
    vatTaxableTotal AS vat_taxable_total,

    financialsDetail AS financials_detail_json,
    transactionDetails AS transaction_details_json,
    taxDetails AS tax_details_json,

    SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) AS last_modified_at
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_cash_transactions`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
),

enriched AS (
  SELECT
    b.*,
    bm.business_unit_id AS mapped_business_unit_id,
    bm.business_unit_name AS mapped_business_unit_name,
    CASE
      WHEN bm.business_unit_id IS NULL THEN 'no_mapping'
      WHEN bm.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 'segment_zero_match'
      ELSE 'tenant_default_match'
    END AS business_unit_match_rule,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY b.tenant_id, b.reference_nbr, b.tran_type
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN bm.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
        bm.valid_from DESC
    ) AS bu_match_rank
  FROM base AS b
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping AS bm
    ON b.tenant_id = bm.tenant_id
   AND b.transaction_date BETWEEN bm.valid_from AND bm.valid_to
   AND (
     bm.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR bm.source_segment_2_value = '0'
   )
)

SELECT
  tenant_id,
  synced_at,
  organization_name,
  source_business_unit_id,
  source_business_unit_name,
  COALESCE(mapped_business_unit_id, source_business_unit_id) AS business_unit_id,
  COALESCE(mapped_business_unit_name, source_business_unit_name, organization_name) AS business_unit_name,
  business_unit_match_rule,

  reference_nbr,
  tran_type,
  disb_receipt,
  status,
  cash_account_number,
  entry_type_id,
  currency_id,
  owner_id,
  document_ref_type,
  document_ref_number,
  transaction_date,
  financial_period,
  fin_period,
  description,
  hold,
  amount,
  control_total,
  tax_amount,
  tax_total,
  vat_exempt_total,
  vat_taxable_total,
  financials_detail_json,
  transaction_details_json,
  tax_details_json,
  last_modified_at
FROM enriched
WHERE bu_match_rank = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: Cash account transaction entries with historized business unit mapping by transaction date.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Silver fact: Customer credit notes (AR credit memos)
-- Source: visma_customer_credit_notes
-- Grain: one row per credit note (tenant + referenceNumber)
-- Why: Needed for Power BI Customer Credit Note Amount measures. Credit
--      notes reduce AR balances and revenue.
-- =============================================================================

WITH business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

source_data AS (
    SELECT
        tenantId                                        AS tenant_id,
        syncedAt                                        AS synced_at,
        organizationName                                AS organization_name,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS raw_business_unit_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS business_unit_id,
        -- Dimension FKs
        COALESCE(
          JSON_VALUE(customer, '$.number'),
          JSON_VALUE(customer, '$.id'),
          JSON_VALUE(customer, '$.acctCD'),
          CAST(customer AS STRING)
        )                                              AS customer_id,
        COALESCE(
          JSON_VALUE(customer, '$.name'),
          JSON_VALUE(customer, '$.description')
        )                                              AS customer_name,
        COALESCE(
          JSON_VALUE(account, '$.number'),
          CAST(account AS STRING)
        )                                              AS account_id,
        branchNumber                                    AS branch_id,
        currencyId                                      AS currency_id,
        SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(location, '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(location, '$.number')) AS STRING) AS location_id,
        SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(project, '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(project, '$.number')) AS STRING) AS project_id,
        creditTerms                                     AS credit_terms_id,
        SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(paymentMethod, '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(paymentMethod, '$.number')) AS STRING) AS payment_method_id,
        salesPersonID                                   AS sales_person_id,

        -- Degenerate dimensions
        referenceNumber                                 AS reference_number,
        documentType                                    AS document_type,
        COALESCE(
          SAFE_CAST(documentDate AS DATE),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(documentDate AS TIMESTAMP))
        )                                              AS document_date,
        COALESCE(
          SAFE_CAST(documentDueDate AS DATE),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(documentDueDate AS TIMESTAMP))
        )                                              AS document_due_date,
        financialPeriod                                 AS financial_period,
        postPeriod                                      AS post_period,
        status,
        customerRefNumber                               AS customer_ref_number,
        paymentReference                                AS payment_reference,
        externalReference                               AS external_reference,

        -- Measures
        SAFE_CAST(amount AS NUMERIC)                    AS amount,
        SAFE_CAST(amountInCurrency AS NUMERIC)          AS amount_in_currency,
        SAFE_CAST(balance AS NUMERIC)                   AS balance,
        SAFE_CAST(balanceInCurrency AS NUMERIC)         AS balance_in_currency,
        SAFE_CAST(vatTotal AS NUMERIC)                  AS vat_total,
        SAFE_CAST(vatTotalInCurrency AS NUMERIC)        AS vat_total_in_currency,
        SAFE_CAST(detailTotal AS NUMERIC)               AS detail_total,
        SAFE_CAST(detailTotalInCurrency AS NUMERIC)     AS detail_total_in_currency,
        SAFE_CAST(discountTotal AS NUMERIC)             AS discount_total,
        SAFE_CAST(discountTotalInCurrency AS NUMERIC)   AS discount_total_in_currency,
        SAFE_CAST(exchangeRate AS NUMERIC)              AS exchange_rate,

        -- Audit
        SAFE_CAST(createdDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)         AS created_at,
        SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)    AS last_modified_at

    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_customer_credit_notes`
    WHERE isDeleted = false OR isDeleted IS NULL
),
enriched AS (
  SELECT
    source_data.*,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id AS mapped_bu_id,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_name AS mapped_bu_name,
    CASE
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL
       AND business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = '0' THEN 'segment_zero_match'
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'tenant_default_match'
      ELSE 'unresolved'
    END AS business_unit_resolution_method,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY source_data.tenant_id, source_data.reference_number
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
        business_unit_mapping.valid_from DESC
    ) AS bu_match_rank
  FROM source_data
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping
    ON source_data.tenant_id = business_unit_mapping.tenant_id
   AND source_data.document_date BETWEEN business_unit_mapping.valid_from AND business_unit_mapping.valid_to
   AND (
     business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = '0'
   )
)
SELECT
  enriched.* EXCEPT (business_unit_id, mapped_bu_id, mapped_bu_name, bu_match_rank),
  COALESCE(enriched.mapped_bu_id, enriched.business_unit_id) AS business_unit_id,
  enriched.mapped_bu_name AS business_unit_name
FROM enriched
WHERE bu_match_rank = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Customer credit note headers from Visma. Grain: one row per credit note (tenant + referenceNumber).

tables.query:
WITH business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

subaccount_dim AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    subaccount_id,
    segment2 AS segment2_value
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.dim_subaccount`
),

source_base AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_customer_invoices`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
),

line_subaccounts AS (
  SELECT
    src.tenantId AS tenant_id,
    src.referenceNumber AS reference_number,
    src.documentType AS document_type,
    sd.segment2_value AS source_segment_2_value
  FROM source_base AS src
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(src.invoiceLines)) AS line_json WITH OFFSET AS line_offset
  LEFT JOIN subaccount_dim AS sd
    ON src.tenantId = sd.tenant_id
   AND COALESCE(
     JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.subaccountNumber'),
     CAST(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.subaccountId') AS INT64) AS STRING),
     JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccountId')
   ) = sd.subaccount_id
  WHERE COALESCE(
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.subaccountNumber'),
    CAST(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.subaccountId') AS INT64) AS STRING),
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccountId')
  ) IS NOT NULL
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY src.tenantId, src.referenceNumber, src.documentType
    ORDER BY SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.lineNumber') AS INT64), line_offset
  ) = 1
),

base AS (
  SELECT
    tenantId AS tenant_id,
    syncedAt AS synced_at,
    organizationName AS organization_name,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(businessUnitId, '$.id'), CAST(businessUnitId AS STRING)) AS source_business_unit_id,
    businessUnitName AS source_business_unit_name,

    referenceNumber AS reference_number,
    documentType AS document_type,
    status,

    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(customer, '$.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(customer, '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(customer, '$.acctCD'),
      customer
    ) AS customer_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(customer, '$.name'),
      JSON_VALUE(customer, '$.description')
    ) AS customer_name,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(branchNumber, '$.number'),
      branchNumber
    ) AS branch_id,
    COALESCE(
      currencyId,
      JSON_VALUE(currencyId, '$.id')
    ) AS currency_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(location, '$.locationId'),
      JSON_VALUE(location, '$.id'),
      location
    ) AS location_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(salesPerson, '$.salespersonID'),
      JSON_VALUE(salesPerson, '$.id'),
      CAST(salesPersonID AS STRING)
    ) AS sales_person_id,

    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(creditTerms, '$.id'), creditTerms) AS credit_terms_id,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(paymentMethod, '$.id'), paymentMethod) AS payment_method_id,
    paymentReference AS payment_reference,
    customerRefNumber AS customer_ref_number,
    externalReference AS external_reference,
    invoiceText AS invoice_text,

    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(project, '$.projectId'),
      JSON_VALUE(project, '$.id')
    ) AS project_id,

    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(documentDate AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(documentDate AS DATETIME)),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(documentDate AS TIMESTAMP))
    ) AS document_date,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(documentDueDate AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(documentDueDate AS DATETIME)),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(documentDueDate AS TIMESTAMP))
    ) AS document_due_date,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(cashDiscountDate AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(cashDiscountDate AS DATETIME)),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(cashDiscountDate AS TIMESTAMP))
    ) AS cash_discount_date,
    financialPeriod AS financial_period,
    postPeriod AS post_period,

    amountInCurrency AS amount_in_currency,
    amount AS amount,
    balanceInCurrency AS balance_in_currency,
    balance AS balance,
    vatTotalInCurrency AS vat_total_in_currency,
    vatTotal AS vat_total,
    cashDiscountInCurrency AS cash_discount_in_currency,
    cashDiscount AS cash_discount,
    discountTotalInCurrency AS discount_total_in_currency,
    discountTotal AS discount_total,
    detailTotalInCurrency AS detail_total_in_currency,
    detailTotal AS detail_total,
    roundingDiff AS rounding_diff,
    exchangeRate AS exchange_rate,

    SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) AS last_modified_at
  FROM source_base
),

enriched AS (
  SELECT
    b.*,
    lsa.source_segment_2_value,
    bm.business_unit_id AS mapped_business_unit_id,
    bm.business_unit_name AS mapped_business_unit_name,
    CASE
      WHEN bm.business_unit_id IS NULL THEN 'no_mapping'
      WHEN bm.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL AND lsa.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 'subaccount_segment2_match'
      WHEN bm.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 'segment_zero_match'
      ELSE 'tenant_default_match'
    END AS business_unit_match_rule,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY b.tenant_id, b.reference_number, b.document_type
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN bm.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
        bm.valid_from DESC
    ) AS bu_match_rank
  FROM base AS b
  LEFT JOIN line_subaccounts AS lsa
    ON b.tenant_id = lsa.tenant_id
   AND b.reference_number = lsa.reference_number
   AND b.document_type = lsa.document_type
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping AS bm
    ON b.tenant_id = bm.tenant_id
   AND b.document_date BETWEEN bm.valid_from AND bm.valid_to
   AND (
     bm.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR bm.source_segment_2_value = COALESCE(lsa.source_segment_2_value, '0')
   )
)

SELECT
  tenant_id,
  synced_at,
  organization_name,
  source_business_unit_id,
  source_business_unit_name,
  COALESCE(mapped_business_unit_id, source_business_unit_id) AS business_unit_id,
  COALESCE(mapped_business_unit_name, source_business_unit_name, organization_name) AS business_unit_name,
  source_segment_2_value,
  business_unit_match_rule,

  reference_number,
  document_type,
  status,
  customer_id,
  customer_name,
  branch_id,
  currency_id,
  location_id,
  sales_person_id,
  credit_terms_id,
  payment_method_id,
  payment_reference,
  customer_ref_number,
  external_reference,
  invoice_text,
  project_id,
  document_date,
  document_due_date,
  cash_discount_date,
  financial_period,
  post_period,
  amount_in_currency,
  amount,
  balance_in_currency,
  balance,
  vat_total_in_currency,
  vat_total,
  cash_discount_in_currency,
  cash_discount,
  discount_total_in_currency,
  discount_total,
  detail_total_in_currency,
  detail_total,
  rounding_diff,
  exchange_rate,
  last_modified_at
FROM enriched
WHERE bu_match_rank = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: Customer invoice headers with historized business unit mapping by document date and first line subaccount.

tables.query:
WITH subaccount_dim AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    subaccount_id,
    segment2 AS segment2_value
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.dim_subaccount`
),

business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

base AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_customer_invoices`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
),

line_base AS (
  SELECT
    base.tenantId AS tenant_id,
    base.syncedAt AS synced_at,
    base.organizationName AS organization_name,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(base.businessUnitId, '$.id'), CAST(base.businessUnitId AS STRING)) AS source_business_unit_id,
    base.businessUnitName AS source_business_unit_name,
    base.referenceNumber AS reference_number,
    base.documentType AS document_type,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(base.documentDate AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(base.documentDate AS DATETIME)),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(base.documentDate AS TIMESTAMP))
    ) AS document_date,

    CAST(COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.lineNumber'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.lineNbr')
    ) AS STRING) AS line_number,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.inventory.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.inventoryId')
    ) AS inventory_id,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.description') AS line_description,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.uOM'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.unitOfMeasure')
    ) AS unit_of_measure,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.salesPersonId'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.salesPerson.id'),
      CAST(base.salesPersonID AS STRING)
    ) AS sales_person_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.account.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.account.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.accountId')
    ) AS account_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.subaccountNumber'),
      CAST(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.subaccountId') AS INT64) AS STRING),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccountId')
    ) AS subaccount_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.branchNumber.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.branchId')
    ) AS branch_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.project.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.projectId'),
      JSON_VALUE(base.project, '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(base.project, '$.projectId')
    ) AS project_id,

    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.quantity'), JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.qty')) AS FLOAT64) AS quantity,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.unitPrice') AS FLOAT64) AS unit_price,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.amountInCurrency'), JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.curyTranAmt')) AS FLOAT64) AS amount_in_currency,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.amount'), JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.tranAmt')) AS FLOAT64) AS amount,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.discountPercent'), JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.discountPct')) AS FLOAT64) AS discount,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.discountAmountInCurrency'), JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.curyDiscAmt')) AS FLOAT64) AS discount_amount_in_currency,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.discountAmount'), JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.discAmt')) AS FLOAT64) AS discount_amount
  FROM base
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(base.invoiceLines)) AS line_json
),

enriched AS (
  SELECT
    l.*,
    sd.segment2_value AS source_segment_2_value,
    bm.business_unit_id AS mapped_business_unit_id,
    bm.business_unit_name AS mapped_business_unit_name,
    CASE
      WHEN bm.business_unit_id IS NULL THEN 'no_mapping'
      WHEN bm.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 'subaccount_segment2_match'
      ELSE 'tenant_default_match'
    END AS business_unit_match_rule,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY l.tenant_id, l.reference_number, l.document_type, l.line_number
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN bm.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
        bm.valid_from DESC
    ) AS bu_match_rank
  FROM line_base AS l
  LEFT JOIN subaccount_dim AS sd
    ON l.tenant_id = sd.tenant_id
   AND l.subaccount_id = sd.subaccount_id
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping AS bm
    ON l.tenant_id = bm.tenant_id
   AND l.document_date BETWEEN bm.valid_from AND bm.valid_to
   AND (
     bm.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR bm.source_segment_2_value = COALESCE(sd.segment2_value, '0')
   )
)

SELECT
  tenant_id,
  synced_at,
  organization_name,
  source_business_unit_id,
  source_business_unit_name,
  COALESCE(mapped_business_unit_id, source_business_unit_id) AS business_unit_id,
  COALESCE(mapped_business_unit_name, source_business_unit_name, organization_name) AS business_unit_name,
  source_segment_2_value,
  business_unit_match_rule,

  reference_number,
  document_type,
  line_number,
  inventory_id,
  line_description,
  unit_of_measure,
  sales_person_id,
  account_id,
  subaccount_id,
  branch_id,
  project_id,
  quantity,
  unit_price,
  amount_in_currency,
  amount,
  discount,
  discount_amount_in_currency,
  discount_amount
FROM enriched
WHERE bu_match_rank = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: Customer invoice lines with historized business unit mapping by document date and line subaccount.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Silver fact: Customer (AR) payments
-- Source: visma_customer_payments
-- Grain: one row per payment (tenant + refNbr)
-- NOTE: currency field is a plain STRING (unlike supplier_payments which
--       has a nested {id, description} object). No JSON extraction needed.
-- =============================================================================

WITH business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

source_data AS (
    SELECT
        tenantId                                        AS tenant_id,
        syncedAt                                        AS synced_at,
        organizationName                                AS organization_name,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS raw_business_unit_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS business_unit_id,
        -- Dimension FKs
        COALESCE(
          JSON_VALUE(customer, '$.number'),
          JSON_VALUE(customer, '$.id'),
          JSON_VALUE(customer, '$.acctCD'),
          CAST(customer AS STRING)
        )                                               AS customer_id,
        COALESCE(
          JSON_VALUE(customer, '$.name'),
          JSON_VALUE(customer, '$.description')
        )                                               AS customer_name,
        currency                                        AS currency_id,
        branch                                          AS branch_id,
        location,
        cashAccount                                     AS cash_account,
        paymentMethod                                   AS payment_method,

        -- Degenerate dimensions
        refNbr                                          AS ref_nbr,
        type                                            AS payment_type,
        status,
        COALESCE(
          SAFE_CAST(applicationDate AS DATE),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(applicationDate AS TIMESTAMP))
        )                                              AS application_date,
        applicationPeriod                               AS application_period,
        paymentRef                                      AS payment_ref,
        hold,

        -- Measures
        SAFE_CAST(paymentAmount AS NUMERIC)             AS payment_amount,
        SAFE_CAST(paymentAmountInCurrency AS NUMERIC)   AS payment_amount_in_currency,
        SAFE_CAST(availableBalance AS NUMERIC)          AS available_balance,
        SAFE_CAST(availableBalanceInCurrency AS NUMERIC) AS available_balance_in_currency,
        SAFE_CAST(writeOffAmount AS NUMERIC)            AS write_off_amount,
        SAFE_CAST(financeCharges AS NUMERIC)            AS finance_charges,
        SAFE_CAST(deductedCharges AS NUMERIC)           AS deducted_charges,

        -- Audit
        SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)    AS last_modified_at

    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_customer_payments`
    WHERE isDeleted = false OR isDeleted IS NULL
),
enriched AS (
  SELECT
    source_data.*,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id AS mapped_bu_id,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_name AS mapped_bu_name,
    CASE
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL
       AND business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = '0' THEN 'segment_zero_match'
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'tenant_default_match'
      ELSE 'unresolved'
    END AS business_unit_resolution_method,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY source_data.tenant_id, source_data.ref_nbr
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
        business_unit_mapping.valid_from DESC
    ) AS bu_match_rank
  FROM source_data
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping
    ON source_data.tenant_id = business_unit_mapping.tenant_id
   AND source_data.application_date BETWEEN business_unit_mapping.valid_from AND business_unit_mapping.valid_to
   AND (
     business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = '0'
   )
)
SELECT
  enriched.* EXCEPT (business_unit_id, mapped_bu_id, mapped_bu_name, bu_match_rank),
  COALESCE(enriched.mapped_bu_id, enriched.business_unit_id) AS business_unit_id,
  enriched.mapped_bu_name AS business_unit_name
FROM enriched
WHERE bu_match_rank = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Customer (AR) payment documents from Visma. Grain: one row per payment (tenant + refNbr).

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Silver fact: Fixed asset transactions (acquisition, depreciation, disposal)
-- Source: visma_fixed_asset_transactions
-- Grain: one row per transaction (tenant + refNo + lineNo)
-- Why: Maps to Power BI fctFixedAssetTransaction. Tracks asset lifecycle
--      for depreciation schedules and balance sheet fixed asset values.
-- =============================================================================

WITH business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

source_data AS (
    SELECT
        tenantId                                        AS tenant_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS raw_business_unit_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS business_unit_id,
        assetID                                         AS asset_id,
        branchID                                        AS branch_id,
        bookID                                          AS book_id,
        refNo                                           AS ref_no,
        lineNo                                          AS line_no,
        batchNo                                         AS batch_no,
        transactionType                                 AS transaction_type,
        COALESCE(
          SAFE_CAST(transactionDate AS DATE),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(transactionDate AS DATETIME)),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(transactionDate AS TIMESTAMP))
        )                                               AS transaction_date,
        transactionPeriodID                             AS transaction_period_id,
        transactionDescription                          AS transaction_description,
        origin,
        register,
        accounts,
        SAFE_CAST(transactionAmount AS NUMERIC)         AS transaction_amount,
        SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)    AS last_modified_at

    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_fixed_asset_transactions`
    WHERE isDeleted = false OR isDeleted IS NULL
),
enriched AS (
  SELECT
    source_data.*,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id AS mapped_bu_id,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_name AS mapped_bu_name,
    CASE
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL
       AND business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = '0' THEN 'segment_zero_match'
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'tenant_default_match'
      ELSE 'unresolved'
    END AS business_unit_resolution_method,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY source_data.tenant_id, source_data.ref_no, source_data.line_no
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
        business_unit_mapping.valid_from DESC
    ) AS bu_match_rank
  FROM source_data
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping
    ON source_data.tenant_id = business_unit_mapping.tenant_id
   AND source_data.transaction_date BETWEEN business_unit_mapping.valid_from AND business_unit_mapping.valid_to
   AND (
     business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = '0'
   )
)
SELECT
  enriched.* EXCEPT (business_unit_id, mapped_bu_id, mapped_bu_name, bu_match_rank),
  COALESCE(enriched.mapped_bu_id, enriched.business_unit_id) AS business_unit_id,
  enriched.mapped_bu_name AS business_unit_name
FROM enriched
WHERE bu_match_rank = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Fixed asset lifecycle events from Visma. Grain: one row per transaction (tenant + refNo + lineNo).

tables.query:
WITH subaccount_dim AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    subaccount_id,
    subaccount_number,
    segment2 AS segment2_value,
    segment3 AS department_code
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.dim_subaccount`
),

business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

customer_document_project_map AS (
  SELECT
    tenantId AS tenant_id,
    referenceNumber AS ref_number,
    ANY_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(project, '$.id')) AS project_id
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_customer_documents`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
    AND JSON_VALUE(project, '$.id') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1, 2
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT JSON_VALUE(project, '$.id')) = 1
),

base AS (
  SELECT
    tenantId AS tenant_id,
    syncedAt AS synced_at,
    organizationName AS organization_name,

    batchNumber AS batch_number,
    refNumber AS ref_number,
    CAST(lineNumber AS STRING) AS line_number,

    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(account, '$.number'), CAST(account AS STRING)) AS account_cd,
    JSON_VALUE(account, '$.type') AS account_type,
    subaccount AS subaccount_id,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(branch, '$.number'), CAST(branch AS STRING)) AS branch_id,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(ledger, '$.id'), CAST(ledger AS STRING)) AS ledger,
    currency AS currency_id,
    module,

    COALESCE(
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(tranDate AS DATETIME)),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(tranDate AS TIMESTAMP)),
      SAFE.PARSE_DATE('%Y%m', period)
    ) AS transaction_date,
    period AS financial_period,

    description,

    debitAmount AS debit_amount,
    creditAmount AS credit_amount,
    begBalance AS beginning_balance,
    endingBalance AS ending_balance,

    currDebitAmount AS debit_amount_currency,
    currCreditAmount AS credit_amount_currency,
    currBegBalance AS beginning_balance_currency,
    currEndingBalance AS ending_balance_currency,

    SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) AS last_modified_at
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_general_ledger_transactions`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
),

enriched AS (
  SELECT
    b.*,
    cdp.project_id,
    sd.segment2_value AS source_segment_2_value,
    sd.department_code AS department_code,
    bm.business_unit_id AS mapped_business_unit_id,
    bm.business_unit_name AS mapped_business_unit_name,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY b.tenant_id, b.batch_number, b.ref_number, b.line_number
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN bm.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
        bm.valid_from DESC
    ) AS bu_match_rank
  FROM base AS b
  LEFT JOIN customer_document_project_map AS cdp
    ON b.module = 'AR'
   AND b.tenant_id = cdp.tenant_id
   AND b.ref_number = cdp.ref_number
  LEFT JOIN subaccount_dim AS sd
    ON b.tenant_id = sd.tenant_id
   AND (b.subaccount_id = sd.subaccount_id OR b.subaccount_id = sd.subaccount_number)
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping AS bm
    ON b.tenant_id = bm.tenant_id
   AND b.transaction_date BETWEEN bm.valid_from AND bm.valid_to
   AND (
     bm.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR bm.source_segment_2_value = COALESCE(sd.segment2_value, '0')
   )
)

SELECT
  tenant_id,
  synced_at,
  organization_name,
  COALESCE(mapped_business_unit_id, CONCAT(tenant_id, '|UNMAPPED')) AS business_unit_id,
  COALESCE(mapped_business_unit_name, organization_name) AS business_unit_name,

  batch_number,
  ref_number,
  line_number,

  account_cd,
  account_cd AS account_id,
  account_type,
  subaccount_id,
  branch_id,
  ledger,
  currency_id,
  module,

  -- Department link: resolved via subaccount join (tenant_id + subaccount_id);
  -- department_code = dim_subaccount.segment3. department_key is computed with
  -- the SAME FARM_FINGERPRINT formula as dim_department, so it joins 1:1 to it.
  department_code AS department_id,
  CASE
    WHEN department_code IS NOT NULL THEN
      FARM_FINGERPRINT(CONCAT(
        CAST(tenant_id AS STRING), '|',
        CAST(department_code AS STRING)
      ))
    ELSE NULL
  END AS department_key,

  transaction_date,
  financial_period,
  description,
  project_id,

  debit_amount,
  credit_amount,
  beginning_balance,
  ending_balance,

  debit_amount_currency,
  credit_amount_currency,
  beginning_balance_currency,
  ending_balance_currency,

  last_modified_at
FROM enriched
WHERE bu_match_rank = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: Flat general ledger transaction lines with historized business unit mapping by accounting date.

tables.query:
WITH subaccount_dim AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    subaccount_id,
    subaccount_number,
    segment2 AS segment2_value
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.dim_subaccount`
),

business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

base AS (
  SELECT
    tenantId AS tenant_id,
    syncedAt AS synced_at,
    organizationName AS organization_name,

    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(account, '$.number'), CAST(account AS STRING)) AS account_cd,
    JSON_VALUE(account, '$.type') AS account_type,
    CAST(subaccountId AS STRING) AS subaccount_id,
    subAccountCd AS subaccount_cd,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(branch, '$.number'), CAST(branch AS STRING)) AS branch_id,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(ledger, '$.id'), CAST(ledger AS STRING)) AS ledger,
    currencyId AS currency_id,
    balanceType AS balance_type,

    financialPeriod AS financial_period,
    SAFE.PARSE_DATE('%Y%m', financialPeriod) AS accounting_period_date,
    yearClosed AS year_closed,

    beginningBalance AS beginning_balance,
    periodToDateDebit AS ptd_debit,
    periodToDateCredit AS ptd_credit,
    yearToDateBalance AS ytd_balance,

    beginningBalanceInCurrency AS beginning_balance_currency,
    periodToDateDebitInCurrency AS ptd_debit_currency,
    periodToDateCreditInCurrency AS ptd_credit_currency,
    yearToDateBalanceInCurrency AS ytd_balance_currency,

    SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) AS last_modified_at
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_general_ledger_balances_v2`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
),

enriched AS (
  SELECT
    b.*,
    sd.segment2_value AS source_segment_2_value,
    bm.business_unit_id AS mapped_business_unit_id,
    bm.business_unit_name AS mapped_business_unit_name,
    CASE
      WHEN bm.business_unit_id IS NULL THEN 'no_mapping'
      WHEN bm.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 'subaccount_segment2_match'
      ELSE 'tenant_default_match'
    END AS business_unit_match_rule,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY b.tenant_id, b.account_cd, b.subaccount_id, b.branch_id, b.ledger, b.financial_period, b.currency_id
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN bm.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
        bm.valid_from DESC
    ) AS bu_match_rank
  FROM base AS b
  LEFT JOIN subaccount_dim AS sd
    ON b.tenant_id = sd.tenant_id
   AND (b.subaccount_id = sd.subaccount_id OR b.subaccount_cd = sd.subaccount_number)
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping AS bm
    ON b.tenant_id = bm.tenant_id
   AND b.accounting_period_date BETWEEN bm.valid_from AND bm.valid_to
   AND (
     bm.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR bm.source_segment_2_value = COALESCE(sd.segment2_value, '0')
   )
)

SELECT
  tenant_id,
  synced_at,
  organization_name,
  COALESCE(mapped_business_unit_id, CONCAT(tenant_id, '|UNMAPPED')) AS business_unit_id,
  COALESCE(mapped_business_unit_name, organization_name) AS business_unit_name,

  account_cd,
  account_cd AS account_id,
  account_type,
  subaccount_id,
  subaccount_cd,
  branch_id,
  ledger,
  currency_id,
  balance_type,

  financial_period,
  year_closed,

  beginning_balance,
  ptd_debit,
  ptd_credit,
  ytd_balance,

  beginning_balance_currency,
  ptd_debit_currency,
  ptd_credit_currency,
  ytd_balance_currency,

  last_modified_at
FROM enriched
WHERE bu_match_rank = 1
