tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Silver fact: Inventory movement headers (adjustments, issues, receipts, transfers)
-- Sources:
--   visma_inventory_adjustments  (movement_type = 'ADJUSTMENT')
--   visma_inventory_issues       (movement_type = 'ISSUE')
--   visma_inventory_receipts     (movement_type = 'RECEIPT')
--   visma_inventory_transfers    (movement_type = 'TRANSFER')
-- Grain: one row per movement header (tenant + movement_type + reference_number)
-- =============================================================================

WITH business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

source_data AS (
    -- Adjustments
    SELECT
        tenantId                                        AS tenant_id,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS raw_business_unit_id,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS business_unit_id,
        'ADJUSTMENT'                                    AS movement_type,
        referenceNumber                                 AS reference_number,
        batchNumber                                     AS batch_number,
        branchNumber                                    AS branch_number,
        COALESCE(
          SAFE_CAST(date AS DATE),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(date AS DATETIME)),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(date AS TIMESTAMP))
        )                                               AS date,
        status,
        postPeriod                                      AS post_period,
        description,
        SAFE_CAST(totalQuantity AS NUMERIC)             AS total_quantity,
        SAFE_CAST(totalCost AS NUMERIC)                 AS total_amount,
        CAST(NULL AS NUMERIC)                           AS control_quantity,
        CAST(NULL AS BOOL)                              AS is_hold,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS source_warehouse_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS source_warehouse_name,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS destination_warehouse_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS destination_warehouse_name,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS attachments_raw,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS metadata_raw,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS source_timestamp_raw,
        SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)    AS last_modified_at
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_inventory_adjustments`
    WHERE isDeleted = false OR isDeleted IS NULL

    UNION ALL

    -- Issues
    SELECT
        tenantId                                        AS tenant_id,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS raw_business_unit_id,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS business_unit_id,
        'ISSUE'                                         AS movement_type,
        referenceNumber                                 AS reference_number,
        batchNumber                                     AS batch_number,
        branchNumber                                    AS branch_number,
        COALESCE(
          SAFE_CAST(date AS DATE),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(date AS DATETIME)),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(date AS TIMESTAMP))
        )                                               AS date,
        status,
        postPeriod                                      AS post_period,
        description,
        SAFE_CAST(totalQuantity AS NUMERIC)             AS total_quantity,
        SAFE_CAST(totalAmount AS NUMERIC)               AS total_amount,
        CAST(NULL AS NUMERIC)                           AS control_quantity,
        CAST(NULL AS BOOL)                              AS is_hold,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS source_warehouse_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS source_warehouse_name,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS destination_warehouse_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS destination_warehouse_name,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS attachments_raw,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS metadata_raw,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS source_timestamp_raw,
        SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)    AS last_modified_at
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_inventory_issues`
    WHERE isDeleted = false OR isDeleted IS NULL

    UNION ALL

    -- Receipts
    SELECT
        tenantId                                        AS tenant_id,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS raw_business_unit_id,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS business_unit_id,
        'RECEIPT'                                       AS movement_type,
        referenceNumber                                 AS reference_number,
        batchNumber                                     AS batch_number,
        branchNumber                                    AS branch_number,
        COALESCE(
          SAFE_CAST(date AS DATE),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(date AS DATETIME)),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(date AS TIMESTAMP))
        )                                               AS date,
        status,
        postPeriod                                      AS post_period,
        description,
        SAFE_CAST(totalQuantity AS NUMERIC)             AS total_quantity,
        SAFE_CAST(totalCost AS NUMERIC)                 AS total_amount,
        CAST(NULL AS NUMERIC)                           AS control_quantity,
        CAST(NULL AS BOOL)                              AS is_hold,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS source_warehouse_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS source_warehouse_name,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS destination_warehouse_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS destination_warehouse_name,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS attachments_raw,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS metadata_raw,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS source_timestamp_raw,
        SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)    AS last_modified_at
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_inventory_receipts`
    WHERE isDeleted = false OR isDeleted IS NULL

    UNION ALL

    -- Transfers
    SELECT
        tenantId                                        AS tenant_id,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS raw_business_unit_id,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS business_unit_id,
        'TRANSFER'                                      AS movement_type,
        referenceNumber                                 AS reference_number,
        batchNumber                                     AS batch_number,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS branch_number,
        COALESCE(
          SAFE_CAST(date AS DATE),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(date AS DATETIME)),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(date AS TIMESTAMP))
        )                                               AS date,
        status,
        postPeriod                                      AS post_period,
        description,
        SAFE_CAST(totalQuantity AS NUMERIC)             AS total_quantity,
        CAST(NULL AS NUMERIC)                           AS total_amount,
        SAFE_CAST(controlQuantity AS NUMERIC)           AS control_quantity,
        hold                                            AS is_hold,
        JSON_VALUE(warehouse, '$.id')                   AS source_warehouse_id,
        JSON_VALUE(warehouse, '$.description')          AS source_warehouse_name,
        JSON_VALUE(toWarehouse, '$.id')                 AS destination_warehouse_id,
        JSON_VALUE(toWarehouse, '$.description')        AS destination_warehouse_name,
        attachments                                     AS attachments_raw,
        metadata                                        AS metadata_raw,
        `timestamp`                                     AS source_timestamp_raw,
        SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)    AS last_modified_at
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_inventory_transfers`
    WHERE isDeleted = false OR isDeleted IS NULL
),
enriched AS (
  SELECT
    source_data.*,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id AS mapped_bu_id,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_name AS mapped_bu_name,
    CASE
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL
       AND business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = '0' THEN 'segment_zero_match'
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'tenant_default_match'
      ELSE 'unresolved'
    END AS business_unit_resolution_method,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY source_data.tenant_id, source_data.movement_type, source_data.reference_number
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
        business_unit_mapping.valid_from DESC,
        source_data.last_modified_at DESC
    ) AS bu_match_rank
  FROM source_data
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping
    ON source_data.tenant_id = business_unit_mapping.tenant_id
   AND source_data.date BETWEEN business_unit_mapping.valid_from AND business_unit_mapping.valid_to
   AND (
     business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = '0'
   )
)
SELECT
  enriched.* EXCEPT (business_unit_id, mapped_bu_id, mapped_bu_name, bu_match_rank),
  COALESCE(enriched.mapped_bu_id, enriched.business_unit_id) AS business_unit_id,
  enriched.mapped_bu_name AS business_unit_name
FROM enriched
WHERE bu_match_rank = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Inventory movement headers (adjustments, issues, receipts, transfers) from Visma. Grain: one row per movement header (tenant + movement_type + reference_number).

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Silver fact: Inventory movement lines (flattened from JSON arrays)
-- Sources:
--   visma_inventory_adjustments  → adjusmentLines (JSON string)
--   visma_inventory_issues       → issueLines (JSON string)
--   visma_inventory_receipts     → receiptLines (JSON string)
--   visma_inventory_transfers    → transferLines (JSON string)
-- Grain: one row per movement line (tenant + movement_type + reference_number + line_number)
--
-- NOTE: "adjusmentLines" is intentionally misspelled to match the source schema.
-- =============================================================================

WITH business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

source_data AS (
    -- Adjustment lines
    SELECT
        h.tenantId                                                  AS tenant_id,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS raw_business_unit_id,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS business_unit_id,
        'ADJUSTMENT'                                                AS movement_type,
        h.referenceNumber                                           AS reference_number,
        COALESCE(
          SAFE_CAST(h.date AS DATE),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(h.date AS DATETIME)),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(h.date AS TIMESTAMP))
        )                                                           AS movement_date,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineNumber'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineNbr'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.sortOrder')) AS line_number,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."inventory.id"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory'), '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventoryId')) AS inventory_id,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory.description'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."inventory.description"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory'), '$.description')) AS inventory_description,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.warehouse.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."warehouse.id"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.warehouse'), '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.warehouse')) AS warehouse_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS destination_warehouse_id,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."location.id"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location'), '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location')) AS location_id,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location.name'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."location.name"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location'), '$.name')) AS location_name,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS to_location_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS to_location_name,
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.description')                           AS line_description,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.uoM'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.uom'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.unitOfMeasure')) AS unit_of_measure,
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lotSerialNumber')                       AS lot_serial_number,
        SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.quantity') AS NUMERIC)        AS quantity,
        SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.unitCost') AS NUMERIC)        AS unit_cost,
        SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.amount') AS NUMERIC)          AS amount,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS allocations_raw,
        CAST(NULL AS INT64)                                         AS allocation_count,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS reason_code_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS reason_code_description
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_inventory_adjustments` AS h
    CROSS JOIN UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(h.adjusmentLines)) AS line
    WHERE h.isDeleted = false OR h.isDeleted IS NULL

    UNION ALL

    -- Issue lines
    SELECT
        h.tenantId                                                  AS tenant_id,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS raw_business_unit_id,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS business_unit_id,
        'ISSUE'                                                     AS movement_type,
        h.referenceNumber                                           AS reference_number,
        COALESCE(
          SAFE_CAST(h.date AS DATE),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(h.date AS DATETIME)),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(h.date AS TIMESTAMP))
        )                                                           AS movement_date,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineNumber'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineNbr'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.sortOrder')) AS line_number,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."inventory.id"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory'), '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventoryId')) AS inventory_id,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory.description'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."inventory.description"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory'), '$.description')) AS inventory_description,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.warehouse.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."warehouse.id"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.warehouse'), '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.warehouse')) AS warehouse_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS destination_warehouse_id,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."location.id"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location'), '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location')) AS location_id,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location.name'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."location.name"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location'), '$.name')) AS location_name,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS to_location_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS to_location_name,
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.description')                           AS line_description,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.uoM'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.uom'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.unitOfMeasure')) AS unit_of_measure,
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lotSerialNumber')                       AS lot_serial_number,
        SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.quantity') AS NUMERIC)        AS quantity,
        SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.unitCost') AS NUMERIC)        AS unit_cost,
        SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.amount') AS NUMERIC)          AS amount,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS allocations_raw,
        CAST(NULL AS INT64)                                         AS allocation_count,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS reason_code_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS reason_code_description
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_inventory_issues` AS h
    CROSS JOIN UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(h.issueLines)) AS line
    WHERE h.isDeleted = false OR h.isDeleted IS NULL

    UNION ALL

    -- Receipt lines
    SELECT
        h.tenantId                                                  AS tenant_id,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS raw_business_unit_id,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS business_unit_id,
        'RECEIPT'                                                   AS movement_type,
        h.referenceNumber                                           AS reference_number,
        COALESCE(
          SAFE_CAST(h.date AS DATE),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(h.date AS DATETIME)),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(h.date AS TIMESTAMP))
        )                                                           AS movement_date,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineNumber'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineNbr'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.sortOrder')) AS line_number,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."inventory.id"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory'), '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventoryId')) AS inventory_id,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory.description'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."inventory.description"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory'), '$.description')) AS inventory_description,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.warehouse.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."warehouse.id"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.warehouse'), '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.warehouse')) AS warehouse_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS destination_warehouse_id,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."location.id"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location'), '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location')) AS location_id,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location.name'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."location.name"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location'), '$.name')) AS location_name,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS to_location_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS to_location_name,
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.description')                           AS line_description,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.uoM'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.uom'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.unitOfMeasure')) AS unit_of_measure,
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lotSerialNumber')                       AS lot_serial_number,
        SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.quantity') AS NUMERIC)        AS quantity,
        SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.unitCost') AS NUMERIC)        AS unit_cost,
        SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.amount') AS NUMERIC)          AS amount,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS allocations_raw,
        CAST(NULL AS INT64)                                         AS allocation_count,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS reason_code_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS reason_code_description
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_inventory_receipts` AS h
    CROSS JOIN UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(h.receiptLines)) AS line
    WHERE h.isDeleted = false OR h.isDeleted IS NULL

    UNION ALL

    -- Transfer lines
    SELECT
        h.tenantId                                                  AS tenant_id,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS raw_business_unit_id,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                        AS business_unit_id,
        'TRANSFER'                                                  AS movement_type,
        h.referenceNumber                                           AS reference_number,
        COALESCE(
          SAFE_CAST(h.date AS DATE),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(h.date AS DATETIME)),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(h.date AS TIMESTAMP))
        )                                                           AS movement_date,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineNumber'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineNbr'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.sortOrder')) AS line_number,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventoryItem.number'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventoryItem'), '$.number'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventoryId')) AS inventory_id,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventoryItem.description'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventoryItem'), '$.description')) AS inventory_description,
        JSON_VALUE(h.warehouse, '$.id')                             AS warehouse_id,
        JSON_VALUE(h.toWarehouse, '$.id')                           AS destination_warehouse_id,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location.id'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location'), '$.id')) AS location_id,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location.name'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location'), '$.name')) AS location_name,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.toLocation.id'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.toLocation'), '$.id')) AS to_location_id,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.toLocation.name'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.toLocation'), '$.name')) AS to_location_name,
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.description')                           AS line_description,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.uoM'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.uom'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.unitOfMeasure')) AS unit_of_measure,
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lotSerialNumber')                       AS lot_serial_number,
        SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.quantity') AS NUMERIC)        AS quantity,
        CAST(NULL AS NUMERIC)                                       AS unit_cost,
        CAST(NULL AS NUMERIC)                                       AS amount,
        JSON_QUERY(line, '$.allocations')                           AS allocations_raw,
        ARRAY_LENGTH(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(line, '$.allocations'))       AS allocation_count,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.reasonCode.id'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.reasonCode'), '$.id')) AS reason_code_id,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.reasonCode.description'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.reasonCode'), '$.description')) AS reason_code_description
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_inventory_transfers` AS h
    CROSS JOIN UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(h.transferLines)) AS line
    WHERE h.isDeleted = false OR h.isDeleted IS NULL
),
enriched AS (
  SELECT
    source_data.*,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id AS mapped_bu_id,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_name AS mapped_bu_name,
    CASE
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL
       AND business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = '0' THEN 'segment_zero_match'
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'tenant_default_match'
      ELSE 'unresolved'
    END AS business_unit_resolution_method,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY source_data.tenant_id, source_data.movement_type, source_data.reference_number, source_data.line_number, source_data.inventory_id
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
        business_unit_mapping.valid_from DESC,
        COALESCE(source_data.amount, 0) DESC,
        COALESCE(source_data.quantity, 0) DESC
    ) AS bu_match_rank
  FROM source_data
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping
    ON source_data.tenant_id = business_unit_mapping.tenant_id
   AND source_data.movement_date BETWEEN business_unit_mapping.valid_from AND business_unit_mapping.valid_to
   AND (
     business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = '0'
   )
)
SELECT
  enriched.* EXCEPT (business_unit_id, mapped_bu_id, mapped_bu_name, bu_match_rank),
  COALESCE(enriched.mapped_bu_id, enriched.business_unit_id) AS business_unit_id,
  enriched.mapped_bu_name AS business_unit_name
FROM enriched
WHERE bu_match_rank = 1
