tables.query:
WITH source_base AS (
  SELECT * EXCEPT (rn)
  FROM (
    SELECT
      src.*,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY src.tenantId, src.module, src.refNbr
        ORDER BY
          COALESCE(src.refreshedAt, src.syncedAt) DESC,
          COALESCE(src.firstSyncedAt, src.syncedAt) DESC,
          src.syncedAt DESC
      ) AS rn
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_project_transactions` AS src
    WHERE src.isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
  )
  WHERE rn = 1
),

line_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    module,
    reference_number,
    COUNT(*) AS line_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT project_id) AS project_count,
    CASE
      WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT project_id) = 1 THEN ANY_VALUE(project_id)
    END AS project_id,
    CASE
      WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT project_id) = 1 THEN ANY_VALUE(project_name)
    END AS project_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT project_task_id) AS project_task_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT business_unit_id) AS business_unit_count,
    CASE
      WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT business_unit_id) = 1 THEN ANY_VALUE(business_unit_id)
    END AS business_unit_id,
    CASE
      WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT business_unit_name) = 1 THEN ANY_VALUE(business_unit_name)
    END AS business_unit_name,
    MIN(transaction_date) AS min_transaction_date,
    MAX(transaction_date) AS max_transaction_date,
    SUM(COALESCE(amount, 0)) AS total_amount,
    SUM(COALESCE(quantity, 0)) AS total_quantity,
    COUNTIF(is_billable) AS billable_line_count,
    COUNTIF(is_released) AS released_line_count,
    COUNTIF(is_allocated) AS allocated_line_count
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_project_transaction_line`
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
)

SELECT
  src.tenantId AS tenant_id,
  src.syncedAt AS synced_at,
  src.organizationName AS organization_name,
  COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.businessUnitId, '$.id'), CAST(src.businessUnitId AS STRING)) AS source_business_unit_id,
  src.businessUnitName AS source_business_unit_name,
  COALESCE(lm.business_unit_id, COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.businessUnitId, '$.id'), CAST(src.businessUnitId AS STRING))) AS business_unit_id,
  COALESCE(lm.business_unit_name, src.businessUnitName, src.organizationName) AS business_unit_name,
  CASE
    WHEN lm.business_unit_count = 1 THEN 'single_line_business_unit'
    WHEN lm.business_unit_count > 1 THEN 'mixed_line_business_units'
    WHEN COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.businessUnitId, '$.id'), CAST(src.businessUnitId AS STRING)) IS NOT NULL THEN 'source_header_business_unit'
    ELSE 'unmapped'
  END AS business_unit_match_rule,

  src.refNbr AS reference_number,
  src.module,
  src.status,
  src.description AS description,
  lm.line_count,
  lm.project_count,
  lm.project_id,
  lm.project_name,
  lm.project_task_count,
  lm.min_transaction_date,
  lm.max_transaction_date,
  lm.total_amount,
  lm.total_quantity,
  lm.billable_line_count,
  lm.released_line_count,
  lm.allocated_line_count,
  SAFE_CAST(src.refreshedAt AS TIMESTAMP) AS refreshed_at,
  SAFE_CAST(src.firstSyncedAt AS TIMESTAMP) AS first_synced_at
FROM source_base AS src
LEFT JOIN line_metrics AS lm
  ON src.tenantId = lm.tenant_id
 AND src.module = lm.module
 AND src.refNbr = lm.reference_number

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: Project transaction document headers sourced from visma_project_transactions and enriched with line-level aggregates.

tables.query:
WITH subaccount_dim AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    subaccount_id,
    subaccount_number,
    segment2 AS segment2_value
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.dim_subaccount`
),

business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

source_base AS (
  SELECT * EXCEPT (rn)
  FROM (
    SELECT
      src.*,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY src.tenantId, src.module, src.refNbr
        ORDER BY
          COALESCE(src.refreshedAt, src.syncedAt) DESC,
          COALESCE(src.firstSyncedAt, src.syncedAt) DESC,
          src.syncedAt DESC
      ) AS rn
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_project_transactions` AS src
    WHERE src.isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
  )
  WHERE rn = 1
),

line_base AS (
  SELECT
    src.tenantId AS tenant_id,
    src.syncedAt AS synced_at,
    src.organizationName AS organization_name,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.businessUnitId, '$.id'), CAST(src.businessUnitId AS STRING)) AS source_business_unit_id,
    src.businessUnitName AS source_business_unit_name,
    src.refNbr AS reference_number,
    src.module,
    src.status,
    src.description AS header_description,

    CAST(line_offset + 1 AS STRING) AS line_number,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.tranId') AS INT64) AS tran_id,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.date') AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.date') AS DATETIME)),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.date') AS TIMESTAMP))
    ) AS transaction_date,
    TRIM(COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.inventoryId.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.inventory.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.inventoryItem.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.inventoryId')
    )) AS inventory_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.inventoryId.description'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.inventory.description'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.inventoryItem.description')
    ) AS inventory_description,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.description') AS line_description,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.uom'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.uoM'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.unitOfMeasure')
    ) AS unit_of_measure,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.quantity') AS NUMERIC) AS quantity,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.unitRate') AS NUMERIC) AS unit_rate,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.amount') AS NUMERIC) AS amount,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.billable') AS BOOL) AS is_billable,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.released') AS BOOL) AS is_released,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.allocated') AS BOOL) AS is_allocated,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.billableQuantity') AS NUMERIC) AS billable_quantity,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.financialPeriod') AS financial_period,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.batchNbr') AS batch_number,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.useBillableQty') AS BOOL) AS use_billable_quantity,
    CASE
      WHEN STARTS_WITH(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.startDate'), ''), '0001-01-01') THEN NULL
      ELSE COALESCE(
        SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.startDate') AS DATE),
        DATE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.startDate') AS DATETIME)),
        DATE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.startDate') AS TIMESTAMP))
      )
    END AS start_date,
    CASE
      WHEN STARTS_WITH(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.endDate'), ''), '0001-01-01') THEN NULL
      ELSE COALESCE(
        SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.endDate') AS DATE),
        DATE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.endDate') AS DATETIME)),
        DATE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.endDate') AS TIMESTAMP))
      )
    END AS end_date,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.lastModifiedDateTime') AS TIMESTAMP) AS line_last_modified_at,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.overtimeMultiplier') AS NUMERIC) AS overtime_multiplier,

    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.project.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.project.projectId')
    ) AS project_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.project.description'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.project.name')
    ) AS project_name,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.projectTask.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.projectTask.taskId')
    ) AS project_task_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.projectTask.description'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.projectTask.name')
    ) AS project_task_name,

    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.debitAccount.type') AS debit_account_type,
    TRIM(COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.debitAccount.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.debitAccount.id')
    )) AS debit_account_cd,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.debitAccount.description') AS debit_account_description,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.debitSubaccount.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.debitSubaccount.subaccountNumber')
    ) AS debit_subaccount_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.branch.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.branch.id')
    ) AS branch_id,

    TRIM(COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.customerVendor.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.customerVendor.id')
    )) AS customer_vendor_id,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.customerVendor.name') AS customer_vendor_name,
    TRIM(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.accountGroup.number')) AS account_group_number,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.accountGroup.name') AS account_group_name,
    TRIM(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.debitAccountGroup.number')) AS debit_account_group_number,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.debitAccountGroup.name') AS debit_account_group_name
  FROM source_base AS src
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(src.lines)) AS line_json WITH OFFSET AS line_offset
),

enriched AS (
  SELECT
    l.*,
    sd.segment2_value AS source_segment_2_value,
    bm.business_unit_id AS mapped_business_unit_id,
    bm.business_unit_name AS mapped_business_unit_name,
    CASE
      WHEN bm.business_unit_id IS NULL THEN 'no_mapping'
      WHEN bm.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 'subaccount_segment2_match'
      ELSE 'tenant_default_match'
    END AS business_unit_match_rule,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY l.tenant_id, l.module, l.reference_number, COALESCE(CAST(l.tran_id AS STRING), l.line_number)
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN bm.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
        bm.valid_from DESC,
        l.line_last_modified_at DESC
    ) AS bu_match_rank
  FROM line_base AS l
  LEFT JOIN subaccount_dim AS sd
    ON l.tenant_id = sd.tenant_id
   AND (
     l.debit_subaccount_id = sd.subaccount_id
     OR l.debit_subaccount_id = sd.subaccount_number
   )
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping AS bm
    ON l.tenant_id = bm.tenant_id
   AND l.transaction_date BETWEEN bm.valid_from AND bm.valid_to
   AND (
     bm.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR bm.source_segment_2_value = COALESCE(sd.segment2_value, '0')
   )
)

SELECT
  tenant_id,
  synced_at,
  organization_name,
  source_business_unit_id,
  source_business_unit_name,
  COALESCE(mapped_business_unit_id, source_business_unit_id) AS business_unit_id,
  COALESCE(mapped_business_unit_name, source_business_unit_name, organization_name) AS business_unit_name,
  source_segment_2_value,
  business_unit_match_rule,

  reference_number,
  module,
  status,
  header_description,
  line_number,
  tran_id,
  transaction_date,
  inventory_id,
  inventory_description,
  line_description,
  unit_of_measure,
  quantity,
  unit_rate,
  amount,
  is_billable,
  is_released,
  is_allocated,
  billable_quantity,
  financial_period,
  batch_number,
  use_billable_quantity,
  start_date,
  end_date,
  line_last_modified_at,
  overtime_multiplier,
  project_id,
  project_name,
  project_task_id,
  project_task_name,
  debit_account_type,
  debit_account_cd,
  debit_account_description,
  debit_subaccount_id,
  branch_id,
  customer_vendor_id,
  customer_vendor_name,
  account_group_number,
  account_group_name,
  debit_account_group_number,
  debit_account_group_name
FROM enriched
WHERE bu_match_rank = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: Project transaction lines flattened from visma_project_transactions. Grain: one row per tenant + module + reference_number + tran_id.

tables.query:
WITH subaccount_dim AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    subaccount_id,
    segment2 AS segment2_value
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.dim_subaccount`
),

business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

source_base AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_purchase_orders`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
),

representative_line_subaccounts AS (
  SELECT
    src.tenantId AS tenant_id,
    src.orderNbr AS order_nbr,
    src.orderType AS order_type,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.sub.segments[1].segmentValue'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.segments[1].segmentValue'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.2'),
      sd.segment2_value
    ) AS source_segment_2_value
  FROM source_base AS src
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(src.lines)) AS line_json WITH OFFSET AS line_offset
  LEFT JOIN subaccount_dim AS sd
    ON src.tenantId = sd.tenant_id
   AND COALESCE(
     JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.sub.subaccountNumber'),
     CAST(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.sub.subaccountId') AS INT64) AS STRING),
     JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.sub'), '$.subaccountNumber'),
     JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.subaccountNumber'),
     CAST(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.subaccountId') AS INT64) AS STRING),
     JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccountId'),
     JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount')
   ) = sd.subaccount_id
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY src.tenantId, src.orderType, src.orderNbr
    ORDER BY SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.lineNbr') AS INT64), line_offset
  ) = 1
),

base AS (
  SELECT
    src.tenantId AS tenant_id,
    src.syncedAt AS synced_at,
    src.organizationName AS organization_name,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.businessUnitId, '$.id'), CAST(src.businessUnitId AS STRING)) AS source_business_unit_id,
    src.businessUnitName AS source_business_unit_name,

    src.orderNbr AS order_nbr,
    src.orderType AS order_type,
    src.status,

    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.supplier, '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.supplier, '$.acctCD'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.supplier, '$.number'),
      src.supplier
    ) AS supplier_id,
    JSON_VALUE(src.supplier, '$.name') AS supplier_name,
    src.supplierRef AS supplier_ref,

    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.branch, '$.branchId'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.branch, '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.branch, '$.number'),
      src.branch
    ) AS branch_id,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.currency, '$.id'), src.currency) AS currency_id,

    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(src.date AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(src.date AS DATETIME)),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(src.date AS TIMESTAMP))
    ) AS order_date,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(src.promisedOn AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(src.promisedOn AS DATETIME)),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(src.promisedOn AS TIMESTAMP))
    ) AS promised_date,

    src.description AS description,
    src.hold AS hold,
    src.exchangeRate AS exchange_rate,

    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.location, '$.locationId'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.location, '$.id')
    ) AS location_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.warehouse, '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.warehouse, '$.warehouseId'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.shipTo, '$.warehouseId'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.shipTo, '$.id'),
      src.warehouse
    ) AS warehouse_id,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.terms, '$.id'), src.terms) AS credit_terms_id,

    JSON_VALUE(src.shippingAddress, '$.addressLine1') AS shipping_address_line1,
    JSON_VALUE(src.shippingAddress, '$.city') AS shipping_city,
    JSON_VALUE(src.shippingAddress, '$.postalCode') AS shipping_postal_code,
    JSON_VALUE(src.shippingAddress, '$.country.id') AS shipping_country,

    src.orderTotal AS order_total,
    src.orderTotalInBaseCurrency AS order_total_base,
    src.lineTotal AS line_total,
    src.lineTotalInBaseCurrency AS line_total_base,
    src.taxTotal AS tax_total,
    src.taxTotalInBaseCurrency AS tax_total_base,
    src.vatExemptTotal AS vat_exempt_total,
    src.openBalance AS open_balance,
    src.openQuantity AS open_quantity,

    SAFE_CAST(src.lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) AS last_modified_at
  FROM source_base AS src
),

enriched AS (
  SELECT
    b.*,
    rls.source_segment_2_value,
    bm.business_unit_id AS mapped_business_unit_id,
    bm.business_unit_name AS mapped_business_unit_name,
    CASE
      WHEN bm.business_unit_id IS NULL THEN 'no_mapping'
      WHEN bm.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL AND rls.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 'subaccount_segment2_match'
      WHEN bm.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 'segment_zero_match'
      ELSE 'tenant_default_match'
    END AS business_unit_match_rule,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY b.tenant_id, b.order_type, b.order_nbr
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN bm.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
        bm.valid_from DESC
    ) AS bu_match_rank
  FROM base AS b
  LEFT JOIN representative_line_subaccounts AS rls
    ON b.tenant_id = rls.tenant_id
   AND b.order_nbr = rls.order_nbr
   AND b.order_type = rls.order_type
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping AS bm
    ON b.tenant_id = bm.tenant_id
   AND b.order_date BETWEEN bm.valid_from AND bm.valid_to
   AND (
     bm.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR bm.source_segment_2_value = COALESCE(rls.source_segment_2_value, '0')
   )
)

SELECT
  tenant_id,
  synced_at,
  organization_name,
  source_business_unit_id,
  source_business_unit_name,
  COALESCE(mapped_business_unit_id, source_business_unit_id) AS business_unit_id,
  COALESCE(mapped_business_unit_name, source_business_unit_name, organization_name) AS business_unit_name,
  source_segment_2_value,
  business_unit_match_rule,

  order_nbr,
  order_type,
  status,
  supplier_id,
  supplier_name,
  supplier_ref,
  branch_id,
  currency_id,
  order_date,
  promised_date,
  description,
  hold,
  exchange_rate,
  location_id,
  warehouse_id,
  credit_terms_id,
  shipping_address_line1,
  shipping_city,
  shipping_postal_code,
  shipping_country,
  order_total,
  order_total_base,
  line_total,
  line_total_base,
  tax_total,
  tax_total_base,
  vat_exempt_total,
  open_balance,
  open_quantity,
  last_modified_at
FROM enriched
WHERE bu_match_rank = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: Purchase order header fact with historized business unit mapping by order date and representative line subaccount.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Silver fact: Purchase order lines (flattened from JSON array)
-- Source: visma_purchase_orders -> lines (JSON string)
-- Grain: one row per PO line (tenant + orderType + orderNbr + lineNbr)
-- Why: Maps to Power BI fctPurchaseOrderLineExt. Supports PO quantity,
--      amount, and received-vs-ordered analysis.
-- =============================================================================

WITH subaccount_dim AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    subaccount_id,
    segment2 AS segment2_value
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.dim_subaccount`
),

business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

source_data AS (
  SELECT
      h.tenantId                                          AS tenant_id,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                AS raw_business_unit_id,
      CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                AS business_unit_id,
      h.orderNbr                                          AS order_nbr,
      h.orderType                                         AS order_type,
      h.supplier                                          AS supplier,
      SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(
        JSON_VALUE(h.supplier, '$.number'),
        JSON_VALUE(h.supplier, '$.id'),
        JSON_VALUE(h.supplier, '$.internalId')
      ) AS STRING)                                        AS supplier_id,
      JSON_VALUE(h.supplier, '$.name')                    AS supplier_name,
      h.currency                                          AS currency_id,
      COALESCE(
        SAFE_CAST(h.date AS DATE),
        DATE(SAFE_CAST(h.date AS TIMESTAMP))
      ) AS order_date,

      -- Line dimension FKs
      COALESCE(
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory.number'),
        JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory'), '$.number'),
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory.id'),
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$."inventory.id"'),
        JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory'), '$.id'),
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventoryId')
      ) AS inventory_id,
      COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.warehouse.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."warehouse.id"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.warehouse'), '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.warehouse')) AS warehouse_id,
      COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.account.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."account.id"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.account'), '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.account')) AS account_id,
      COALESCE(
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.subaccount.id'),
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$."subaccount.id"'),
        JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.subaccount'), '$.id'),
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.subaccount'),
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.sub.subaccountNumber'),
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.sub.subaccountId'),
        JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.sub'), '$.subaccountNumber')
      ) AS subaccount_id,
      COALESCE(
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.sub.segments[1].segmentValue'),
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.subaccount.segments[1].segmentValue'),
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.subaccount.2')
      ) AS raw_segment_2_value,
      COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.project.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."project.id"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.project'), '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.project')) AS project_id,

      -- Degenerate dimensions
      COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineNbr'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineNumber'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.sortOrder')) AS line_nbr,
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineType')                       AS line_type,
      COALESCE(
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineDescription'),
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.description'),
        JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory'), '$.description')
      ) AS line_description,
      COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.uom'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.uoM'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.unitOfMeasure')) AS unit_of_measure,
      COALESCE(
        SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.promisedDate') AS DATE),
        DATE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.promisedDate') AS TIMESTAMP))
      ) AS promised_date,
      COALESCE(
        SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.requestedDate') AS DATE),
        DATE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.requestedDate') AS TIMESTAMP))
      ) AS requested_date,
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.completed')                      AS is_completed,

      -- Measures
      SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.orderQty') AS NUMERIC)        AS order_qty,
      SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.receivedQty') AS NUMERIC)     AS received_qty,
      SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.openQty') AS NUMERIC)         AS open_qty,
      SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.unitCost') AS NUMERIC)        AS unit_cost,
      SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.unitCostInBaseCurrency') AS NUMERIC) AS unit_cost_base,
      SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.amount'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.extCost')) AS NUMERIC) AS amount,
      SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.amountInBaseCurrency') AS NUMERIC) AS amount_base,
      SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.discountPercent') AS NUMERIC) AS discount_percent
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_purchase_orders` AS h
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(h.lines)) AS line
  WHERE h.isDeleted = false OR h.isDeleted IS NULL
),

enriched AS (
  SELECT
    src.*,
    COALESCE(src.raw_segment_2_value, subaccount_dim.segment2_value) AS source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id AS mapped_bu_id,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_name AS mapped_bu_name,
    CASE
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL
       AND business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 'subaccount_segment2_match'
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL
       AND business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = '0' THEN 'segment_zero_match'
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'tenant_default_match'
      ELSE 'unresolved'
    END AS business_unit_resolution_method,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY src.tenant_id, src.order_type, src.order_nbr, src.line_nbr, src.inventory_id
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
        business_unit_mapping.valid_from DESC,
        COALESCE(src.amount, 0) DESC,
        COALESCE(src.order_qty, 0) DESC
    ) AS bu_match_rank
  FROM source_data AS src
  LEFT JOIN subaccount_dim
    ON src.tenant_id = subaccount_dim.tenant_id
   AND src.subaccount_id = subaccount_dim.subaccount_id
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping
    ON src.tenant_id = business_unit_mapping.tenant_id
   AND src.order_date BETWEEN business_unit_mapping.valid_from AND business_unit_mapping.valid_to
   AND (
     business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = COALESCE(src.raw_segment_2_value, subaccount_dim.segment2_value, '0')
   )
)

SELECT
  enriched.* EXCEPT (business_unit_id, mapped_bu_id, mapped_bu_name, bu_match_rank),
  COALESCE(enriched.mapped_bu_id, enriched.business_unit_id) AS business_unit_id,
  enriched.mapped_bu_name AS business_unit_name
FROM enriched
WHERE bu_match_rank = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Purchase order lines flattened from JSON. Grain: one row per PO line (tenant + orderNbr + lineNbr).

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- fact_sales_order.sqlx
-- Silver fact: Sales order headers
-- Source: dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_sales_orders_v3
-- Grain: one row per tenantId + orderId
-- Key transformations:
--   * Header-level JSON objects are flattened to scalar columns
--   * Canonical header business units stay NULL when material lines are mixed or unresolved
--   * Representative business units keep a line-derived fallback for reporting/debugging
--   * Latest non-deleted order version is retained per tenantId + orderId
-- =============================================================================

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(TRIM(orderLines), ''),
      NULLIF(TRIM(lines), ''),
      '[]'
    ) AS order_lines_json_source
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_sales_orders_v3`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenantId, orderId
    ORDER BY syncedAt DESC, SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) DESC
  ) = 1
),

business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

line_strategy_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    inventory_id,
    line_type,
    sales_account_id,
    line_business_unit_strategy,
    strategy_description
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.sales_order_line_business_unit_strategy`
),

line_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    src.tenantId AS tenant_id,
    src.orderId AS order_id,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(src.date AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(src.date AS TIMESTAMP)),
      COALESCE(
        SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.orderDate') AS DATE),
        DATE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.orderDate') AS TIMESTAMP))
      )
    ) AS line_business_date,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.orderDate') AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.orderDate') AS TIMESTAMP))
    ) AS line_order_date,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.lineType') AS line_type,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.inventory.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.inventoryId')
    ) AS inventory_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.accountId'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.salesAccountId')
    ) AS sales_account_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.description'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.inventory.description')
    ) AS line_description,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.salesPersonId'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.salesPerson.salespersonID'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.salesPerson.id')
    ) AS line_sales_person_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.salesPerson.name'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.salesPerson.description')
    ) AS line_sales_person_name,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.2'), '0') AS subaccount_seg2,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.amount') AS FLOAT64),
      SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.extendedPrice') AS FLOAT64),
      SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.lineTotalBeforeDiscount') AS FLOAT64),
      0.0
    ) AS line_amount,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.sortOrder') AS INT64),
      SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.lineNbr') AS INT64),
      SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.lineId') AS INT64),
      line_offset + 1
    ) AS line_rank
  FROM base src
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(src.order_lines_json_source)) AS line_json WITH OFFSET AS line_offset
),

line_candidates_strategized AS (
  SELECT
    lc.*,
    COALESCE(lc.line_amount, 0.0) = 0.0 AS is_zero_value_line,
    COALESCE(lc.line_amount, 0.0) <> 0.0 AS is_material_line,
    COALESCE(lc.line_amount, 0.0) <> 0.0
      AND lc.line_type = 'GoodsForInventory' AS is_material_goods_line,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(lc.line_amount, 0.0) = 0.0 THEN 'ignore_zero_value_line'
      ELSE COALESCE(strategy_map.line_business_unit_strategy, 'source_subaccount')
    END AS line_business_unit_strategy,
    strategy_map.strategy_description AS line_business_unit_strategy_description
  FROM line_candidates lc
  LEFT JOIN line_strategy_mapping strategy_map
    ON lc.inventory_id = strategy_map.inventory_id
   AND (strategy_map.line_type IS NULL OR strategy_map.line_type = lc.line_type)
   AND (strategy_map.sales_account_id IS NULL OR strategy_map.sales_account_id = lc.sales_account_id)
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY lc.tenant_id, lc.order_id, lc.line_rank
    ORDER BY
      CASE WHEN strategy_map.inventory_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
      CASE WHEN strategy_map.line_type IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
      CASE WHEN strategy_map.sales_account_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC
  ) = 1
),

resolved_line_business_units AS (
  SELECT
    lc.*,
    mapped_bu.business_unit_id,
    mapped_bu.business_unit_name,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY lc.tenant_id, lc.order_id, lc.line_rank
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN mapped_bu.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
        mapped_bu.valid_from DESC
    ) AS bu_match_rank
  FROM line_candidates_strategized lc
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping mapped_bu
    ON lc.tenant_id = mapped_bu.tenant_id
   AND COALESCE(lc.line_business_date, DATE '1900-01-01') BETWEEN mapped_bu.valid_from AND mapped_bu.valid_to
   AND (
     mapped_bu.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR mapped_bu.source_segment_2_value = lc.subaccount_seg2
   )
),

line_order_dates AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    order_id,
    ARRAY_AGG(line_order_date IGNORE NULLS ORDER BY line_rank LIMIT 1)[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS line_order_date
  FROM line_candidates_strategized
  GROUP BY 1,2
),

material_line_sales_person_rollup AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    order_id,
    line_sales_person_id AS sales_person_id,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      line_sales_person_name IGNORE NULLS
      ORDER BY COALESCE(line_amount, 0.0) DESC, line_rank ASC
      LIMIT 1
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS sales_person_name,
    COUNT(*) AS line_count,
    SUM(COALESCE(line_amount, 0.0)) AS line_amount_sum,
    MIN(line_rank) AS first_line_rank
  FROM line_candidates_strategized
  WHERE is_material_line
    AND line_sales_person_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1,2,3
),

material_line_sales_person_choice AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    order_id,
    sales_person_id,
    sales_person_name,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, order_id) AS material_line_sales_person_count
  FROM material_line_sales_person_rollup
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenant_id, order_id
    ORDER BY
      line_amount_sum DESC,
      line_count DESC,
      first_line_rank ASC,
      sales_person_id
  ) = 1
),

all_line_sales_person_rollup AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    order_id,
    line_sales_person_id AS sales_person_id,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      line_sales_person_name IGNORE NULLS
      ORDER BY COALESCE(line_amount, 0.0) DESC, line_rank ASC
      LIMIT 1
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS sales_person_name,
    COUNT(*) AS line_count,
    SUM(COALESCE(line_amount, 0.0)) AS line_amount_sum,
    MIN(line_rank) AS first_line_rank
  FROM line_candidates_strategized
  WHERE line_sales_person_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1,2,3
),

all_line_sales_person_choice AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    order_id,
    sales_person_id,
    sales_person_name,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, order_id) AS all_line_sales_person_count
  FROM all_line_sales_person_rollup
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenant_id, order_id
    ORDER BY
      line_amount_sum DESC,
      line_count DESC,
      first_line_rank ASC,
      sales_person_id
  ) = 1
),

material_goods_business_unit_rollup AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    order_id,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      subaccount_seg2
      ORDER BY COALESCE(line_amount, 0.0) DESC, line_rank ASC
      LIMIT 1
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS subaccount_seg2,
    COUNT(*) AS line_count,
    SUM(COALESCE(line_amount, 0.0)) AS line_amount_sum,
    MIN(line_rank) AS first_line_rank
  FROM resolved_line_business_units
  WHERE bu_match_rank = 1
    AND is_material_goods_line
    AND line_business_unit_strategy = 'source_subaccount'
    AND business_unit_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
),

material_goods_business_unit_choice AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    order_id,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    subaccount_seg2
  FROM material_goods_business_unit_rollup
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenant_id, order_id
    ORDER BY
      line_amount_sum DESC,
      line_count DESC,
      first_line_rank ASC,
      business_unit_id
  ) = 1
),

source_line_business_unit_rollup AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    order_id,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      subaccount_seg2
      ORDER BY COALESCE(line_amount, 0.0) DESC, line_rank ASC
      LIMIT 1
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS subaccount_seg2,
    COUNT(*) AS line_count,
    SUM(COALESCE(line_amount, 0.0)) AS line_amount_sum,
    MIN(line_rank) AS first_line_rank
  FROM resolved_line_business_units
  WHERE bu_match_rank = 1
    AND is_material_line
    AND business_unit_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
),

source_line_business_unit_choice AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    order_id,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    subaccount_seg2,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, order_id) AS source_line_business_unit_count
  FROM source_line_business_unit_rollup
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenant_id, order_id
    ORDER BY
      line_amount_sum DESC,
      line_count DESC,
      first_line_rank ASC,
      business_unit_id
  ) = 1
),

source_material_line_stats AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    order_id,
    COUNT(*) AS source_material_line_count,
    COUNTIF(business_unit_id IS NULL) AS unresolved_source_material_line_count
  FROM resolved_line_business_units
  WHERE bu_match_rank = 1
    AND is_material_line
  GROUP BY 1,2
),

effective_line_business_units AS (
  SELECT
    rlb.tenant_id,
    rlb.order_id,
    rlb.line_rank,
    rlb.subaccount_seg2,
    rlb.line_amount,
    rlb.is_material_line,
    rlb.line_business_unit_strategy,
    CASE
      WHEN rlb.line_business_unit_strategy = 'allocate_to_material_goods_bu'
        AND mgbuc.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL
        THEN mgbuc.business_unit_id
      ELSE rlb.business_unit_id
    END AS effective_business_unit_id,
    CASE
      WHEN rlb.line_business_unit_strategy = 'allocate_to_material_goods_bu'
        AND mgbuc.business_unit_name IS NOT NULL
        THEN mgbuc.business_unit_name
      ELSE rlb.business_unit_name
    END AS effective_business_unit_name,
    CASE
      WHEN rlb.line_business_unit_strategy = 'allocate_to_material_goods_bu'
        AND mgbuc.subaccount_seg2 IS NOT NULL
        THEN mgbuc.subaccount_seg2
      ELSE rlb.subaccount_seg2
    END AS effective_subaccount_seg2
  FROM resolved_line_business_units rlb
  LEFT JOIN material_goods_business_unit_choice mgbuc
    ON rlb.tenant_id = mgbuc.tenant_id
   AND rlb.order_id = mgbuc.order_id
  WHERE rlb.bu_match_rank = 1
    AND rlb.is_material_line
),

effective_material_line_stats AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    order_id,
    COUNT(*) AS effective_material_line_count,
    COUNTIF(effective_business_unit_id IS NULL) AS unresolved_effective_material_line_count
  FROM effective_line_business_units
  GROUP BY 1,2
),

effective_line_business_unit_rollup AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    order_id,
    effective_business_unit_id AS business_unit_id,
    effective_business_unit_name AS business_unit_name,
    ARRAY_AGG(
      effective_subaccount_seg2
      ORDER BY COALESCE(line_amount, 0.0) DESC, line_rank ASC
      LIMIT 1
    )[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] AS subaccount_seg2,
    COUNT(*) AS line_count,
    SUM(COALESCE(line_amount, 0.0)) AS line_amount_sum,
    MIN(line_rank) AS first_line_rank
  FROM effective_line_business_units
  WHERE effective_business_unit_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
),

effective_line_business_unit_choice AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    order_id,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    subaccount_seg2,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, order_id) AS effective_line_business_unit_count
  FROM effective_line_business_unit_rollup
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenant_id, order_id
    ORDER BY
      line_amount_sum DESC,
      line_count DESC,
      first_line_rank ASC,
      business_unit_id
  ) = 1
),

header_enriched AS (
  SELECT
    src.tenantId AS tenant_id,
    src.syncedAt AS synced_at,
    src.organizationName AS organization_name,
    COALESCE(effective_lbc.business_unit_id, mapped_bu.business_unit_id) AS representative_business_unit_id,
    COALESCE(effective_lbc.business_unit_name, mapped_bu.business_unit_name) AS representative_business_unit_name,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(effective_stats.effective_material_line_count, 0) = 0 THEN mapped_bu.business_unit_id
      WHEN COALESCE(effective_stats.unresolved_effective_material_line_count, 0) > 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN COALESCE(effective_lbc.effective_line_business_unit_count, 0) = 1 THEN effective_lbc.business_unit_id
      ELSE NULL
    END AS business_unit_id,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(effective_stats.effective_material_line_count, 0) = 0 THEN mapped_bu.business_unit_name
      WHEN COALESCE(effective_stats.unresolved_effective_material_line_count, 0) > 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN COALESCE(effective_lbc.effective_line_business_unit_count, 0) = 1 THEN effective_lbc.business_unit_name
      ELSE NULL
    END AS business_unit_name,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(source_stats.source_material_line_count, 0) = 0 THEN mapped_bu.business_unit_id
      WHEN COALESCE(source_stats.unresolved_source_material_line_count, 0) > 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN COALESCE(source_lbc.source_line_business_unit_count, 0) = 1 THEN source_lbc.business_unit_id
      ELSE NULL
    END AS source_consistent_business_unit_id,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(source_stats.source_material_line_count, 0) = 0 THEN mapped_bu.business_unit_name
      WHEN COALESCE(source_stats.unresolved_source_material_line_count, 0) > 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN COALESCE(source_lbc.source_line_business_unit_count, 0) = 1 THEN source_lbc.business_unit_name
      ELSE NULL
    END AS source_consistent_business_unit_name,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(effective_stats.effective_material_line_count, 0) = 0 THEN mapped_bu.business_unit_id
      WHEN COALESCE(effective_stats.unresolved_effective_material_line_count, 0) > 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN COALESCE(effective_lbc.effective_line_business_unit_count, 0) = 1 THEN effective_lbc.business_unit_id
      ELSE NULL
    END AS effective_consistent_business_unit_id,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(effective_stats.effective_material_line_count, 0) = 0 THEN mapped_bu.business_unit_name
      WHEN COALESCE(effective_stats.unresolved_effective_material_line_count, 0) > 0 THEN NULL
      WHEN COALESCE(effective_lbc.effective_line_business_unit_count, 0) = 1 THEN effective_lbc.business_unit_name
      ELSE NULL
    END AS effective_consistent_business_unit_name,
    COALESCE(source_lbc.source_line_business_unit_count, 0) AS line_business_unit_count,
    COALESCE(source_lbc.source_line_business_unit_count, 0) > 1 AS has_multiple_line_business_units,
    COALESCE(effective_lbc.effective_line_business_unit_count, 0) AS effective_line_business_unit_count,
    COALESCE(effective_lbc.effective_line_business_unit_count, 0) > 1 AS has_multiple_effective_line_business_units,
    COALESCE(source_stats.source_material_line_count, 0) AS source_material_line_count,
    COALESCE(source_stats.unresolved_source_material_line_count, 0) AS unresolved_source_material_line_count,
    COALESCE(effective_stats.effective_material_line_count, 0) AS effective_material_line_count,
    COALESCE(effective_stats.unresolved_effective_material_line_count, 0) AS unresolved_effective_material_line_count,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(effective_stats.effective_material_line_count, 0) = 0
        AND mapped_bu.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL
        THEN 'tenant_default_match'
      WHEN COALESCE(effective_stats.effective_material_line_count, 0) = 0
        THEN 'no_match'
      WHEN COALESCE(effective_stats.unresolved_effective_material_line_count, 0) > 0
        THEN 'unresolved_line_business_unit'
      WHEN COALESCE(effective_lbc.effective_line_business_unit_count, 0) = 1
        AND COALESCE(source_lbc.source_line_business_unit_count, 0) > 1
        THEN 'single_effective_line_business_unit_after_strategy'
      WHEN COALESCE(effective_lbc.effective_line_business_unit_count, 0) = 1
        THEN 'single_effective_line_business_unit'
      WHEN COALESCE(effective_lbc.effective_line_business_unit_count, 0) > 1
        THEN 'mixed_multi_bu_order'
      WHEN mapped_bu.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'tenant_default_match'
      ELSE 'no_match'
    END AS header_business_unit_selection_method,

    src.orderId AS order_id,
    src.orderNo AS order_no,
    src.orderType AS order_type,
    src.status AS status,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.branch, '$.branchId'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.branch, '$.id'),
      CAST(src.branch AS STRING)
    ) AS branch_id,
    JSON_VALUE(src.branch, '$.description') AS branch_name,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.branchNumber, '$.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.branch, '$.number'),
      CAST(src.branchNumber AS STRING)
    ) AS branch_number,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.currency, '$.id'),
      CAST(src.currency AS STRING)
    ) AS currency_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.currency, '$.description'),
      CAST(src.currency AS STRING)
    ) AS currency_name,
    SAFE_CAST(src.currencyRate AS FLOAT64) AS exchange_rate,

    src.customerId AS customer_id,
    src.customerName AS customer_name,
    src.customerOrder AS customer_order,
    src.customerRefNo AS customer_ref_no,
    src.parentCustomer AS parent_customer,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.customer, '$.location.id'), CAST(src.location AS STRING)) AS customer_location_id,
    JSON_VALUE(src.customer, '$.taxZone.id') AS customer_tax_zone_id,
    JSON_VALUE(src.customer, '$.taxZone.description') AS customer_tax_zone_description,

    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(src.date AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(src.date AS TIMESTAMP)),
      lod.line_order_date
    ) AS order_date,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.financialInformation, '$.dueDate'), CAST(src.dueDate AS STRING)) AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.financialInformation, '$.dueDate'), CAST(src.dueDate AS STRING)) AS TIMESTAMP))
    ) AS due_date,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(src.requestOn AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(src.requestOn AS TIMESTAMP))
    ) AS request_date,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(src.cancelBy AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(src.cancelBy AS TIMESTAMP))
    ) AS cancel_by_date,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.financialInformation, '$.invoiceDate'), CAST(src.invoiceDate AS STRING)) AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.financialInformation, '$.invoiceDate'), CAST(src.invoiceDate AS STRING)) AS TIMESTAMP))
    ) AS invoice_date,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.shipping, '$.scheduledDate'), CAST(src.shippingScheduledDate AS STRING), CAST(src.scheduledDate AS STRING)) AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.shipping, '$.scheduledDate'), CAST(src.shippingScheduledDate AS STRING), CAST(src.scheduledDate AS STRING)) AS TIMESTAMP))
    ) AS scheduled_ship_date,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.financialInformation, '$.cashDiscountDate'), CAST(src.cashDiscountDate AS STRING)) AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.financialInformation, '$.cashDiscountDate'), CAST(src.cashDiscountDate AS STRING)) AS TIMESTAMP))
    ) AS cash_discount_date,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.financialInformation, '$.postPeriod'), CAST(src.postPeriod AS STRING)) AS post_period,

    SAFE_CAST(src.hold AS BOOL) AS hold,
    SAFE_CAST(src.canceled AS BOOL) AS canceled,
    SAFE_CAST(src.emailed AS BOOL) AS emailed,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.financialInformation, '$.invoiceSeparately'), CAST(src.invoiceSeparately AS STRING)) AS BOOL) AS invoice_separately,
    SAFE_CAST(src.shipSeparately AS BOOL) AS ship_separately,
    SAFE_CAST(src.residentialDelivery AS BOOL) AS residential_delivery,
    SAFE_CAST(src.saturdayDelivery AS BOOL) AS saturday_delivery,
    SAFE_CAST(src.insurance AS BOOL) AS insurance,
    SAFE_CAST(src.isRotRutDeductible AS BOOL) AS is_rot_rut_deductible,
    SAFE_CAST(src.priority AS INT64) AS priority,
    JSON_VALUE(src.origin, '$.orderType') AS origin_order_type,
    JSON_VALUE(src.origin, '$.orderId') AS origin_order_id,
    src.originalOrderId AS original_order_id,
    src.originalOrderType AS original_order_type,
    src.description AS order_description,
    src.invoiceId AS invoice_id,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.owner, '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(src.owner, '$.internalId')) AS owner_id,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.project, '$.id'), CAST(src.project AS STRING)) AS project_id,
    JSON_VALUE(src.project, '$.description') AS project_description,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.project, '$.internalId'), JSON_VALUE(src.project, '$.internalID')) AS project_internal_id,

    COALESCE(
      COALESCE(
        JSON_VALUE(src.salesPerson, '$.salespersonID'),
        JSON_VALUE(src.salesPerson, '$.id')
      ),
      material_lsp.sales_person_id,
      all_lsp.sales_person_id
    ) AS representative_sales_person_id,
    COALESCE(
      COALESCE(
        JSON_VALUE(src.salesPerson, '$.name'),
        JSON_VALUE(src.salesPerson, '$.description')
      ),
      material_lsp.sales_person_name,
      all_lsp.sales_person_name
    ) AS representative_sales_person_name,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(
        JSON_VALUE(src.salesPerson, '$.salespersonID'),
        JSON_VALUE(src.salesPerson, '$.id')
      ) IS NOT NULL
        THEN COALESCE(
          JSON_VALUE(src.salesPerson, '$.salespersonID'),
          JSON_VALUE(src.salesPerson, '$.id')
        )
      WHEN COALESCE(material_lsp.material_line_sales_person_count, 0) = 1
        THEN material_lsp.sales_person_id
      WHEN COALESCE(material_lsp.material_line_sales_person_count, 0) = 0
        AND COALESCE(all_lsp.all_line_sales_person_count, 0) = 1
        THEN all_lsp.sales_person_id
      ELSE NULL
    END AS sales_person_id,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(
        JSON_VALUE(src.salesPerson, '$.salespersonID'),
        JSON_VALUE(src.salesPerson, '$.id')
      ) IS NOT NULL
        THEN COALESCE(
          JSON_VALUE(src.salesPerson, '$.name'),
          JSON_VALUE(src.salesPerson, '$.description')
        )
      WHEN COALESCE(material_lsp.material_line_sales_person_count, 0) = 1
        THEN material_lsp.sales_person_name
      WHEN COALESCE(material_lsp.material_line_sales_person_count, 0) = 0
        AND COALESCE(all_lsp.all_line_sales_person_count, 0) = 1
        THEN all_lsp.sales_person_name
      ELSE NULL
    END AS sales_person_name,
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(material_lsp.material_line_sales_person_count, 0),
      all_lsp.all_line_sales_person_count,
      0
    ) AS line_sales_person_count,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(
        JSON_VALUE(src.salesPerson, '$.salespersonID'),
        JSON_VALUE(src.salesPerson, '$.id')
      ) IS NOT NULL
        THEN 'header_sales_person'
      WHEN COALESCE(material_lsp.material_line_sales_person_count, 0) = 1
        THEN 'single_material_line_sales_person'
      WHEN COALESCE(material_lsp.material_line_sales_person_count, 0) > 1
        THEN 'mixed_material_line_sales_people'
      WHEN COALESCE(all_lsp.all_line_sales_person_count, 0) = 1
        THEN 'single_line_sales_person'
      WHEN COALESCE(all_lsp.all_line_sales_person_count, 0) > 1
        THEN 'mixed_line_sales_people'
      ELSE 'no_sales_person'
    END AS sales_person_resolution_method,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.location, '$.locationId'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.location, '$.id'),
      CAST(src.location AS STRING)
    ) AS header_location_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.preferredWarehouse, '$.warehouseId'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.preferredWarehouse, '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.customer, '$.location.warehouseId'),
      CAST(src.preferredWarehouse AS STRING)
    ) AS header_warehouse_id,

    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.soBillingContact, '$.contactId'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.billing, '$.contact.id')
    ) AS billing_contact_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.soBillingContact, '$.name'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.billing, '$.contact.name')
    ) AS billing_contact_name,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.soBillingAddress, '$.addressId'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.billing, '$.address.id')
    ) AS billing_address_id,
    JSON_VALUE(src.soBillingAddress, '$.addressLine1') AS billing_address_line1,
    JSON_VALUE(src.soBillingAddress, '$.city') AS billing_city,
    JSON_VALUE(src.soBillingAddress, '$.postalCode') AS billing_postal_code,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.soBillingAddress, '$.countryId'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.soBillingAddress, '$.country'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.billing, '$.address.country.id')
    ) AS billing_country,

    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.soShippingContact, '$.contactId'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.shipping, '$.contact.id')
    ) AS shipping_contact_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.soShippingContact, '$.name'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.shipping, '$.contact.name')
    ) AS shipping_contact_name,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.soShippingAddress, '$.addressId'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.shipping, '$.address.id')
    ) AS shipping_address_id,
    JSON_VALUE(src.soShippingAddress, '$.addressLine1') AS shipping_address_line1,
    JSON_VALUE(src.soShippingAddress, '$.city') AS shipping_city,
    JSON_VALUE(src.soShippingAddress, '$.postalCode') AS shipping_postal_code,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.soShippingAddress, '$.countryId'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.soShippingAddress, '$.country'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.shipping, '$.address.country.id')
    ) AS shipping_country,

    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.shippingTerms, '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(src.shipping, '$.terms.id')) AS shipping_terms_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.shippingTerms, '$.name'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.shippingTerms, '$.description'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.shipping, '$.terms.description')
    ) AS shipping_terms_description,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.shippingZone, '$.id'), CAST(src.shippingZone AS STRING)) AS shipping_zone_id,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.shipping, '$.rule'), CAST(src.shippingRule AS STRING)) AS shipping_rule,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.shipVia, '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.shipping, '$.shipVia.id'),
      CAST(src.shipVia AS STRING)
    ) AS ship_via_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.shipVia, '$.name'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.shipVia, '$.description'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.shipping, '$.shipVia.description')
    ) AS ship_via_description,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.paymentMethod, '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.paymentSettings, '$.paymentMethod.id'),
      CAST(src.paymentMethod AS STRING)
    ) AS payment_method_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.paymentMethod, '$.name'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.paymentMethod, '$.description'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.paymentSettings, '$.paymentMethod.description')
    ) AS payment_method_name,
    src.paymentReference AS payment_reference,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.terms, '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.financialInformation, '$.terms.id'),
      CAST(src.terms AS STRING)
    ) AS credit_terms_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.terms, '$.description'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.financialInformation, '$.terms.description')
    ) AS credit_terms_description,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.terms, '$.name'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.terms, '$.description'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.financialInformation, '$.terms.description')
    ) AS credit_terms_name,
    COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.paymentSettings, '$.cashAccountId'), CAST(src.cashAccountId AS STRING)) AS cash_account_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.intrastatTransactionType, '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.shipping, '$.intrastatTransactionType.id')
    ) AS intrastat_transaction_type_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(src.intrastatTransactionType, '$.description'),
      JSON_VALUE(src.shipping, '$.intrastatTransactionType.description')
    ) AS intrastat_transaction_type_description,

    SAFE_CAST(src.orderQty AS FLOAT64) AS header_order_qty,
    SAFE_CAST(src.orderTotal AS FLOAT64) AS order_total,
    SAFE_CAST(src.orderTotalInBaseCurrency AS FLOAT64) AS order_total_base,
    SAFE_CAST(src.discountTotal AS FLOAT64) AS order_discount_total,
    SAFE_CAST(src.discountTotalInBaseCurrency AS FLOAT64) AS order_discount_total_base,
    SAFE_CAST(src.taxTotal AS FLOAT64) AS order_tax_total,
    SAFE_CAST(src.taxTotalInBaseCurrency AS FLOAT64) AS order_tax_total_base,
    SAFE_CAST(src.vatExemptTotal AS FLOAT64) AS order_vat_exempt_total,
    SAFE_CAST(src.vatExemptTotalInBaseCurrency AS FLOAT64) AS order_vat_exempt_total_base,
    SAFE_CAST(src.vatTaxableTotal AS FLOAT64) AS order_vat_taxable_total,
    SAFE_CAST(src.vatTaxableTotalInBaseCurrency AS FLOAT64) AS order_vat_taxable_total_base,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(src.totals, '$.taxableTotal') AS FLOAT64) AS order_taxable_total,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(src.totals, '$.taxableTotalInBaseCurrency') AS FLOAT64) AS order_taxable_total_base,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(src.totals, '$.taxExemptTotal') AS FLOAT64) AS order_tax_exempt_total,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(src.totals, '$.taxExemptTotalInBaseCurrency') AS FLOAT64) AS order_tax_exempt_total_base,
    SAFE_CAST(src.freightTotal AS FLOAT64) AS order_freight_total,
    SAFE_CAST(src.freightTotalInBaseCurrency AS FLOAT64) AS order_freight_total_base,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.totals, '$.freightCost'), CAST(src.freightCost AS STRING)) AS FLOAT64) AS order_freight_cost,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.totals, '$.freightCostInBaseCurrency'), CAST(src.freightCostInBaseCurrency AS STRING)) AS FLOAT64) AS order_freight_cost_base,
    SAFE_CAST(src.costTotal AS FLOAT64) AS order_cost_total,
    SAFE_CAST(src.costTotalInBaseCurrency AS FLOAT64) AS order_cost_total_base,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.totals, '$.unbilledAmount'), CAST(src.unbilledAmount AS STRING)) AS FLOAT64) AS order_unbilled_amount,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.totals, '$.unbilledAmountInBaseCurrency'), CAST(src.unbilledAmountInBaseCurrency AS STRING)) AS FLOAT64) AS order_unbilled_amount_base,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.totals, '$.unshippedAmount'), CAST(src.unshippedAmount AS STRING)) AS FLOAT64) AS order_unshipped_amount,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.totals, '$.unshippedAmountInBaseCurrency'), CAST(src.unshippedAmountInBaseCurrency AS STRING)) AS FLOAT64) AS order_unshipped_amount_base,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.totals, '$.exciseDutyTotal'), CAST(src.exciseDutyTotal AS STRING)) AS FLOAT64) AS order_excise_duty_total,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(src.totals, '$.exciseDutyTotalInBaseCurrency'), CAST(src.exciseDutyTotalInBaseCurrency AS STRING)) AS FLOAT64) AS order_excise_duty_total_base,
    JSON_VALUE(src.tax, '$[0].taxId') AS tax_id,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(src.tax, '$[0].taxRate') AS FLOAT64) AS tax_rate,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(src.tax, '$[0].taxableAmount') AS FLOAT64) AS tax_taxable_amount,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(src.tax, '$[0].taxAmount') AS FLOAT64) AS tax_amount,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(src.tax, '$[0].exemptTax') AS BOOL) AS tax_is_exempt,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(src.tax, '$[0].includeInTaxable') AS BOOL) AS tax_include_in_taxable,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(src.tax, '$[0].isPendingTax') AS BOOL) AS tax_is_pending,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(src.tax, '$[0].isStatisticalTax') AS BOOL) AS tax_is_statistical,
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(src.tax, '$[0].isReverseTax') AS BOOL) AS tax_is_reverse,
    JSON_VALUE(src.tax, '$[0].taxType') AS tax_type,
    SAFE_CAST(src.lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) AS last_modified_at
  FROM base src
  LEFT JOIN line_order_dates lod
    ON src.tenantId = lod.tenant_id
   AND src.orderId = lod.order_id
  LEFT JOIN source_line_business_unit_choice source_lbc
    ON src.tenantId = source_lbc.tenant_id
   AND src.orderId = source_lbc.order_id
  LEFT JOIN source_material_line_stats source_stats
    ON src.tenantId = source_stats.tenant_id
   AND src.orderId = source_stats.order_id
  LEFT JOIN effective_line_business_unit_choice effective_lbc
    ON src.tenantId = effective_lbc.tenant_id
   AND src.orderId = effective_lbc.order_id
  LEFT JOIN effective_material_line_stats effective_stats
    ON src.tenantId = effective_stats.tenant_id
   AND src.orderId = effective_stats.order_id
  LEFT JOIN material_line_sales_person_choice material_lsp
    ON src.tenantId = material_lsp.tenant_id
   AND src.orderId = material_lsp.order_id
  LEFT JOIN all_line_sales_person_choice all_lsp
    ON src.tenantId = all_lsp.tenant_id
   AND src.orderId = all_lsp.order_id
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping AS mapped_bu
    ON src.tenantId = mapped_bu.tenant_id
   AND COALESCE(
     SAFE_CAST(src.date AS DATE),
     DATE(SAFE_CAST(src.date AS TIMESTAMP)),
     lod.line_order_date
   ) BETWEEN mapped_bu.valid_from AND mapped_bu.valid_to
   AND (
     mapped_bu.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR mapped_bu.source_segment_2_value = COALESCE(effective_lbc.subaccount_seg2, '0')
   )
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY src.tenantId, src.orderId
    ORDER BY
      CASE WHEN mapped_bu.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
      mapped_bu.valid_from DESC
  ) = 1
)

SELECT
