actionDescriptor.description: Silver: Sales order headers. Flattens SalesOrder V3 JSON payloads and maps business units from line subaccount segment 2.

tables.query:
-- Grain:
--   one row per tenant_id + order_id + source line business_unit_id.
--
-- Purpose:
--   exposes how mixed orders split across source BUs without forcing a single
--   BU onto the header row.

SELECT
  hdr.tenant_id,
  hdr.synced_at,
  hdr.organization_name,
  hdr.order_id,
  hdr.order_no,
  hdr.order_type,
  hdr.status,
  hdr.order_date,
  hdr.customer_id,
  hdr.customer_name,
  hdr.branch_id,
  hdr.header_warehouse_id,

  line.business_unit_id,
  line.business_unit_name,

  hdr.line_business_unit_count AS source_line_business_unit_count,
  hdr.has_multiple_line_business_units AS has_multiple_source_line_business_units,
  hdr.effective_line_business_unit_count,
  hdr.has_multiple_effective_line_business_units,
  hdr.header_business_unit_selection_method,

  COUNT(*) AS line_count,
  COUNTIF(line.line_is_material) AS material_line_count,
  COUNTIF(line.line_is_zero_value) AS zero_value_line_count,
  COUNTIF(line.line_business_unit_strategy = 'allocate_to_material_goods_bu') AS ancillary_line_count,
  COUNTIF(line.line_business_unit_strategy = 'source_subaccount' AND line.line_is_material) AS core_material_line_count,

  SUM(COALESCE(line.line_order_qty, 0.0)) AS line_order_qty,
  SUM(COALESCE(line.line_amount, 0.0)) AS line_amount,
  SUM(COALESCE(line.line_discount_amount, 0.0)) AS line_discount_amount,
  SUM(COALESCE(line.amount_not_invoiced, 0.0)) AS amount_not_invoiced
FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_sales_order_line` AS line
INNER JOIN `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_sales_order` AS hdr
  ON line.tenant_id = hdr.tenant_id
 AND line.order_id = hdr.order_id
GROUP BY
  hdr.tenant_id,
  hdr.synced_at,
  hdr.organization_name,
  hdr.order_id,
  hdr.order_no,
  hdr.order_type,
  hdr.status,
  hdr.order_date,
  hdr.customer_id,
  hdr.customer_name,
  hdr.branch_id,
  hdr.header_warehouse_id,
  line.business_unit_id,
  line.business_unit_name,
  hdr.line_business_unit_count,
  hdr.has_multiple_line_business_units,
  hdr.effective_line_business_unit_count,
  hdr.has_multiple_effective_line_business_units,
  hdr.header_business_unit_selection_method

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: Sales order split by source line business unit. Aggregates sales order lines to one row per tenant + order + source BU.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- fact_sales_order_line.sqlx
-- Silver fact: Sales order lines
-- Source 1: dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_sales_orders_v3 (orderLines / lines JSON)
-- Source 2: dw_1_silver_visma.fact_sales_order (flattened header grain)
-- Grain: one row per tenant_id + order_id + line_nbr
-- =============================================================================

WITH latest_orders AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(TRIM(orderLines), ''),
      NULLIF(TRIM(lines), ''),
      '[]'
    ) AS order_lines_json_source
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_sales_orders_v3`
  WHERE isDeleted IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY tenantId, orderId
    ORDER BY syncedAt DESC, SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP) DESC
  ) = 1
),

header_fact AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.fact_sales_order`
),

business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

line_strategy_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    inventory_id,
    line_type,
    sales_account_id,
    line_business_unit_strategy,
    strategy_description
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.sales_order_line_business_unit_strategy`
),

lines_unnested AS (
  SELECT
    src.tenantId AS tenant_id,
    src.orderId AS order_id,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING) AS source_business_unit_id,
    line_offset,
    line_json,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.inventory.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.inventoryId')
    ) AS inventory_id_for_strategy,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.lineType') AS line_type_for_strategy,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.accountId'),
      JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.salesAccountId')
    ) AS sales_account_id_for_strategy,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.amount') AS FLOAT64),
      SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.extendedPrice') AS FLOAT64),
      SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.lineTotalBeforeDiscount') AS FLOAT64),
      0.0
    ) AS line_amount_for_strategy,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.1') AS subaccount_segment_1,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.2') AS subaccount_segment_2,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.3') AS subaccount_segment_3,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.4') AS subaccount_segment_4,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.5') AS subaccount_segment_5,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.6') AS subaccount_segment_6,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.7') AS subaccount_segment_7,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.8') AS subaccount_segment_8,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.9') AS subaccount_segment_9,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.10') AS subaccount_segment_10,
    JSON_VALUE(line_json, '$.subaccount.2') AS subaccount_segment_2_normalized
  FROM latest_orders src
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(src.order_lines_json_source)) AS line_json WITH OFFSET AS line_offset
),

lines_strategized AS (
  SELECT
    l.*,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(l.line_amount_for_strategy, 0.0) = 0.0 THEN 'ignore_zero_value_line'
      ELSE COALESCE(strategy_map.line_business_unit_strategy, 'source_subaccount')
    END AS line_business_unit_strategy,
    COALESCE(l.line_amount_for_strategy, 0.0) = 0.0 AS line_is_zero_value,
    COALESCE(l.line_amount_for_strategy, 0.0) <> 0.0 AS line_is_material
  FROM lines_unnested l
  LEFT JOIN line_strategy_mapping strategy_map
    ON l.inventory_id_for_strategy = strategy_map.inventory_id
   AND (
     strategy_map.line_type IS NULL
     OR strategy_map.line_type = l.line_type_for_strategy
   )
   AND (
     strategy_map.sales_account_id IS NULL
     OR strategy_map.sales_account_id = l.sales_account_id_for_strategy
   )
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY l.tenant_id, l.order_id, l.line_offset
    ORDER BY
      CASE WHEN strategy_map.inventory_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
      CASE WHEN strategy_map.line_type IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
      CASE WHEN strategy_map.sales_account_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC
  ) = 1
)

SELECT
  hdr.tenant_id,
  hdr.order_id,
  hdr.order_no,
  hdr.order_type,
  hdr.status,
  hdr.branch_id,
  hdr.currency_id,
  hdr.exchange_rate,
  hdr.customer_id,
  hdr.customer_name,
  hdr.customer_order,
  hdr.customer_ref_no,
  hdr.order_date,
  hdr.due_date,
  hdr.request_date,
  hdr.cancel_by_date,
  hdr.post_period,
  hdr.hold,
  hdr.order_description,
  hdr.project_id,
  hdr.project_internal_id,
  hdr.sales_person_id,
  hdr.header_warehouse_id,
  hdr.header_order_qty,
  hdr.order_total,
  hdr.order_total_base,
  hdr.order_discount_total,
  hdr.order_discount_total_base,
  hdr.order_tax_total,
  hdr.order_tax_total_base,
  hdr.order_cost_total,
  hdr.order_cost_total_base,
  hdr.last_modified_at,
  l.source_business_unit_id,
  COALESCE(
    mapped_bu.business_unit_id,
    hdr.business_unit_id
  ) AS business_unit_id,
  COALESCE(
    mapped_bu.business_unit_name,
    hdr.business_unit_name
  ) AS business_unit_name,
  CASE
    WHEN mapped_bu.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL AND mapped_bu.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 'line_subaccount_segment2_match'
    WHEN mapped_bu.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'tenant_default_match'
    WHEN hdr.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'header_business_unit_id_fallback'
    ELSE 'no_match'
  END AS business_unit_match_rule,
  l.line_business_unit_strategy,
  l.line_is_zero_value,
  l.line_is_material,

  COALESCE(
    CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.lineNbr') AS STRING),
    CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.lineId') AS STRING),
    FORMAT('%03d', l.line_offset + 1)
  ) AS line_nbr,
  CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.lineId') AS STRING) AS line_id,
  l.line_offset + 1 AS line_sequence,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.sortOrder') AS INT64) AS line_sort_order,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.lineType') AS line_type,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.operation') AS line_operation,
  COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.branch.id'), JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.branchId')) AS line_branch_id,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.branch.description') AS line_branch_name,
  hdr.branch_id AS line_branch_number,
  COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.inventory.id'), JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.inventoryId')) AS inventory_id,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.inventory.description') AS inventory_description,
  COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.description'), JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.inventory.description')) AS line_description,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.inventory.baseUnit') AS inventory_base_unit,
  COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.inventoryAlternateId'), JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.alternateID')) AS inventory_alternate_id,
  COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.uOM'), JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.unitOfMeasure')) AS unit_of_measure,
  SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.orderQty'), JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.quantity')) AS FLOAT64) AS line_order_qty,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.baseOrderQuantity') AS FLOAT64) AS line_base_order_qty,
  SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.openQty'), JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.openQuantity')) AS FLOAT64) AS line_open_qty,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.billedQuantity') AS FLOAT64) AS line_billed_qty,
  SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.qtyOnShipments'), JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.quantityOnShipments')) AS FLOAT64) AS line_qty_on_shipments,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.unitPrice') AS FLOAT64) AS unit_price,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.unitPriceInBaseCurrency') AS FLOAT64) AS unit_price_base,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.discountCode') AS line_discount_code,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.discountSequenceId') AS line_discount_sequence_id,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.discountPercent') AS FLOAT64) AS line_discount_percent,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.discountAmount') AS FLOAT64) AS line_discount_amount,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.discountAmountInBaseCurrency') AS FLOAT64) AS line_discount_amount_base,
  SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.amount'), JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.extendedPrice')) AS FLOAT64) AS line_amount,
  SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.amountInBaseCurrency'), JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.extendedPrice')) AS FLOAT64) AS line_amount_base,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.unitCost') AS FLOAT64) AS unit_cost,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.unitCostInBaseCurrency') AS FLOAT64) AS unit_cost_base,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.averageCost') AS FLOAT64) AS average_cost,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.discountedUnitPrice') AS FLOAT64) AS discounted_unit_price,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.discountedUnitPriceInBaseCurrency') AS FLOAT64) AS discounted_unit_price_base,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.amountNotInvoiced') AS FLOAT64) AS amount_not_invoiced,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.lineTotalBeforeDiscount') AS FLOAT64) AS line_total_before_discount,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.undershipThreshold') AS FLOAT64) AS undership_threshold,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.overshipThreshold') AS FLOAT64) AS overship_threshold,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.warehouseId') AS line_warehouse_id,
  COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.salesPersonId'), JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.salesPerson.id')) AS line_sales_person_id,
  COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.salesPerson.name'), JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.salesPerson.description')) AS line_sales_person_name,
  COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.accountId'), JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.salesAccountId')) AS account_id,
  l.subaccount_segment_1,
  l.subaccount_segment_2,
  l.subaccount_segment_2_normalized,
  l.subaccount_segment_3,
  l.subaccount_segment_4,
  l.subaccount_segment_5,
  l.subaccount_segment_6,
  l.subaccount_segment_7,
  l.subaccount_segment_8,
  l.subaccount_segment_9,
  l.subaccount_segment_10,
  REGEXP_REPLACE(
    CONCAT(
      COALESCE(l.subaccount_segment_1, ''), '-',
      COALESCE(l.subaccount_segment_2, ''), '-',
      COALESCE(l.subaccount_segment_3, ''), '-',
      COALESCE(l.subaccount_segment_4, ''), '-',
      COALESCE(l.subaccount_segment_5, ''), '-',
      COALESCE(l.subaccount_segment_6, ''), '-',
      COALESCE(l.subaccount_segment_7, ''), '-',
      COALESCE(l.subaccount_segment_8, ''), '-',
      COALESCE(l.subaccount_segment_9, ''), '-',
      COALESCE(l.subaccount_segment_10, '')
    ),
    r'(-)+$',
    ''
  ) AS subaccount_id,
  COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.projectId'), hdr.project_id) AS line_project_id,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.projectTaskId') AS line_project_task_id,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.projectTaskCd') AS line_project_task_cd,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.taxCategoryId') AS tax_category_id,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.shippingRule') AS line_shipping_rule,
  COALESCE(
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.requestedOn'), JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.requestDate')) AS DATE),
    DATE(SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.requestedOn'), JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.requestDate')) AS TIMESTAMP))
  ) AS requested_on,
  COALESCE(
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.shipOn'), JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.shipDate')) AS DATE),
    DATE(SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.shipOn'), JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.shipDate')) AS TIMESTAMP))
  ) AS ship_on,
  COALESCE(
    SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.expirationDate') AS DATE),
    DATE(SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.expirationDate') AS TIMESTAMP))
  ) AS expiration_date,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.completed') AS BOOL) AS is_completed,
  SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.isFreeItem'), JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.freeItem')) AS BOOL) AS is_free_item,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.hasManualDiscount') AS BOOL) AS has_manual_discount,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.hasManualPrice') AS BOOL) AS has_manual_price,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.openLine') AS BOOL) AS is_open_line,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.commissionable') AS BOOL) AS is_commissionable,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.markForPO') AS BOOL) AS mark_for_po,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.poSource') AS po_source,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.lotSerialNbr') AS lot_serial_nbr,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.reasonCode') AS reason_code,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.externalLink') AS line_external_link,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.note') AS line_note,
  COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.supplier.id'), JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.supplierId')) AS supplier_id,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.supplier.name') AS supplier_name,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.supplier.currencyId') AS supplier_currency_id,
  JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.supplier.unitOfMeasure') AS supplier_unit_of_measure,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.supplierPrice') AS FLOAT64) AS supplier_price,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.replacementUnitCost') AS FLOAT64) AS replacement_unit_cost,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.isRotRutDeductible') AS BOOL) AS line_is_rot_rut_deductible,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.rotRutDeductibleAmount') AS FLOAT64) AS line_rot_rut_deductible_amount,
  SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.autoCreateIssue') AS BOOL) AS auto_create_issue
FROM lines_strategized l
INNER JOIN header_fact hdr
  ON l.tenant_id = hdr.tenant_id
 AND l.order_id = hdr.order_id
LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping mapped_bu
  ON l.tenant_id = mapped_bu.tenant_id
 AND hdr.order_date BETWEEN mapped_bu.valid_from AND COALESCE(mapped_bu.valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31')
   AND (
     mapped_bu.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
   OR mapped_bu.source_segment_2_value = COALESCE(l.subaccount_segment_2_normalized, '0')
  )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY
    l.tenant_id,
    l.order_id,
    COALESCE(
      CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.lineNbr') AS STRING),
      CAST(JSON_VALUE(l.line_json, '$.lineId') AS STRING),
      FORMAT('%03d', l.line_offset + 1)
    )
  ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN mapped_bu.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
    mapped_bu.valid_from DESC
) = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Silver: Sales order lines. Unnests SalesOrder V3 line arrays and resolves business units from line subaccount segment 2.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Silver fact: Shipment headers
-- Source: visma_shipments
-- Grain: one row per shipment (tenant + shipmentNumber)
-- Why: Maps to Power BI dimShipment. Tracks outbound logistics, shipped
--      quantities, and freight costs.
-- =============================================================================

WITH business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

source_data AS (
    SELECT
        tenantId                                        AS tenant_id,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS raw_business_unit_id,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS business_unit_id,
        -- Dimension FKs
        customer,
        currencyId                                      AS currency_id,
        fromWarehouse                                   AS from_warehouse_id,
        toWarehouse                                     AS to_warehouse_id,
        location,
        shipVia                                         AS ship_via,
        owner,

        -- Degenerate dimensions
        shipmentNumber                                  AS shipment_number,
        shipmentType                                    AS shipment_type,
        status,
        COALESCE(
          SAFE_CAST(shipmentDate AS DATE),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(shipmentDate AS DATETIME)),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(shipmentDate AS TIMESTAMP))
        )                                               AS shipment_date,
        operation,
        transactionType                                 AS transaction_type,
        hold,
        fobPoint                                        AS fob_point,
        shippingTerms                                   AS shipping_terms,

        -- Measures
        SAFE_CAST(shippedQuantity AS NUMERIC)           AS shipped_quantity,
        SAFE_CAST(shippedWeight AS NUMERIC)             AS shipped_weight,
        SAFE_CAST(shippedVolume AS NUMERIC)             AS shipped_volume,
        SAFE_CAST(controlQuantity AS NUMERIC)           AS control_quantity,
        SAFE_CAST(freightAmt AS NUMERIC)                AS freight_amount,
        SAFE_CAST(freightCost AS NUMERIC)               AS freight_cost,
        insurance,
        packages,
        SAFE_CAST(packagesWeight AS NUMERIC)            AS packages_weight,

        -- Audit
        SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)    AS last_modified_at

    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_shipments`
    WHERE isDeleted = false OR isDeleted IS NULL
),
enriched AS (
  SELECT
    source_data.*,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id AS mapped_bu_id,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_name AS mapped_bu_name,
    CASE
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL
       AND business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = '0' THEN 'segment_zero_match'
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'tenant_default_match'
      ELSE 'unresolved'
    END AS business_unit_resolution_method,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY source_data.tenant_id, source_data.shipment_number
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
        business_unit_mapping.valid_from DESC,
        source_data.last_modified_at DESC
    ) AS bu_match_rank
  FROM source_data
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping
    ON source_data.tenant_id = business_unit_mapping.tenant_id
   AND source_data.shipment_date BETWEEN business_unit_mapping.valid_from AND business_unit_mapping.valid_to
   AND (
     business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = '0'
   )
)
SELECT
  enriched.* EXCEPT (business_unit_id, mapped_bu_id, mapped_bu_name, bu_match_rank),
  COALESCE(enriched.mapped_bu_id, enriched.business_unit_id) AS business_unit_id,
  enriched.mapped_bu_name AS business_unit_name
FROM enriched
WHERE bu_match_rank = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Shipment headers from Visma. Grain: one row per shipment (tenant + shipmentNumber).

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Silver fact: Shipment detail lines (flattened from JSON array)
-- Source: visma_shipments -> shipmentDetailLines (JSON string)
-- Grain: one row per detail line (tenant + shipmentNumber + lineNbr)
-- Why: Maps to Power BI fctShipmentDetailLines. Tracks which items
--      were shipped in what quantities from which warehouse/location.
-- =============================================================================

WITH business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

source_data AS (
    SELECT
        h.tenantId                                          AS tenant_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                AS raw_business_unit_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                AS business_unit_id,
        h.shipmentNumber                                    AS shipment_number,
        h.shipmentType                                      AS shipment_type,
        h.status,
        COALESCE(
          SAFE_CAST(h.shipmentDate AS DATE),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(h.shipmentDate AS DATETIME)),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(h.shipmentDate AS TIMESTAMP))
        )                                                   AS shipment_date,

        -- Line dimension FKs
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."inventory.id"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory'), '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventoryId')) AS inventory_id,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.warehouse.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."warehouse.id"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.warehouse'), '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.warehouse')) AS warehouse_id,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$."location.id"'), JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location'), '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.location')) AS location_id,
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lotSerialNbr')                   AS lot_serial_nbr,

        -- Degenerate dimensions
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineNbr'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineNumber'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.sortOrder')) AS line_nbr,
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.description')                    AS line_description,
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.uom'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.uoM'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.unitOfMeasure')) AS unit_of_measure,

        -- Measures
        SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.shippedQty') AS NUMERIC) AS shipped_qty,
        SAFE_CAST(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.orderedQty') AS NUMERIC) AS ordered_qty

    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_shipments` AS h
    CROSS JOIN UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(h.shipmentDetailLines)) AS line
    WHERE h.isDeleted = false OR h.isDeleted IS NULL
),
enriched AS (
  SELECT
    source_data.*,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id AS mapped_bu_id,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_name AS mapped_bu_name,
    CASE
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL
       AND business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = '0' THEN 'segment_zero_match'
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'tenant_default_match'
      ELSE 'unresolved'
    END AS business_unit_resolution_method,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY source_data.tenant_id, source_data.shipment_number, source_data.line_nbr, source_data.inventory_id
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
        business_unit_mapping.valid_from DESC,
        COALESCE(source_data.shipped_qty, 0) DESC,
        COALESCE(source_data.ordered_qty, 0) DESC
    ) AS bu_match_rank
  FROM source_data
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping
    ON source_data.tenant_id = business_unit_mapping.tenant_id
   AND source_data.shipment_date BETWEEN business_unit_mapping.valid_from AND business_unit_mapping.valid_to
   AND (
     business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = '0'
   )
)
SELECT
  enriched.* EXCEPT (business_unit_id, mapped_bu_id, mapped_bu_name, bu_match_rank),
  COALESCE(enriched.mapped_bu_id, enriched.business_unit_id) AS business_unit_id,
  enriched.mapped_bu_name AS business_unit_name
FROM enriched
WHERE bu_match_rank = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Shipment detail lines flattened from JSON. Grain: one row per detail line (tenant + shipmentNumber + lineNbr).

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Silver fact: Supplier invoice headers
-- Source: visma_supplier_invoices
-- Grain: one row per invoice (tenant + reference_number)
-- Note: Header level only -- invoice lines are in fact_supplier_invoice_line.
-- =============================================================================

WITH business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

source_data AS (
  SELECT
    -- Grain / multi-tenant keys
    tenantId                                        AS tenant_id,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS raw_business_unit_id,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS business_unit_id,

    -- Dimension FKs
      SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(supplier, '$.number'), JSON_VALUE(supplier, '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(supplier, '$.internalId')) AS STRING) AS supplier_id,
      currencyId                                      AS currency_id,
      branchNumber                                    AS branch_id,
      SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(location, '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(location, '$.number')) AS STRING) AS location_id,
      creditTerms                                     AS credit_terms_id,
      SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(paymentMethod, '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(paymentMethod, '$.number')) AS STRING) AS payment_method_id,

    -- Degenerate dimensions
      referenceNumber                                 AS reference_number,
      documentType                                    AS document_type,
      COALESCE(
        SAFE_CAST(date AS DATE),
        DATE(SAFE_CAST(date AS DATETIME)),
        DATE(SAFE_CAST(date AS TIMESTAMP))
      )                                               AS date,
      COALESCE(
        SAFE_CAST(dueDate AS DATE),
        DATE(SAFE_CAST(dueDate AS DATETIME)),
        DATE(SAFE_CAST(dueDate AS TIMESTAMP))
      )                                               AS due_date,
      financialPeriod                                 AS financial_period,
      postPeriod                                      AS post_period,
      status,
      supplierReference                               AS supplier_reference,
      approvalStatus                                  AS approval_status,
      COALESCE(
        SAFE_CAST(payDate AS DATE),
        DATE(SAFE_CAST(payDate AS DATETIME)),
        DATE(SAFE_CAST(payDate AS TIMESTAMP))
      )                                               AS pay_date,

    -- Measures
      SAFE_CAST(balance AS NUMERIC)                   AS balance,
      SAFE_CAST(balanceInCurrency AS NUMERIC)         AS balance_in_currency,
      SAFE_CAST(vatTotal AS NUMERIC)                  AS vat_total,
      SAFE_CAST(vatTotalInCurrency AS NUMERIC)        AS vat_total_in_currency,
      SAFE_CAST(cashDiscount AS NUMERIC)              AS cash_discount,
      SAFE_CAST(cashDiscountInCurrency AS NUMERIC)    AS cash_discount_in_currency,
      SAFE_CAST(detailTotal AS NUMERIC)               AS detail_total,
      SAFE_CAST(detailTotalInCurrency AS NUMERIC)     AS detail_total_in_currency,
      SAFE_CAST(discountTotal AS NUMERIC)             AS discount_total,
      SAFE_CAST(discountTotalInCurrency AS NUMERIC)   AS discount_total_in_currency,
      SAFE_CAST(exchangeRate AS NUMERIC)              AS exchange_rate,
      SAFE_CAST(roundingDiff AS NUMERIC)              AS rounding_diff,
      SAFE_CAST(roundingDiffInCurrency AS NUMERIC)    AS rounding_diff_in_currency,

    -- Audit
      SAFE_CAST(createdDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)         AS created_at,
      SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)    AS last_modified_at
    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_supplier_invoices`
    WHERE isDeleted = false OR isDeleted IS NULL
  ),

resolved_business_unit AS (
  SELECT
    src.*,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id AS mapped_bu_id,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_name AS mapped_bu_name,
    CASE
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL
       AND business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = '0' THEN 'segment_zero_match'
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'tenant_default_match'
      ELSE 'unresolved'
    END AS business_unit_resolution_method,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY src.tenant_id, src.reference_number
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
        business_unit_mapping.valid_from DESC
    ) AS bu_match_rank
  FROM source_data AS src
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping
    ON src.tenant_id = business_unit_mapping.tenant_id
   AND src.date BETWEEN business_unit_mapping.valid_from AND business_unit_mapping.valid_to
   AND (
     business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = '0'
   )
)

  SELECT
    src.tenant_id,
    src.raw_business_unit_id,
    COALESCE(src.mapped_bu_id, src.business_unit_id) AS business_unit_id,
    src.mapped_bu_name AS business_unit_name,
    src.business_unit_resolution_method,
    src.supplier_id,
    src.currency_id,
    src.branch_id,
    src.location_id,
    src.credit_terms_id,
    src.payment_method_id,
    src.reference_number,
    src.document_type,
    src.date,
    src.due_date,
    src.financial_period,
    src.post_period,
    src.status,
    src.supplier_reference,
    src.approval_status,
    src.pay_date,
    src.balance,
    src.balance_in_currency,
    src.vat_total,
    src.vat_total_in_currency,
    src.cash_discount,
    src.cash_discount_in_currency,
    src.detail_total,
    src.detail_total_in_currency,
    src.discount_total,
    src.discount_total_in_currency,
    src.exchange_rate,
    src.rounding_diff,
    src.rounding_diff_in_currency,
    src.created_at,
    src.last_modified_at
  FROM resolved_business_unit AS src
  WHERE src.bu_match_rank = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Supplier invoice headers from Visma. Grain: one row per invoice (tenant + reference_number). Header level only -- invoice lines are in fact_supplier_invoice_line.

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Silver fact: Supplier invoice lines (flattened from JSON array)
-- Source: visma_supplier_invoices → invoiceLines (JSON string)
-- Grain: one row per invoice line (tenant + reference_number + line_number)
-- =============================================================================

WITH subaccount_dim AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    subaccount_id,
    segment2 AS segment2_value
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_visma.dim_subaccount`
),

business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

source_data AS (
  SELECT
    -- Header grain / multi-tenant keys
    h.tenantId                                          AS tenant_id,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                AS raw_business_unit_id,
    CAST(NULL AS STRING)                                AS business_unit_id,
    h.referenceNumber                                   AS reference_number,
    h.documentType                                      AS document_type,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(h.supplier, '$.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(h.supplier, '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(h.supplier, '$.internalId')
    ) AS STRING)                                        AS supplier_id,
    h.currencyId                                        AS currency_id,
    COALESCE(
      SAFE_CAST(h.date AS DATE),
      DATE(SAFE_CAST(h.date AS TIMESTAMP))
    )                                                   AS document_date,

    -- Dimension FKs (from line)
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventoryNumber'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory'), '$.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$."inventory.id"'),
      JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory'), '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventoryId')
    )                                                   AS inventory_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.account.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$."account.number"'),
      JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.account'), '$.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.account.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$."account.id"'),
      JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.account'), '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.account'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.salesAccountId'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$."salesAccountId"')
    )                                                   AS account_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.subaccount.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$."subaccount.id"'),
      JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.subaccount'), '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.subaccount.subaccountNumber'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.subaccount.subaccountId'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.subaccount'),
      CONCAT(
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.subaccount.1'),
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.subaccount.2'),
        JSON_VALUE(line, '$.subaccount.3')
      )
    )                                                   AS subaccount_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.subaccount.segments[1].segmentValue'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.subaccount.2')
    )                                                   AS source_segment_2_value,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.project.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$."project.id"'),
      JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.project'), '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.project'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.projectTaskId'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$."projectTaskId"')
    )                                                   AS project_id,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.branchNumber.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.branchNumber'), '$.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.branch.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.branch'), '$.number'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.branch.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$."branch.id"'),
      JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.branch'), '$.id'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.branch'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.warehouseId')
    )                                                   AS branch_id,

    -- Degenerate dimensions
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineNumber'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineNbr'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.sortOrder')
    )                                                   AS line_number,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.transactionDescription'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineDescription'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.description'),
      JSON_VALUE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.inventory'), '$.description')
    )                                                   AS line_description,
    COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.uoM'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.uom'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.unitOfMeasure')
    )                                                   AS unit_of_measure,

    -- Measures
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.quantity'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.orderQty')) AS NUMERIC) AS quantity,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(line, '$.unitCost'), JSON_VALUE(line, '$.unitPrice')) AS NUMERIC) AS unit_cost,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.costInCurrency'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.cost'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.amount'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.extendedPrice'),
      JSON_VALUE(line, '$.lineTotalBeforeDiscount')
    ) AS NUMERIC) AS amount
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_supplier_invoices` AS h
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(JSON_QUERY_ARRAY(h.invoiceLines)) AS line
  WHERE h.isDeleted = false OR h.isDeleted IS NULL
),

resolved_business_unit AS (
  SELECT
    src.*,
    COALESCE(src.source_segment_2_value, subaccount_dim.segment2_value) AS accounting_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id AS mapped_bu_id,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_name AS mapped_bu_name,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY src.tenant_id, src.reference_number, src.line_number, src.inventory_id
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        business_unit_mapping.valid_from DESC
    ) AS row_num
  FROM source_data AS src
  LEFT JOIN subaccount_dim
    ON src.tenant_id = subaccount_dim.tenant_id
   AND src.subaccount_id = subaccount_dim.subaccount_id
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping
    ON src.tenant_id = business_unit_mapping.tenant_id
   AND src.document_date BETWEEN business_unit_mapping.valid_from AND business_unit_mapping.valid_to
   AND (
     business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = COALESCE(src.source_segment_2_value, subaccount_dim.segment2_value, '0')
   )
)

SELECT
  src.tenant_id,
  src.raw_business_unit_id,
  src.accounting_segment_2_value,
  COALESCE(
    src.mapped_bu_id,
    src.business_unit_id
  ) AS business_unit_id,
  src.mapped_bu_name AS business_unit_name,
  CASE
    WHEN src.mapped_bu_id IS NOT NULL AND src.accounting_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 'subaccount_segment2_match'
    WHEN src.mapped_bu_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'tenant_default_match'
    ELSE 'unresolved'
  END AS business_unit_resolution_method,
  src.supplier_id,
  src.currency_id,
  src.document_date,
  src.reference_number,
  src.document_type,
  src.inventory_id,
  src.account_id,
  src.subaccount_id,
  src.project_id,
  src.branch_id,
  src.line_number,
  src.line_description,
  src.unit_of_measure,
  src.quantity,
  src.unit_cost,
  src.amount
FROM resolved_business_unit AS src
WHERE src.row_num = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Supplier invoice lines flattened from nested JSON array. Grain: one row per invoice line (tenant + reference_number + line_number).

tables.query:
-- =============================================================================
-- Silver fact: Supplier (AP) payments
-- Source: visma_supplier_payments
-- Grain: one row per payment (tenant + refNbr)
-- NOTE: currency field is a NESTED JSON object {id, description} — differs
--       from customer_payments which is a plain STRING. We normalize to
--       extract just the currency ID string.
-- =============================================================================

WITH business_unit_mapping AS (
  SELECT
    tenant_id,
    source_segment_2_value,
    business_unit_id,
    business_unit_name,
    valid_from,
    COALESCE(valid_to, DATE '9999-12-31') AS valid_to
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.business_unit_mapping`
),

source_data AS (
    SELECT
        tenantId                                        AS tenant_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS raw_business_unit_id,
        CAST(NULL AS STRING)                            AS business_unit_id,
        -- Dimension FKs
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(supplier, '$.number'), JSON_VALUE(supplier, '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(supplier, '$.internalId')) AS STRING) AS supplier_id,
        -- Normalize nested currency object to plain string
        COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(currency, '$.id'), SAFE_CAST(currency AS STRING)) AS currency_id,
        branch                                          AS branch_id,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(location, '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(location, '$.number'), JSON_VALUE(location, '$.internalId'), location) AS STRING) AS location,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(cashAccount, '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(cashAccount, '$.number'), JSON_VALUE(cashAccount, '$.internalId'), cashAccount) AS STRING) AS cash_account,
    SAFE_CAST(COALESCE(JSON_VALUE(paymentMethod, '$.id'), JSON_VALUE(paymentMethod, '$.number'), JSON_VALUE(paymentMethod, '$.internalId'), paymentMethod) AS STRING) AS payment_method,

        -- Degenerate dimensions
        refNbr                                          AS ref_nbr,
        type                                            AS payment_type,
        status,
        COALESCE(
          SAFE_CAST(applicationDate AS DATE),
          DATE(SAFE_CAST(applicationDate AS TIMESTAMP))
        )                                              AS application_date,
        applicationPeriod                               AS application_period,
        paymentRef                                      AS payment_ref,
        description,
        hold,
        released                                        AS is_released,

        -- Measures
        SAFE_CAST(paymentAmount AS NUMERIC)             AS payment_amount,
        SAFE_CAST(appliedAmount AS NUMERIC)             AS applied_amount,
        SAFE_CAST(balance AS NUMERIC)                   AS balance,
        SAFE_CAST(unappliedBalance AS NUMERIC)          AS unapplied_balance,
        SAFE_CAST(financeCharges AS NUMERIC)            AS finance_charges,

        -- Audit
        SAFE_CAST(lastModifiedDateTime AS TIMESTAMP)    AS last_modified_at

    FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_bronze_visma.visma_supplier_payments`
    WHERE isDeleted = false OR isDeleted IS NULL
),
enriched AS (
  SELECT
    source_data.*,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id AS mapped_bu_id,
    business_unit_mapping.business_unit_name AS mapped_bu_name,
    CASE
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL
       AND business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = '0' THEN 'segment_zero_match'
      WHEN business_unit_mapping.business_unit_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'tenant_default_match'
      ELSE 'unresolved'
    END AS business_unit_resolution_method,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY source_data.tenant_id, source_data.ref_nbr
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC,
        business_unit_mapping.valid_from DESC
    ) AS bu_match_rank
  FROM source_data
  LEFT JOIN business_unit_mapping
    ON source_data.tenant_id = business_unit_mapping.tenant_id
   AND source_data.application_date BETWEEN business_unit_mapping.valid_from AND business_unit_mapping.valid_to
   AND (
     business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value IS NULL
     OR business_unit_mapping.source_segment_2_value = '0'
   )
)
SELECT
  enriched.* EXCEPT (business_unit_id, mapped_bu_id, mapped_bu_name, bu_match_rank),
  COALESCE(enriched.mapped_bu_id, enriched.business_unit_id) AS business_unit_id,
  enriched.mapped_bu_name AS business_unit_name
FROM enriched
WHERE bu_match_rank = 1

actionDescriptor.description: Supplier (AP) payment documents from Visma. Grain: one row per payment (tenant + refNbr).

assertions.query:
SELECT
  *
FROM (
  SELECT
    account_code_3,
    COUNT(1) AS index_row_count
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.chart_of_accounts`
  GROUP BY account_code_3
  ) AS data
WHERE index_row_count > 1

SELECT
  'account_code_3 IS NOT NULL' AS failing_row_condition,
  *
FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.chart_of_accounts`
WHERE NOT (account_code_3 IS NOT NULL)
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'bs_pl IS NOT NULL' AS failing_row_condition,
  *
FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.chart_of_accounts`
WHERE NOT (bs_pl IS NOT NULL)

SELECT
  *
FROM (
  SELECT
    mapping_scope, local_account_digits, range_start_account_code,
    COUNT(1) AS index_row_count
  FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.global_account_mapping`
  GROUP BY mapping_scope, local_account_digits, range_start_account_code
  ) AS data
WHERE index_row_count > 1

SELECT
  'mapping_scope IS NOT NULL' AS failing_row_condition,
  *
FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.global_account_mapping`
WHERE NOT (mapping_scope IS NOT NULL)
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'local_account_digits IS NOT NULL' AS failing_row_condition,
  *
FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.global_account_mapping`
WHERE NOT (local_account_digits IS NOT NULL)
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'range_start_account_code IS NOT NULL' AS failing_row_condition,
  *
FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.global_account_mapping`
WHERE NOT (range_start_account_code IS NOT NULL)
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'range_end_account_code IS NOT NULL' AS failing_row_condition,
  *
FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.global_account_mapping`
WHERE NOT (range_end_account_code IS NOT NULL)
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'mapped_account_code_3 IS NOT NULL' AS failing_row_condition,
  *
FROM `prj-dw-dev.dw_1_silver_excel.global_account_mapping`
WHERE NOT (mapped_account_code_3 IS NOT NULL)
